search_text: Quality Not Quantity: On the Interaction between Dataset Design and Robustness of CLIP 质量而非数量：论数据集设计与 CLIP 稳健性之间的相互作用 Web-crawled datasets have enabled remarkable generalization capabilities in recent image-text models such as CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image pre-training) or Flamingo, but little is known about the dataset creation processes. In this work, we introduce a testbed of six publicly available data sources - YFCC, LAION, Conceptual Captions, WIT, RedCaps, Shutterstock - to investigate how pre-training distributions induce robustness in CLIP. We find that the performance of the pre-training data varies substantially across distribution shifts, with no single data source dominating. Moreover, we systematically study the interactions between these data sources and find that combining multiple sources does not necessarily yield better models, but rather dilutes the robustness of the best individual data source. We complement our empirical findings with theoretical insights from a simple setting, where combining the training data also results in diluted robustness. In addition, our theoretical model provides a candidate explanation for the success of the CLIP-based data filtering technique recently employed in the LAION dataset. Overall our results demonstrate that simply gathering a large amount of data from the web is not the most effective way to build a pre-training dataset for robust generalization, necessitating further study into dataset design. Code is available at https://github.com/mlfoundations/clip_quality_not_quantity. 网络爬取的数据集在最近的图像文本模型中实现了显着的泛化能力，例如 CLIP（对比语言图像预训练）或 Flamingo，但人们对数据集创建过程知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个包含六个公开可用数据源（YFCC、LAION、Conceptual Captions、WIT、RedCaps、Shutterstock）的测试平台，以研究预训练分布如何增强 CLIP 的稳健性。我们发现预训练数据的性能随着分布变化而变化很大，没有一个数据源占主导地位。此外，我们系统地研究了这些数据源之间的相互作用，发现组合多个数据源并不一定会产生更好的模型，而是会削弱最佳单个数据源的稳健性。我们通过简单设置中的理论见解来补充我们的实证研究结果，其中结合训练数据也会导致鲁棒性减弱。此外，我们的理论模型为最近在 LAION 数据集中采用的基于 CLIP 的数据过滤技术的成功提供了候选解释。总的来说，我们的结果表明，简单地从网络收集大量数据并不是构建预训练数据集以实现稳健泛化的最有效方法，因此需要进一步研究数据集设计。代码可在 https://github.com/mlfoundations/clip_quality_not_quantity 获取。 该论文研究了不同数据集设计对CLIP模型鲁棒性的影响，通过分析六个公开数据源的分布特性及其组合效果。 Thao Nguyen,Gabriel Ilharco,Mitchell Wortsman,Sewoong Oh,Ludwig Schmidt cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Chentao Cao,Zhuo-Xu Cui,Yue Wang,Shaonan Liu,Taijin Chen,Hairong Zheng,Dong Liang,Yanjie Zhu
title: High-Frequency Space Diffusion Models for Accelerated MRI
title_zh: 加速 MRI 的高频空间扩散模型
comment: accepted for IEEE TMI
comments: accepted for IEEE TMI
abstract: Diffusion models with continuous stochastic differential equations (SDEs) have shown superior performances in image generation. It can serve as a deep generative prior to solving the inverse problem in magnetic resonance (MR) reconstruction. However, low-frequency regions of $k$-space data are typically fully sampled in fast MR imaging, while existing diffusion models are performed throughout the entire image or $k$-space, inevitably introducing uncertainty in the reconstruction of low-frequency regions. Additionally, existing diffusion models often demand substantial iterations to converge, resulting in time-consuming reconstructions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel SDE tailored specifically for MR reconstruction with the diffusion process in high-frequency space (referred to as HFS-SDE). This approach ensures determinism in the fully sampled low-frequency regions and accelerates the sampling procedure of reverse diffusion. Experiments conducted on the publicly available fastMRI dataset demonstrate that the proposed HFS-SDE method outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods, supervised deep learning, and existing diffusion models in terms of reconstruction accuracy and stability. The fast convergence properties are also confirmed through theoretical and experimental validation. Our code and weights are available at https://github.com/Aboriginer/HFS-SDE.
summary: Diffusion models with continuous stochastic differential equations (SDEs) have shown superior performances in image generation. It can serve as a deep generative prior to solving the inverse problem in magnetic resonance (MR) reconstruction. However, low-frequency regions of $k$-space data are typically fully sampled in fast MR imaging, while existing diffusion models are performed throughout the entire image or $k$-space, inevitably introducing uncertainty in the reconstruction of low-frequency regions. Additionally, existing diffusion models often demand substantial iterations to converge, resulting in time-consuming reconstructions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel SDE tailored specifically for MR reconstruction with the diffusion process in high-frequency space (referred to as HFS-SDE). This approach ensures determinism in the fully sampled low-frequency regions and accelerates the sampling procedure of reverse diffusion. Experiments conducted on the publicly available fastMRI dataset demonstrate that the proposed HFS-SDE method outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods, supervised deep learning, and existing diffusion models in terms of reconstruction accuracy and stability. The fast convergence properties are also confirmed through theoretical and experimental validation. Our code and weights are available at https://github.com/Aboriginer/HFS-SDE.
abstract_zh: 具有连续随机微分方程 (SDE) 的扩散模型在图像生成方面表现出了卓越的性能。它可以作为解决磁共振（MR）重建中的逆问题之前的深度生成。然而，在快速MR成像中，k空间数据的低频区域通常被完全采样，而现有的扩散模型是在整个图像或k空间中执行的，不可避免地在低频区域的重建中引入不确定性。此外，现有的扩散模型通常需要大量迭代才能收敛，从而导致重建耗时。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种专门针对高频空间中的扩散过程进行MR重建的新型SDE（称为HFS-SDE）。这种方法确保了完全采样的低频区域的确定性，并加速了反向扩散的采样过程。在公开的 fastMRI 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的 HFS-SDE 方法在重建精度和稳定性方面优于传统的并行成像方法、监督深度学习和现有的扩散模型。快速收敛特性也通过理论和实验验证得到证实。我们的代码和权重可在 https://github.com/Aboriginer/HFS-SDE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对高频率空间的扩散模型（HFS-SDE），用于加速磁共振成像（MRI）重建。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在低频k空间区域重建时存在不确定性，且收敛速度慢，导致MRI重建效率低下。
AI.method: 设计一种新型连续随机微分方程（SDE），仅在高频率k空间进行扩散过程，确保低频区域确定性重建并加速反向扩散采样。
AI.result: 在fastMRI数据集上，HFS-SDE在重建精度和稳定性上优于传统并行成像、监督深度学习及现有扩散模型，且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: HFS-SDE通过聚焦高频率空间扩散，有效提升MRI重建效率与质量，代码已开源供验证使用。

It can serve as a deep generative prior to solving the inverse problem in magnetic resonance (MR) reconstruction. However, low-frequency regions of $k$-space data are typically fully sampled in fast MR imaging, while existing diffusion models are performed throughout the entire image or $k$-space, inevitably introducing uncertainty in the reconstruction of low-frequency regions. Additionally, existing diffusion models often demand substantial iterations to converge, resulting in time-consuming reconstructions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel SDE tailored specifically for MR reconstruction with the diffusion process in high-frequency space (referred to as HFS-SDE). This approach ensures determinism in the fully sampled low-frequency regions and accelerates the sampling procedure of reverse diffusion. Experiments conducted on the publicly available fastMRI dataset demonstrate that the proposed HFS-SDE method outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods, supervised deep learning, and existing diffusion models in terms of reconstruction accuracy and stability. The fast convergence properties are also confirmed through theoretical and experimental validation. authors_text: S. W. Hsiao,P. Y. Chu
title: Sequence Feature Extraction for Malware Family Analysis via Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 通过图神经网络进行恶意软件家族分析的序列特征提取
comment: 13 pages
comments: 13 pages
abstract: Malicious software (malware) causes much harm to our devices and life. We are eager to understand the malware behavior and the threat it made. Most of the record files of malware are variable length and text-based files with time stamps, such as event log data and dynamic analysis profiles. Using the time stamps, we can sort such data into sequence-based data for the following analysis. However, dealing with the text-based sequences with variable lengths is difficult. In addition, unlike natural language text data, most sequential data in information security have specific properties and structure, such as loop, repeated call, noise, etc. To deeply analyze the API call sequences with their structure, we use graphs to represent the sequences, which can further investigate the information and structure, such as the Markov model. Therefore, we design and implement an Attention Aware Graph Neural Network (AWGCN) to analyze the API call sequences. Through AWGCN, we can obtain the sequence embeddings to analyze the behavior of the malware. Moreover, the classification experiment result shows that AWGCN outperforms other classifiers in the call-like datasets, and the embedding can further improve the classic model's performance.
summary: Malicious software (malware) causes much harm to our devices and life. We are eager to understand the malware behavior and the threat it made. Most of the record files of malware are variable length and text-based files with time stamps, such as event log data and dynamic analysis profiles. Using the time stamps, we can sort such data into sequence-based data for the following analysis. However, dealing with the text-based sequences with variable lengths is difficult. In addition, unlike natural language text data, most sequential data in information security have specific properties and structure, such as loop, repeated call, noise, etc. To deeply analyze the API call sequences with their structure, we use graphs to represent the sequences, which can further investigate the information and structure, such as the Markov model. Therefore, we design and implement an Attention Aware Graph Neural Network (AWGCN) to analyze the API call sequences. Through AWGCN, we can obtain the sequence embeddings to analyze the behavior of the malware. Moreover, the classification experiment result shows that AWGCN outperforms other classifiers in the call-like datasets, and the embedding can further improve the classic model's performance.
abstract_zh: 恶意软件（malware）对我们的设备和生活造成很大危害。我们渴望了解恶意软件的行为及其造成的威胁。大多数恶意软件的记录文件是可变长度和带有时间戳的基于文本的文件，例如事件日志数据和动态分析配置文件。利用时间戳，我们可以将这些数据排序为基于序列的数据，以便进行后续分析。然而，处理可变长度的基于文本的序列是很困难的。此外，与自然语言文本数据不同，信息安全中的大多数序列数据都具有特定的属性和结构，例如循环、重复调用、噪声等。为了深入分析API调用序列及其结构，我们使用图来表示序列，可以进一步研究信息和结构，例如马尔可夫模型。因此，我们设计并实现了一个注意力感知图神经网络（AWGCN）来分析 API 调用序列。通过AWGCN，我们可以获得序列嵌入来分析恶意软件的行为。此外，分类实验结果表明，AWGCN 在类调用数据集中优于其他分类器，并且嵌入可以进一步提高经典模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络的注意力感知模型（AWGCN），用于提取恶意软件API调用序列的结构特征并实现家族分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理具有循环、重复调用等复杂结构的变长API序列数据，需更精确的特征提取方法以提升恶意软件分析效果。
AI.method: 将API调用序列建模为图结构，设计结合注意力机制的图卷积网络（AWGCN），通过图神经网络学习序列嵌入表示以捕捉结构化行为特征。
AI.result: 在call-like数据集上，AWGCN分类准确率优于其他分类器，且生成的嵌入表示可提升经典模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: AWGCN能有效捕捉API序列的结构化特征，为恶意软件行为分析和家族分类提供新方法，验证了图神经网络在安全领域序列分析中的优势。

ai_content.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络的注意力感知模型（AWGCN），用于提取恶意软件API调用序列的结构特征并实现家族分类。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理具有循环、重复调用等复杂结构的变长API序列数据，需更精确的特征提取方法以提升恶意软件分析效果。
ai_content.method: 将API调用序列建模为图结构，设计结合注意力机制的图卷积网络（AWGCN），通过图神经网络学习序列嵌入表示以捕捉结构化行为特征。
ai_content.result: 在call-like数据集上，AWGCN分类准确率优于其他分类器，且生成的嵌入表示可提升经典模型的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: AWGCN能有效捕捉API序列的结构化特征，为恶意软件行为分析和家族分类提供新方法，验证了图神经网络在安全领域序列分析中的优势。

search_text: Sequence Feature Extraction for Malware Family Analysis via Graph Neural Network 通过图神经网络进行恶意软件家族分析的序列特征提取 Malicious software (malware) causes much harm to our devices and life. We are eager to understand the malware behavior and the threat it made. Most of the record files of malware are variable length and text-based files with time stamps, such as event log data and dynamic analysis profiles. Using the time stamps, we can sort such data into sequence-based data for the following analysis. However, dealing with the text-based sequences with variable lengths is difficult. In addition, unlike natural language text data, most sequential data in information security have specific properties and structure, such as loop, repeated call, noise, etc. To deeply analyze the API call sequences with their structure, we use graphs to represent the sequences, which can further investigate the information and structure, such as the Markov model. Therefore, we design and implement an Attention Aware Graph Neural Network (AWGCN) to analyze the API call sequences. Through AWGCN, we can obtain the sequence embeddings to analyze the behavior of the malware. Moreover, the classification experiment result shows that AWGCN outperforms other classifiers in the call-like datasets, and the embedding can further improve the classic model's performance. 恶意软件（malware）对我们的设备和生活造成很大危害。我们渴望了解恶意软件的行为及其造成的威胁。大多数恶意软件的记录文件是可变长度和带有时间戳的基于文本的文件，例如事件日志数据和动态分析配置文件。利用时间戳，我们可以将这些数据排序为基于序列的数据，以便进行后续分析。然而，处理可变长度的基于文本的序列是很困难的。此外，与自然语言文本数据不同，信息安全中的大多数序列数据都具有特定的属性和结构，例如循环、重复调用、噪声等。为了深入分析API调用序列及其结构，我们使用图来表示序列，可以进一步研究信息和结构，例如马尔可夫模型。因此，我们设计并实现了一个注意力感知图神经网络（AWGCN）来分析 API 调用序列。通过AWGCN，我们可以获得序列嵌入来分析恶意软件的行为。此外，分类实验结果表明，AWGCN 在类调用数据集中优于其他分类器，并且嵌入可以进一步提高经典模型的性能。 提出基于图神经网络的注意力感知模型（AWGCN），用于提取恶意软件API调用序列的结构特征并实现家族分类。 S. W. Hsiao,P. Y. Chu cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiachen Li,Chuanbo Hua,Jinkyoo Park,Hengbo Ma,Victoria Dax,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: EvolveHypergraph: Group-Aware Dynamic Relational Reasoning for Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: EvolveHypergraph：用于轨迹预测的群体感知动态关系推理
abstract: While the modeling of pair-wise relations has been widely studied in multi-agent interacting systems, its ability to capture higher-level and larger-scale group-wise activities is limited. In this paper, we propose a group-aware relational reasoning approach (named EvolveHypergraph) with explicit inference of the underlying dynamically evolving relational structures, and we demonstrate its effectiveness for multi-agent trajectory prediction. In addition to the edges between a pair of nodes (i.e., agents), we propose to infer hyperedges that adaptively connect multiple nodes to enable group-aware relational reasoning in an unsupervised manner without fixing the number of hyperedges. The proposed approach infers the dynamically evolving relation graphs and hypergraphs over time to capture the evolution of relations, which are used by the trajectory predictor to obtain future states. Moreover, we propose to regularize the smoothness of the relation evolution and the sparsity of the inferred graphs or hypergraphs, which effectively improves training stability and enhances the explainability of inferred relations. The proposed approach is validated on both synthetic crowd simulations and multiple real-world benchmark datasets. Our approach infers explainable, reasonable group-aware relations and achieves state-of-the-art performance in long-term prediction.
summary: While the modeling of pair-wise relations has been widely studied in multi-agent interacting systems, its ability to capture higher-level and larger-scale group-wise activities is limited. In this paper, we propose a group-aware relational reasoning approach (named EvolveHypergraph) with explicit inference of the underlying dynamically evolving relational structures, and we demonstrate its effectiveness for multi-agent trajectory prediction. In addition to the edges between a pair of nodes (i.e., agents), we propose to infer hyperedges that adaptively connect multiple nodes to enable group-aware relational reasoning in an unsupervised manner without fixing the number of hyperedges. The proposed approach infers the dynamically evolving relation graphs and hypergraphs over time to capture the evolution of relations, which are used by the trajectory predictor to obtain future states. Moreover, we propose to regularize the smoothness of the relation evolution and the sparsity of the inferred graphs or hypergraphs, which effectively improves training stability and enhances the explainability of inferred relations. The proposed approach is validated on both synthetic crowd simulations and multiple real-world benchmark datasets. Our approach infers explainable, reasonable group-aware relations and achieves state-of-the-art performance in long-term prediction.
abstract_zh: 虽然成对关系建模已在多智能体交互系统中得到广泛研究，但其捕获更高级别和更大规模的群体活动的能力是有限的。在本文中，我们提出了一种群体感知关系推理方法（名为 EvolveHypergraph），该方法对底层动态演化关系结构进行显式推理，并证明了其对于多智能体轨迹预测的有效性。除了一对节点（即代理）之间的边之外，我们还建议推断自适应连接多个节点的超边，以无监督的方式实现群体感知关系推理，而无需固定超边的数量。所提出的方法推断随时间动态演变的关系图和超图以捕获关系的演变，轨迹预测器使用这些演变来获得未来状态。此外，我们提出正则化关系演化的平滑性和推断图或超图的稀疏性，这有效地提高了训练稳定性并增强了推断关系的可解释性。所提出的方法在综合人群模拟和多个现实世界基准数据集上得到了验证。我们的方法推断出可解释的、合理的群体感知关系，并在长期预测中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EvolveHypergraph的组感知动态关系推理方法，用于多智能体轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在建模多智能体系统中的成对关系时，难以捕捉更高层次和更大规模的群体活动。
AI.method: 通过引入自适应连接多个节点的超边，以无监督方式实现组感知关系推理，并动态推断随时间演变的关系图和超图，同时正则化关系演变的平滑性与图的稀疏性。
AI.result: 在合成人群模拟和多个真实世界基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性，实现了最先进的长期预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够推断出可解释的组感知关系，在轨迹预测任务中表现出优越的性能和稳定性。

authors_text: Daniel A. Epstein,Fannie Liu,Andrés Monroy-Hernández,Dennis Wang
title: Revisiting Piggyback Prototyping: Examining Benefits and Tradeoffs in Extending Existing Social Computing Systems
title_zh: 重新审视搭载原型：检查扩展现有社交计算系统的好处和权衡
comment: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22)
comments: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22)
abstract: The CSCW community has a history of designing, implementing, and evaluating novel social interactions in technology, but the process requires significant technical effort for uncertain value. We discuss the opportunities and applications of "piggyback prototyping", building and evaluating new ideas for social computing on top of existing ones, expanding on its potential to contribute design recommendations. Drawing on about 50 papers which use the method, we critically examine the intellectual and technical benefits it provides, such as ecological validity and leveraging well-tested features, as well as research-product and ethical tensions it imposes, such as limits to customization and violation of participant privacy. We discuss considerations for future researchers deciding whether to use piggyback prototyping and point to new research agendas which can reduce the burden of implementing the method.
summary: The CSCW community has a history of designing, implementing, and evaluating novel social interactions in technology, but the process requires significant technical effort for uncertain value. We discuss the opportunities and applications of "piggyback prototyping", building and evaluating new ideas for social computing on top of existing ones, expanding on its potential to contribute design recommendations. Drawing on about 50 papers which use the method, we critically examine the intellectual and technical benefits it provides, such as ecological validity and leveraging well-tested features, as well as research-product and ethical tensions it imposes, such as limits to customization and violation of participant privacy. We discuss considerations for future researchers deciding whether to use piggyback prototyping and point to new research agendas which can reduce the burden of implementing the method.
abstract_zh: CSCW 社区拥有设计、实施和评估新型社交互动技术的历史，但该过程需要大量的技术努力，且价值不确定。我们讨论“搭载原型设计”的机会和应用，在现有想法的基础上构建和评估社交计算的新想法，扩展其贡献设计建议的潜力。我们借鉴了大约 50 篇使用该方法的论文，批判性地研究了它所提供的知识和技术优势，例如生态有效性和利用经过充分测试的功能，以及它带来的研究产品和道德紧张，例如对定制的限制和对参与者隐私的侵犯。我们讨论了未来研究人员决定是否使用搭载原型设计的考虑因素，并指出了可以减轻实施该方法负担的新研究议程。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了社交计算系统扩展中的'搭便车原型设计'方法，分析其优势与权衡，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: CSCW社区在设计新型社交互动技术时面临开发成本高且价值不确定的问题，需探索更高效的研究方法。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析约50篇使用该方法的论文，评估其生态效度、技术优势及隐私等伦理挑战。
AI.result: 确认了该方法在减少开发负担和提升真实场景验证的优势，同时揭示了定制限制与隐私风险等核心问题。
AI.conclusion: 搭便车原型设计具有研究潜力，但需平衡其利弊，未来应聚焦于降低实施难度与伦理冲突的解决方案。

authors_text: Jaejin Cho,Jes'us Villalba,Laureano Moro-Velazquez,Najim Dehak
title: Non-Contrastive Self-supervised Learning for Utterance-Level Information Extraction from Speech
title_zh: 用于从语音中提取话语级信息的非对比自监督学习
comment: EARLY ACCESS of IEEE JSTSP Special Issue on Self-Supervised Learning for Speech and Audio Processing
comments: EARLY ACCESS of IEEE JSTSP Special Issue on Self-Supervised Learning for Speech and Audio Processing
abstract: In recent studies, self-supervised pre-trained models tend to outperform supervised pre-trained models in transfer learning. In particular, self-supervised learning (SSL) of utterance-level speech representation can be used in speech applications that require discriminative representation of consistent attributes within an utterance: speaker, language, emotion, and age. Existing frame-level self-supervised speech representation, e.g., wav2vec, can be used as utterance-level representation with pooling, but the models are usually large. There are also SSL techniques to learn utterance-level representation. One of the most successful is a contrastive method, which requires negative sampling: selecting alternative samples to contrast with the current sample (anchor). However, this does not ensure that all the negative samples belong to classes different from the anchor class without labels. This paper applies a non-contrastive self-supervised method to learn utterance-level embeddings. We adapted DIstillation with NO labels (DINO) from computer vision to speech. Unlike contrastive methods, DINO does not require negative sampling. We compared DINO to x-vector trained in a supervised manner. When transferred to down-stream tasks (speaker verification, speech emotion recognition (SER), and Alzheimer's disease detection), DINO outperformed x-vector. We studied the influence of several aspects during transfer learning such as dividing the fine-tuning process into steps, chunk lengths, or augmentation. During fine-tuning, tuning the last affine layers first and then the whole network surpassed fine-tuning all at once. Using shorter chunk lengths, although they generate more diverse inputs, did not necessarily improve performance, implying speech segments at least with a specific length are required for better performance per application. Augmentation was helpful in SER.

One of the most successful is a contrastive method, which requires negative sampling: selecting alternative samples to contrast with the current sample (anchor). However, this does not ensure that all the negative samples belong to classes different from the anchor class without labels. This paper applies a non-contrastive self-supervised method to learn utterance-level embeddings. We adapted DIstillation with NO labels (DINO) from computer vision to speech. Unlike contrastive methods, DINO does not require negative sampling. We compared DINO to x-vector trained in a supervised manner. When transferred to down-stream tasks (speaker verification, speech emotion recognition (SER), and Alzheimer's disease detection), DINO outperformed x-vector. We studied the influence of several aspects during transfer learning such as dividing the fine-tuning process into steps, chunk lengths, or augmentation. Augmentation was helpful in SER.
abstract_zh: 在最近的研究中，自监督预训练模型在迁移学习中往往优于监督预训练模型。特别是，话语级语音表示的自监督学习（SSL）可用于需要对话语中的一致属性（说话者、语言、情感和年龄）进行区分表示的语音应用。现有的帧级自监督语音表示，例如 wav2vec，可以用作带有池化的话语级表示，但模型通常很大。还有 SSL 技术来学习话语级表示。最成功的方法之一是对比方法，它需要负采样：选择替代样本与当前样本（锚点）进行对比。然而，这并不能确保所有负样本都属于与没有标签的锚类不同的类。本文应用非对比自监督方法来学习话语级嵌入。我们将无标签蒸馏 (DINO) 从计算机视觉改编为语音。与对比方法不同，DINO 不需要负采样。我们将 DINO 与以监督方式训练的 x 向量进行了比较。当转移到下游任务（说话人验证、语音情感识别 (SER) 和阿尔茨海默病检测）时，DINO 的表现优于 x-向量。我们研究了迁移学习过程中几个方面的影响，例如将微调过程划分为步骤、块长度或增强。微调时，先调整最后的仿射层，然后整个网络一次性超越微调。使用较短的块长度，尽管它们会生成更多样化的输入，但并不一定会提高性能，这意味着至少需要具有特定长度的语音片段才能提高每个应用程序的性能。增强对 SER 很有帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对比自监督学习方法用于语音话语级信息提取，通过迁移DINO视觉模型实现无标签语音嵌入学习。
AI.motivation: 现有对比自监督语音模型依赖负样本选择且模型复杂，而监督模型如x-vector在跨任务迁移中存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 将计算机视觉领域DINO方法迁移至语音领域，通过无标签蒸馏学习话语级嵌入，对比实验采用分阶段微调策略并分析数据增强影响。
AI.result: DINO在说话人验证、情绪识别和阿尔茨海默症检测任务中均优于监督训练的x-vector，分阶段微调策略提升效果且数据增强对情绪识别有帮助。
AI.conclusion: 非对比自监督学习能有效生成话语级语音表征，合理微调策略和任务相关数据增强是提升迁移性能的关键因素。

authors_text: Nicole Fronda,Houssam Abbas
title: Differentiable Inference of Temporal Logic Formulas
title_zh: 时态逻辑公式的可微推理
abstract: We demonstrate the first Recurrent Neural Network architecture for learning Signal Temporal Logic formulas, and present the first systematic comparison of formula inference methods. Legacy systems embed much expert knowledge which is not explicitly formalized. There is great interest in learning formal specifications that characterize the ideal behavior of such systems -- that is, formulas in temporal logic that are satisfied by the system's output signals. Such specifications can be used to better understand the system's behavior and improve design of its next iteration. Previous inference methods either assumed certain formula templates, or did a heuristic enumeration of all possible templates. This work proposes a neural network architecture that infers the formula structure via gradient descent, eliminating the need for imposing any specific templates. It combines learning of formula structure and parameters in one optimization. Through systematic comparison, we demonstrate that this method achieves similar or better mis-classification rates (MCR) than enumerative and lattice methods. We also observe that different formulas can achieve similar MCR, empirically demonstrating the under-determinism of the problem of temporal logic inference.
summary: We demonstrate the first Recurrent Neural Network architecture for learning Signal Temporal Logic formulas, and present the first systematic comparison of formula inference methods. Legacy systems embed much expert knowledge which is not explicitly formalized. There is great interest in learning formal specifications that characterize the ideal behavior of such systems -- that is, formulas in temporal logic that are satisfied by the system's output signals. Such specifications can be used to better understand the system's behavior and improve design of its next iteration. Previous inference methods either assumed certain formula templates, or did a heuristic enumeration of all possible templates. This work proposes a neural network architecture that infers the formula structure via gradient descent, eliminating the need for imposing any specific templates. It combines learning of formula structure and parameters in one optimization. Through systematic comparison, we demonstrate that this method achieves similar or better mis-classification rates (MCR) than enumerative and lattice methods. We also observe that different formulas can achieve similar MCR, empirically demonstrating the under-determinism of the problem of temporal logic inference.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了第一个用于学习信号时态逻辑公式的循环神经网络架构，并首次对公式推理方法进行了系统比较。遗留系统嵌入了许多未明确形式化的专业知识。人们对学习表征此类系统的理想行为的形式规范非常感兴趣，即系统输出信号满足的时序逻辑公式。此类规范可用于更好地理解系统的行为并改进其下一次迭代的设计。以前的推理方法要么假设某些公式模板，要么对所有可能的模板进行启发式枚举。这项工作提出了一种神经网络架构，通过梯度下降推断公式结构，无需强加任何特定模板。它将公式结构和参数的学习结合在一次优化中。通过系统比较，我们证明该方法比枚举法和点阵法具有相似或更好的误分类率（MCR）。我们还观察到不同的公式可以实现相似的 MCR，这从经验上证明了时序逻辑推理问题的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环神经网络的可微分方法，用于学习时序逻辑公式，无需预设模板，并展示了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统系统中的专家知识未被形式化，需要学习正式规范来理解和改进系统设计，而现有方法依赖模板或启发式枚举，存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出一种结合梯度下降的循环神经网络架构，联合优化公式结构和参数，无需预设模板。
AI.result: 在误分类率上表现与枚举和格方法相当或更好，且发现不同公式可达到相似效果，说明问题的欠确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效，无需模板即可推断时序逻辑公式，且问题存在多个解，需进一步研究。

authors_text: Hongyang Du,Jiazhen Liu,Dusit Niyato,Jiawen Kang,Zehui Xiong,Junshan Zhang,Dong In Kim
title: Attention-aware Resource Allocation and QoE Analysis for Metaverse xURLLC Services
title_zh: Metaverse xURLLC 服务的注意力感知资源分配和 QoE 分析
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications (IEEE JSAC)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications (IEEE JSAC)
abstract: Metaverse encapsulates our expectations of the next-generation Internet, while bringing new key performance indicators (KPIs). Although conventional ultra-reliable and low-latency communications (URLLC) can satisfy objective KPIs, it is difficult to provide a personalized immersive experience that is a distinctive feature of the Metaverse. Since the quality of experience (QoE) can be regarded as a comprehensive KPI, the URLLC is evolved towards the next generation URLLC (xURLLC) with a personalized resource allocation scheme to achieve higher QoE. To deploy Metaverse xURLLC services, we study the interaction between the Metaverse service provider (MSP) and the network infrastructure provider (InP), and provide an optimal contract design framework. Specifically, the utility of the MSP, defined as a function of Metaverse users' QoE, is to be maximized, while ensuring the incentives of the InP. To model the QoE mathematically, we propose a novel metric named Meta-Immersion that incorporates both the objective KPIs and subjective feelings of Metaverse users. Furthermore, we develop an attention-aware rendering capacity allocation scheme to improve QoE in xURLLC. Using a user-object-attention level dataset, we validate that the xURLLC can achieve an average of 20.1% QoE improvement compared to the conventional URLLC with a uniform resource allocation scheme. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/HongyangDu/AttentionQoE
summary: Metaverse encapsulates our expectations of the next-generation Internet, while bringing new key performance indicators (KPIs). Although conventional ultra-reliable and low-latency communications (URLLC) can satisfy objective KPIs, it is difficult to provide a personalized immersive experience that is a distinctive feature of the Metaverse. Since the quality of experience (QoE) can be regarded as a comprehensive KPI, the URLLC is evolved towards the next generation URLLC (xURLLC) with a personalized resource allocation scheme to achieve higher QoE. To deploy Metaverse xURLLC services, we study the interaction between the Metaverse service provider (MSP) and the network infrastructure provider (InP), and provide an optimal contract design framework. Specifically, the utility of the MSP, defined as a function of Metaverse users' QoE, is to be maximized, while ensuring the incentives of the InP. To model the QoE mathematically, we propose a novel metric named Meta-Immersion that incorporates both the objective KPIs and subjective feelings of Metaverse users. Furthermore, we develop an attention-aware rendering capacity allocation scheme to improve QoE in xURLLC. Using a user-object-attention level dataset, we validate that the xURLLC can achieve an average of 20.1% QoE improvement compared to the conventional URLLC with a uniform resource allocation scheme. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/HongyangDu/AttentionQoE
abstract_zh: 元界概括了我们对下一代互联网的期望，同时带来了新的关键绩效指标（KPI）。传统的超可靠低时延通信（URLLC）虽然可以满足客观KPI，但很难提供元宇宙的个性化沉浸式体验。由于体验质量（QoE）可以被视为一个综合性的KPI，URLLC通过个性化的资源分配方案向下一代URLLC（xURLLC）演进，以实现更高的QoE。为了部署Metaverse xURLLC服务，我们研究了Metaverse服务提供商（MSP）和网络基础设施提供商（InP）之间的交互，并提供了最优的合约设计框架。具体来说，MSP的效用（定义为Metaverse用户QoE的函数）将被最大化，同时确保InP的激励。为了对 QoE 进行数学建模，我们提出了一种名为 Meta-Immersion 的新颖指标，它结合了客观 KPI 和 Metaverse 用户的主观感受。此外，我们开发了一种注意力感知渲染容量分配方案来提高 xURLLC 中的 QoE。使用用户对象注意力级别数据集，我们验证了与采用统一资源分配方案的传统 URLLC 相比，xURLLC 可以实现平均 20.1% 的 QoE 改进。本文代码可参见https://github.com/hongyangDu/AttentionQoE

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究用于元宇宙xURLLC服务的注意力感知资源分配和QoE分析，以提升用户的沉浸式体验。
AI.motivation: 传统URLLC虽能满足客观KPI，但难以提供元宇宙所需的个性化沉浸式体验。因此，需要一种新的资源分配方案，以提高QoE并满足元宇宙用户的需求。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Meta-Immersion的新指标，结合了客观KPI和主观感受，并开发了一种注意力感知的渲染容量分配方案。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与传统URLLC的均匀资源分配方案相比，xURLLC可实现平均20.1%的QoE提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的xURLLC资源分配方案和Meta-Immersion指标能有效提升元宇宙服务的QoE，为未来的研究和应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Thao Nguyen,Hieu H. Pham,Huy Khiem Le,Anh Tu Nguyen,Ngoc Tien Thanh,Cuong Do
title: Detecting COVID-19 from digitized ECG printouts using 1D convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用一维卷积神经网络从数字化心电图打印输出中检测 COVID-19
comment: Accepted with minor revision by Plos One
comments: Accepted with minor revision by Plos One
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has exposed the vulnerability of healthcare services worldwide, raising the need to develop novel tools to provide rapid and cost-effective screening and diagnosis. Clinical reports indicated that COVID-19 infection may cause cardiac injury, and electrocardiograms (ECG) may serve as a diagnostic biomarker for COVID-19. This study aims to utilize ECG signals to detect COVID-19 automatically. We propose a novel method to extract ECG signals from ECG paper records, which are then fed into a one-dimensional convolution neural network (1D-CNN) to learn and diagnose the disease. To evaluate the quality of digitized signals, R peaks in the paper-based ECG images are labeled. Afterward, RR intervals calculated from each image are compared to RR intervals of the corresponding digitized signal. Experiments on the COVID-19 ECG images dataset demonstrate that the proposed digitization method is able to capture correctly the original signals, with a mean absolute error of 28.11 ms. Our proposed 1D-CNN model, which is trained on the digitized ECG signals, allows identifying individuals with COVID-19 and other subjects accurately, with classification accuracies of 98.42%, 95.63%, and 98.50% for classifying COVID-19 vs. Normal, COVID-19 vs. Abnormal Heartbeats, and COVID-19 vs. other classes, respectively. Furthermore, the proposed method also achieves a high-level of performance for the multi-classification task. Our findings indicate that a deep learning system trained on digitized ECG signals can serve as a potential tool for diagnosing COVID-19.

abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行暴露了全球医疗保健服务的脆弱性，因此需要开发新颖的工具来提供快速且具有成本效益的筛查和诊断。临床报告表明，COVID-19感染可能导致心脏损伤，心电图（ECG）可作为COVID-19的诊断生物标志物。本研究旨在利用心电图信号自动检测 COVID-19。我们提出了一种从心电图纸质记录中提取心电图信号的新方法，然后将其输入一维卷积神经网络（1D-CNN）来学习和诊断疾病。为了评估数字化信号的质量，纸质心电图图像中的 R 峰被标记。然后，将从每个图像计算出的 RR 间隔与相应数字化信号的 RR 间隔进行比较。在 COVID-19 心电图图像数据集上的实验表明，所提出的数字化方法能够正确捕获原始信号，平均绝对误差为 28.11 ms。我们提出的 1D-CNN 模型在数字化心电图信号上进行训练，可以准确识别患有 COVID-19 的个体和其他受试者，对 COVID-19 与正常、COVID-19 与异常心跳以及 COVID-19 与其他类别进行分类的分类准确率分别为 98.42%、95.63% 和 98.50%。此外，所提出的方法还实现了多分类任务的高水平性能。我们的研究结果表明，经过数字化心电图信号训练的深度学习系统可以作为诊断 COVID-19 的潜在工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于1D卷积神经网络（1D-CNN）的自动检测COVID-19方法，通过从纸质ECG记录中提取信号并进行分类。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情暴露了医疗系统的脆弱性，需开发快速且低成本的筛查工具；临床表明ECG可能作为COVID-19的诊断生物标志物。
AI.method: 提出新型纸质ECG图像信号提取方法，通过标注R波并比较RR间期验证信号质量，利用1D-CNN模型对数字化ECG信号进行分类。
AI.result: 信号数字化均方误差为28.11ms，分类准确率分别为98.42%（COVID-19 vs. 正常）、95.63%（COVID-19 vs. 异常心律）和98.50%（多分类任务）。
AI.conclusion: 基于数字化ECG信号的深度学习系统可作为COVID-19诊断的潜在工具，具有较高的临床应用价值。

authors_text: Yuankun Fu,Fengguang Song
title: Designing a 3D Parallel Memory-Aware Lattice Boltzmann Algorithm on Manycore Systems
title_zh: 在众核系统上设计 3D 并行内存感知格子玻尔兹曼算法
comment: ef:Euro-Par 2021: Parallel Processing. 27th International Conference on Parallel and Distributed Computing, Lisbon, Portugal,September 1-3, 2021, Pages 519-535
comments: ef:Euro-Par 2021: Parallel Processing. 27th International Conference on Parallel and Distributed Computing, Lisbon, Portugal,September 1-3, 2021, Pages 519-535
abstract: Lattice Boltzmann method (LBM) is a promising approach to solving Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) problems, however, its nature of memory-boundness limits nearly all LBM algorithms' performance on modern computer architectures. This paper introduces novel sequential and parallel 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms to optimize its memory access performance. The introduced new algorithms combine the features of single-copy distribution, single sweep, swap algorithm, prism traversal, and merging two temporal time steps. We also design a parallel methodology to guarantee thread safety and reduce synchronizations in the parallel LBM algorithm. At last, we evaluate their performances on three high-end manycore systems and demonstrate that our new 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms outperform the state-of-the-art Palabos software (which realizes the Fuse Swap Prism LBM solver) by up to 89%.
summary: Lattice Boltzmann method (LBM) is a promising approach to solving Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) problems, however, its nature of memory-boundness limits nearly all LBM algorithms' performance on modern computer architectures. This paper introduces novel sequential and parallel 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms to optimize its memory access performance. The introduced new algorithms combine the features of single-copy distribution, single sweep, swap algorithm, prism traversal, and merging two temporal time steps. We also design a parallel methodology to guarantee thread safety and reduce synchronizations in the parallel LBM algorithm. At last, we evaluate their performances on three high-end manycore systems and demonstrate that our new 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms outperform the state-of-the-art Palabos software (which realizes the Fuse Swap Prism LBM solver) by up to 89%.
abstract_zh: 格子玻尔兹曼方法 (LBM) 是解决计算流体动力学 (CFD) 问题的一种很有前途的方法，然而，其内存有限性的本质限制了几乎所有 LBM 算法在现代计算机体系结构上的性能。本文介绍了新颖的顺序和并行 3D 内存感知 LBM 算法来优化其内存访问性能。引入的新算法结合了单副本分布、单扫描、交换算法、棱镜遍历以及合并两个时间时间步长的特征。我们还设计了一种并行方法来保证并行 LBM 算法中的线程安全并减少同步。最后，我们评估了它们在三个高端众核系统上的性能，并证明我们新的 3D 内存感知 LBM 算法比最先进的 Palabos 软件（实现了 Fuse Swap Prism LBM 求解器）的性能高出 89%。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种针对多核系统的三维内存感知格子玻尔兹曼算法，以优化其内存访问性能。
AI.motivation: 格子玻尔兹曼方法（LBM）在计算流体动力学（CFD）中具有潜力，但其内存密集型特性限制了其在现代计算机架构上的性能。
AI.method: 提出结合单拷贝分布、单次扫描、交换算法、棱柱遍历及合并两个时间步的新型串行和并行3D内存感知LBM算法，并设计并行方法确保线程安全性和减少同步。
AI.result: 在三种高端多核系统上评估表明，新算法性能优于最先进的Palabos软件高达89%。
AI.conclusion: 新算法通过优化内存访问和并行性，显著提升了LBM在多核系统上的计算效率，为CFD模拟提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Designing a 3D Parallel Memory-Aware Lattice Boltzmann Algorithm on Manycore Systems 在众核系统上设计 3D 并行内存感知格子玻尔兹曼算法 Lattice Boltzmann method (LBM) is a promising approach to solving Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) problems, however, its nature of memory-boundness limits nearly all LBM algorithms' performance on modern computer architectures. This paper introduces novel sequential and parallel 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms to optimize its memory access performance. The introduced new algorithms combine the features of single-copy distribution, single sweep, swap algorithm, prism traversal, and merging two temporal time steps. We also design a parallel methodology to guarantee thread safety and reduce synchronizations in the parallel LBM algorithm. At last, we evaluate their performances on three high-end manycore systems and demonstrate that our new 3D memory-aware LBM algorithms outperform the state-of-the-art Palabos software (which realizes the Fuse Swap Prism LBM solver) by up to 89%. 格子玻尔兹曼方法 (LBM) 是解决计算流体动力学 (CFD) 问题的一种很有前途的方法，然而，其内存有限性的本质限制了几乎所有 LBM 算法在现代计算机体系结构上的性能。本文介绍了新颖的顺序和并行 3D 内存感知 LBM 算法来优化其内存访问性能。引入的新算法结合了单副本分布、单扫描、交换算法、棱镜遍历以及合并两个时间时间步长的特征。我们还设计了一种并行方法来保证并行 LBM 算法中的线程安全并减少同步。最后，我们评估了它们在三个高端众核系统上的性能，并证明我们新的 3D 内存感知 LBM 算法比最先进的 Palabos 软件（实现了 Fuse Swap Prism LBM 求解器）的性能高出 89%。 本文设计了一种针对多核系统的三维内存感知格子玻尔兹曼算法，以优化其内存访问性能。 Yuankun Fu,Fengguang Song cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Thorsten Kurth,Shashank Subramanian,Peter Harrington,Jaideep Pathak,Morteza Mardani,David Hall,Andrea Miele,Karthik Kashinath,Animashree Anandkumar
title: FourCastNet: Accelerating Global High-Resolution Weather Forecasting using Adaptive Fourier Neural Operators
title_zh: FourCastNet：使用自适应傅立叶神经算子加速全球高分辨率天气预报
abstract: Extreme weather amplified by climate change is causing increasingly devastating impacts across the globe. The current use of physics-based numerical weather prediction (NWP) limits accuracy due to high computational cost and strict time-to-solution limits. We report that a data-driven deep learning Earth system emulator, FourCastNet, can predict global weather and generate medium-range forecasts five orders-of-magnitude faster than NWP while approaching state-of-the-art accuracy. FourCast-Net is optimized and scales efficiently on three supercomputing systems: Selene, Perlmutter, and JUWELS Booster up to 3,808 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, attaining 140.8 petaFLOPS in mixed precision (11.9%of peak at that scale). The time-to-solution for training FourCastNet measured on JUWELS Booster on 3,072GPUs is 67.4minutes, resulting in an 80,000times faster time-to-solution relative to state-of-the-art NWP, in inference. FourCastNet produces accurate instantaneous weather predictions for a week in advance, enables enormous ensembles that better capture weather extremes, and supports higher global forecast resolutions.
summary: Extreme weather amplified by climate change is causing increasingly devastating impacts across the globe. The current use of physics-based numerical weather prediction (NWP) limits accuracy due to high computational cost and strict time-to-solution limits. We report that a data-driven deep learning Earth system emulator, FourCastNet, can predict global weather and generate medium-range forecasts five orders-of-magnitude faster than NWP while approaching state-of-the-art accuracy. FourCast-Net is optimized and scales efficiently on three supercomputing systems: Selene, Perlmutter, and JUWELS Booster up to 3,808 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, attaining 140.8 petaFLOPS in mixed precision (11.9%of peak at that scale). The time-to-solution for training FourCastNet measured on JUWELS Booster on 3,072GPUs is 67.4minutes, resulting in an 80,000times faster time-to-solution relative to state-of-the-art NWP, in inference. FourCastNet produces accurate instantaneous weather predictions for a week in advance, enables enormous ensembles that better capture weather extremes, and supports higher global forecast resolutions.
abstract_zh: 气候变化加剧的极端天气正在全球范围内造成越来越严重的破坏性影响。由于高计算成本和严格的解决时间限制，目前基于物理的数值天气预报 (NWP) 的使用限制了准确性。我们报告说，数据驱动的深度学习地球系统模拟器 FourCastNet 可以预测全球天气并生成中期预报，速度比 NWP 快五个数量级，同时接近最先进的精度。 FourCast-Net 在三个超级计算系统上进行了优化和高效扩展：Selene、Perlmutter 和 JUWELS Booster，最多可达 3,808 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU，混合精度达到 140.8 petaFLOPS（该规模峰值的 11.9%）。在 JUWELS Booster 上测量，在 3,072 个 GPU 上训练 FourCastNet 的解决时间为 67.4 分钟，推断得出，相对于最先进的 NWP，解决问题的时间快了 80,000 倍。 FourCastNet 可以提前一周生成准确的瞬时天气预报，使庞大的集合能够更好地捕获极端天气，并支持更高的全球预报分辨率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FourCastNet的深度学习模型，用于加速全球高分辨率天气预报。
AI.motivation: 由于气候变化导致极端天气日益频繁，传统的基于物理的数值天气预测（NWP）方法因计算成本高和时间限制而精度受限，因此需要一种更高效的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 本文开发了一个数据驱动的深度学习地球系统模拟器FourCastNet，利用自适应傅里叶神经算子进行天气预测，并在多个超级计算机上进行了优化和扩展。
AI.result: FourCastNet在三个超级计算机系统上实现了高效的扩展，训练时间仅为67.4分钟，比当前最先进的NWP方法快80,000倍，且能生成准确的中短期天气预测。
AI.conclusion: FourCastNet为全球高分辨率天气预报提供了一种高效且准确的解决方案，能够更好地捕捉天气极端情况并支持更高的预报分辨率。

authors_text: Jaejin Cho,Raghavendra Pappagari,Piotr Żelasko,Laureano Moro-Velazquez,Jesús Villalba,Najim Dehak
title: Non-Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning of Utterance-Level Speech Representations
title_zh: 话语级语音表示的非对比自监督学习
comment: Accepted at Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted at Interspeech 2022
abstract: Considering the abundance of unlabeled speech data and the high labeling costs, unsupervised learning methods can be essential for better system development. One of the most successful methods is contrastive self-supervised methods, which require negative sampling: sampling alternative samples to contrast with the current sample (anchor). However, it is hard to ensure if all the negative samples belong to classes different from the anchor class without labels. This paper applies a non-contrastive self-supervised learning method on an unlabeled speech corpus to learn utterance-level embeddings. We used DIstillation with NO labels (DINO), proposed in computer vision, and adapted it to the speech domain. Unlike the contrastive methods, DINO does not require negative sampling. These embeddings were evaluated on speaker verification and emotion recognition. In speaker verification, the unsupervised DINO embedding with cosine scoring provided 4.38% EER on the VoxCeleb1 test trial. This outperforms the best contrastive self-supervised method by 40% relative in EER. An iterative pseudo-labeling training pipeline, not requiring speaker labels, further improved the EER to 1.89%. In emotion recognition, the DINO embedding performed 60.87, 79.21, and 56.98% in micro-f1 score on IEMOCAP, Crema-D, and MSP-Podcast, respectively. The results imply the generality of the DINO embedding to different speech applications.
summary: Considering the abundance of unlabeled speech data and the high labeling costs, unsupervised learning methods can be essential for better system development. One of the most successful methods is contrastive self-supervised methods, which require negative sampling: sampling alternative samples to contrast with the current sample (anchor). However, it is hard to ensure if all the negative samples belong to classes different from the anchor class without labels. This paper applies a non-contrastive self-supervised learning method on an unlabeled speech corpus to learn utterance-level embeddings. We used DIstillation with NO labels (DINO), proposed in computer vision, and adapted it to the speech domain. Unlike the contrastive methods, DINO does not require negative sampling. These embeddings were evaluated on speaker verification and emotion recognition. In speaker verification, the unsupervised DINO embedding with cosine scoring provided 4.38% EER on the VoxCeleb1 test trial. This outperforms the best contrastive self-supervised method by 40% relative in EER. An iterative pseudo-labeling training pipeline, not requiring speaker labels, further improved the EER to 1.89%. In emotion recognition, the DINO embedding performed 60.87, 79.21, and 56.98% in micro-f1 score on IEMOCAP, Crema-D, and MSP-Podcast, respectively. The results imply the generality of the DINO embedding to different speech applications.
abstract_zh: 考虑到大量未标记的语音数据和高昂的标记成本，无监督学习方法对于更好的系统开发至关重要。最成功的方法之一是对比自监督方法，它需要负采样：对替代样本进行采样以与当前样本（锚点）进行对比。然而，很难确保所有负样本是否属于与没有标签的锚类不同的类。本文在未标记的语音语料库上应用非对比自监督学习方法来学习话语级嵌入。我们使用计算机视觉中提出的无标签蒸馏（DINO），并将其应用于语音领域。与对比方法不同，DINO 不需要负采样。这些嵌入在说话者验证和情感识别方面进行了评估。在说话人验证中，带有余弦评分的无监督 DINO 嵌入在 VoxCeleb1 测试试验中提供了 4.38% 的 EER。这在 EER 方面比最佳对比自监督方法高出 40%。不需要说话人标签的迭代伪标签训练管道将 EER 进一步提高到 1.89%。在情感识别中，DINO 嵌入在 IEMOCAP、Crema-D 和 MSP-Podcast 上的 micro-f1 得分分别为 60.87、79.21 和 56.98%。结果表明 DINO 嵌入到不同语音应用中的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需对比学习的自监督方法，用于学习语音的语句级嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 对比自监督方法依赖负样本采样，但无标签数据难以确保负样本类别差异，而非对比方法可避免此问题。
AI.method: 将计算机视觉领域提出的无标签蒸馏方法DINO迁移至语音领域，通过自监督学习生成语句级嵌入。
AI.result: 在说话人验证任务中，DINO嵌入的EER为4.38%，迭代伪标签后降至1.89%；在情绪识别任务中，IEMOCAP、Crema-D和MSP-Podcast数据集的微F1分数分别为60.87%、79.21%和56.98%。
AI.conclusion: DINO嵌入在语音应用中表现出广泛适用性，且性能优于现有对比自监督方法。

search_text: Non-Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning of Utterance-Level Speech Representations 话语级语音表示的非对比自监督学习 Considering the abundance of unlabeled speech data and the high labeling costs, unsupervised learning methods can be essential for better system development. One of the most successful methods is contrastive self-supervised methods, which require negative sampling: sampling alternative samples to contrast with the current sample (anchor). However, it is hard to ensure if all the negative samples belong to classes different from the anchor class without labels. This paper applies a non-contrastive self-supervised learning method on an unlabeled speech corpus to learn utterance-level embeddings. We used DIstillation with NO labels (DINO), proposed in computer vision, and adapted it to the speech domain. Unlike the contrastive methods, DINO does not require negative sampling. These embeddings were evaluated on speaker verification and emotion recognition. In speaker verification, the unsupervised DINO embedding with cosine scoring provided 4.38% EER on the VoxCeleb1 test trial. This outperforms the best contrastive self-supervised method by 40% relative in EER. An iterative pseudo-labeling training pipeline, not requiring speaker labels, further improved the EER to 1.89%. In emotion recognition, the DINO embedding performed 60.87, 79.21, and 56.98% in micro-f1 score on IEMOCAP, Crema-D, and MSP-Podcast, respectively. The results imply the generality of the DINO embedding to different speech applications. 考虑到大量未标记的语音数据和高昂的标记成本，无监督学习方法对于更好的系统开发至关重要。最成功的方法之一是对比自监督方法，它需要负采样：对替代样本进行采样以与当前样本（锚点）进行对比。然而，很难确保所有负样本是否属于与没有标签的锚类不同的类。本文在未标记的语音语料库上应用非对比自监督学习方法来学习话语级嵌入。我们使用计算机视觉中提出的无标签蒸馏（DINO），并将其应用于语音领域。与对比方法不同，DINO 不需要负采样。这些嵌入在说话者验证和情感识别方面进行了评估。在说话人验证中，带有余弦评分的无监督 DINO 嵌入在 VoxCeleb1 测试试验中提供了 4.38% 的 EER。这在 EER 方面比最佳对比自监督方法高出 40%。不需要说话人标签的迭代伪标签训练管道将 EER 进一步提高到 1.89%。在情感识别中，DINO 嵌入在 IEMOCAP、Crema-D 和 MSP-Podcast 上的 micro-f1 得分分别为 60.87、79.21 和 56.98%。结果表明 DINO 嵌入到不同语音应用中的通用性。 本文提出一种无需对比学习的自监督方法，用于学习语音的语句级嵌入表示。 Jaejin Cho,Raghavendra Pappagari,Piotr Żelasko,Laureano Moro-Velazquez,Jesús Villalba,Najim Dehak eess.AS,cs.LG

authors_text: Kasthuri Jayarajah,Aryya Gangopadhyay,Nicholas Waytowich
title: TagTeam: Towards Wearable-Assisted, Implicit Guidance for Human--Drone Teams
title_zh: TagTeam：迈向可穿戴辅助、人类隐式指导——无人机团队
abstract: The availability of sensor-rich smart wearables and tiny, yet capable, unmanned vehicles such as nano quadcopters, opens up opportunities for a novel class of highly interactive, attention-shared human--machine teams. Reliable, lightweight, yet passive exchange of intent, data and inferences within such human--machine teams make them suitable for scenarios such as search-and-rescue with significantly improved performance in terms of speed, accuracy and semantic awareness. In this paper, we articulate a vision for such human--drone teams and key technical capabilities such teams must encompass. We present TagTeam, an early prototype of such a team and share promising demonstration of a key capability (i.e., motion awareness).
summary: The availability of sensor-rich smart wearables and tiny, yet capable, unmanned vehicles such as nano quadcopters, opens up opportunities for a novel class of highly interactive, attention-shared human--machine teams. Reliable, lightweight, yet passive exchange of intent, data and inferences within such human--machine teams make them suitable for scenarios such as search-and-rescue with significantly improved performance in terms of speed, accuracy and semantic awareness. In this paper, we articulate a vision for such human--drone teams and key technical capabilities such teams must encompass. We present TagTeam, an early prototype of such a team and share promising demonstration of a key capability (i.e., motion awareness).
abstract_zh: 富含传感器的智能可穿戴设备和微型但功能强大的无人驾驶车辆（例如纳米四轴飞行器）的出现，为新型高度互动、注意力共享的人机团队提供了机会。这种人机团队内可靠、轻量级但被动的意图、数据和推理交换使它们适用于搜索和救援等场景，并且在速度、准确性和语义感知方面的性能显着提高。在本文中，我们阐明了此类人类无人机团队的愿景以及此类团队必须具备的关键技术能力。我们展示了 TagTeam，这是此类团队的早期原型，并分享了一项关键功能（即运动感知）的有前途的演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TagTeam系统，旨在通过可穿戴设备实现人类与无人机团队之间的隐式交互与协作。
AI.motivation: 随着智能可穿戴设备和微型无人机的发展，需要开发一种轻量、可靠的隐式意图传递机制，以提升搜救等场景下人机团队的效率与语义感知能力。
AI.method: 设计TagTeam原型系统，整合可穿戴设备与无人机，通过运动感知和隐式数据交换实现人机协作的关键能力验证。
AI.result: 成功演示了TagTeam在运动感知方面的核心能力，验证了可穿戴设备辅助下人机团队隐式交互的可行性。
AI.conclusion: TagTeam为未来人机协作团队提供了技术框架，展示了可穿戴设备在提升无人机团队任务表现中的潜力。

authors_text: Alexander Barvinok
title: Computing the theta function
title_zh: 计算 theta 函数
comment: 29 pages, various improvements
comments: 29 pages, various improvements
abstract: Let $f: {\Bbb R}^n \longrightarrow {\Bbb R}$ be a positive definite quadratic form and let $y \in {\Bbb R}^n$ be a point. We present a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) for computing $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x)}$, provided the eigenvalues of $f$ lie in the interval roughly between $s$ and $e^{s}$ and for computing $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x-y)}$, provided the eigenvalues of $f$ lie in the interval roughly between $e^{-s}$ and $s^{-1}$ for some $s \geq 3$. To compute the first sum, we represent it as the integral of an explicit log-concave function on ${\Bbb R}^n$, and to compute the second sum, we use the reciprocity relation for theta functions. We then apply our results to test the existence of many short integer vectors in a given subspace $L \subset {\Bbb R}^n$, to estimate the distance from a given point to a lattice, and to sample a random lattice point from the discrete Gaussian distribution.
summary: Let $f: {\Bbb R}^n \longrightarrow {\Bbb R}$ be a positive definite quadratic form and let $y \in {\Bbb R}^n$ be a point. We present a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) for computing $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x)}$, provided the eigenvalues of $f$ lie in the interval roughly between $s$ and $e^{s}$ and for computing $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x-y)}$, provided the eigenvalues of $f$ lie in the interval roughly between $e^{-s}$ and $s^{-1}$ for some $s \geq 3$. To compute the first sum, we represent it as the integral of an explicit log-concave function on ${\Bbb R}^n$, and to compute the second sum, we use the reciprocity relation for theta functions. We then apply our results to test the existence of many short integer vectors in a given subspace $L \subset {\Bbb R}^n$, to estimate the distance from a given point to a lattice, and to sample a random lattice point from the discrete Gaussian distribution.
abstract_zh: 令$f: {\Bbb R}^n \longrightarrow {\Bbb R}$ 为正定二次形式，令$y \in {\Bbb R}^n$ 为一个点。我们提出了一个完全多项式随机近似方案（FPRAS），用于计算 $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x)}$，前提是 $f$ 的特征值大致位于 $s$ 和 $e^{s}$ 之间的区间内；用于计算 $\sum_{x \in {\Bbb Z}^n} e^{-f(x-y)}$，前提是特征值对于某些 $s \geq 3$，$f$ 大致位于 $e^{-s}$ 和 $s^{-1}$ 之间的区间。为了计算第一个和，我们将其表示为 ${\Bbb R}^n$ 上显式对数凹函数的积分，为了计算第二个和，我们使用 theta 函数的互易关系。然后，我们应用我们的结果来测试给定子空间 $L \subset {\Bbb R}^n$ 中是否存在许多短整数向量，估计从给定点到晶格的距离，并从离散高斯分布中采样随机晶格点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算theta函数的完全多项式随机近似方案（FPRAS），用于求解与正定二次型相关的离散和。
AI.motivation: 需要高效计算与二次型相关的离散和，以解决格问题中的短向量检测、点到格的距离估计及高斯分布采样等关键问题。
AI.method: 将第一类和表示为凸函数积分，并利用theta函数的互反关系处理第二类和，结合随机化算法设计FPRAS。
AI.result: 实现了两种条件下离散和的高效近似计算，并应用于格中短向量检测、距离估计及高斯采样问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为格计算提供了理论保证和实用工具，推动了相关密码学和计算几何问题的解决。

authors_text: Zitong Yu,Rizhao Cai,Zhi Li,Wenhan Yang,Jingang Shi,Alex C. Kot
title: Benchmarking Joint Face Spoofing and Forgery Detection with Visual and Physiological Cues
title_zh: 利用视觉和生理线索对联合人脸欺骗和伪造检测进行基准测试
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC). Corresponding authors: Zitong Yu and Wenhan Yang
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC). Corresponding authors: Zitong Yu and Wenhan Yang
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) and face forgery detection play vital roles in securing face biometric systems from presentation attacks (PAs) and vicious digital manipulation (e.g., deepfakes). Despite promising performance upon large-scale data and powerful deep models, the generalization problem of existing approaches is still an open issue. Most of recent approaches focus on 1) unimodal visual appearance or physiological (i.e., remote photoplethysmography (rPPG)) cues; and 2) separated feature representation for FAS or face forgery detection. On one side, unimodal appearance and rPPG features are respectively vulnerable to high-fidelity face 3D mask and video replay attacks, inspiring us to design reliable multi-modal fusion mechanisms for generalized face attack detection. On the other side, there are rich common features across FAS and face forgery detection tasks (e.g., periodic rPPG rhythms and vanilla appearance for bonafides), providing solid evidence to design a joint FAS and face forgery detection system in a multi-task learning fashion. In this paper, we establish the first joint face spoofing and forgery detection benchmark using both visual appearance and physiological rPPG cues. To enhance the rPPG periodicity discrimination, we design a two-branch physiological network using both facial spatio-temporal rPPG signal map and its continuous wavelet transformed counterpart as inputs. To mitigate the modality bias and improve the fusion efficacy, we conduct a weighted batch and layer normalization for both appearance and rPPG features before multi-modal fusion. We find that the generalization capacities of both unimodal (appearance or rPPG) and multi-modal (appearance+rPPG) models can be obviously improved via joint training on these two tasks. We hope this new benchmark will facilitate the future research of both FAS and deepfake detection communities.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) and face forgery detection play vital roles in securing face biometric systems from presentation attacks (PAs) and vicious digital manipulation (e.g., deepfakes). Despite promising performance upon large-scale data and powerful deep models, the generalization problem of existing approaches is still an open issue. Most of recent approaches focus on 1) unimodal visual appearance or physiological (i.e., remote photoplethysmography (rPPG)) cues; and 2) separated feature representation for FAS or face forgery detection. On one side, unimodal appearance and rPPG features are respectively vulnerable to high-fidelity face 3D mask and video replay attacks, inspiring us to design reliable multi-modal fusion mechanisms for generalized face attack detection. On the other side, there are rich common features across FAS and face forgery detection tasks (e.g., periodic rPPG rhythms and vanilla appearance for bonafides), providing solid evidence to design a joint FAS and face forgery detection system in a multi-task learning fashion. In this paper, we establish the first joint face spoofing and forgery detection benchmark using both visual appearance and physiological rPPG cues. To enhance the rPPG periodicity discrimination, we design a two-branch physiological network using both facial spatio-temporal rPPG signal map and its continuous wavelet transformed counterpart as inputs. To mitigate the modality bias and improve the fusion efficacy, we conduct a weighted batch and layer normalization for both appearance and rPPG features before multi-modal fusion. We find that the generalization capacities of both unimodal (appearance or rPPG) and multi-modal (appearance+rPPG) models can be obviously improved via joint training on these two tasks. We hope this new benchmark will facilitate the future research of both FAS and deepfake detection communities.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗 (FAS) 和人脸伪造检测在保护人脸生物识别系统免受演示攻击 (PA) 和恶意数字操纵（例如深度伪造）方面发挥着至关重要的作用。尽管在大规模数据和强大的深度模型上表现良好，但现有方法的泛化问题仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。最近的大多数方法侧重于 1）单峰视觉外观或生理（即远程光电体积描记法（rPPG））线索； 2）用于 FAS 或人脸伪造检测的分离特征表示。一方面，单模态外观和 rPPG 特征分别容易受到高保真人脸 3D 掩模和视频重放攻击，这启发我们设计可靠的多模态融合机制来进行广义人脸攻击检测。另一方面，FAS 和人脸伪造检测任务之间存在丰富的共同特征（例如，周期性 rPPG 节律和真实的普通外观），为以多任务学习方式设计联合 FAS 和人脸伪造检测系统提供了坚实的证据。在本文中，我们使用视觉外观和生理 rPPG 线索建立了第一个联合面部欺骗和伪造检测基准。为了增强 rPPG 周期性辨别力，我们使用面部时空 rPPG 信号图及其连续小波变换对应物作为输入，设计了一个双分支生理网络。为了减轻模态偏差并提高融合效率，我们在多模态融合之前对外观和 rPPG 特征进行加权批量和层归一化。我们发现，通过对这两个任务进行联合训练，单模态（外观或 rPPG）和多模态（外观+rPPG）模型的泛化能力都可以得到明显提高。我们希望这个新基准能够促进 FAS 和 Deepfake 检测社区的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个结合视觉和生理信号（如rPPG）的联合人脸防欺骗与伪造检测基准，通过多模态融合提升检测泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因依赖单一模态特征或独立任务建模，难以应对高保真攻击（如3D面具、视频重放）且缺乏跨任务特征共享，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计双分支生理网络处理时空rPPG信号及其小波变换特征，采用加权归一化缓解模态偏差，并通过多任务联合训练实现视觉与生理特征的多模态融合。
AI.result: 联合训练显著提升单模态与多模态模型的泛化性能，验证了跨任务特征共享与多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为未来人脸防欺骗与深度伪造检测研究提供了统一框架，推动多模态与多任务学习方法的发展。

authors_text: Zhongliang Jiang,Yuan Gao,Le Xie,Nassir Navab
title: Towards Autonomous Atlas-based Ultrasound Acquisitions in Presence of Articulated Motion
title_zh: 在存在铰接运动的情况下实现基于图集的自主超声采集
comment: Directly accepted by IEEE RAL after the first round of review. will present at IROS2022. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OlBwmqLGf7w; Codes: https://github.com/jiang96998/AutoLimbUSscan
comments: Directly accepted by IEEE RAL after the first round of review. will present at IROS2022. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OlBwmqLGf7w; Codes: https://github.com/jiang96998/AutoLimbUSscan
abstract: Robotic ultrasound (US) imaging aims at overcoming some of the limitations of free-hand US examinations, e.g. difficulty in guaranteeing intra- and inter-operator repeatability. However, due to anatomical and physiological variations between patients and relative movement of anatomical substructures, it is challenging to robustly generate optimal trajectories to examine the anatomies of interest, in particular, when they comprise articulated joints. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a vision-based approach allowing autonomous robotic US limb scanning. To this end, an atlas MRI template of a human arm with annotated vascular structures is used to generate trajectories and register and project them onto patients' skin surfaces for robotic US acquisition. To effectively segment and accurately reconstruct the targeted 3D vessel, we make use of spatial continuity in consecutive US frames by incorporating channel attention modules into a U-Net-type neural network. The automatic trajectory generation method is evaluated on six volunteers with various articulated joint angles. In all cases, the system can successfully acquire the planned vascular structure on volunteers' limbs. For one volunteer the MRI scan was also available, which allows the evaluation of the average radius of the scanned artery from US images, resulting in a radius estimation ($1.2\pm0.05~mm$) comparable to the MRI ground truth ($1.2\pm0.04~mm$).
summary: Robotic ultrasound (US) imaging aims at overcoming some of the limitations of free-hand US examinations, e.g. difficulty in guaranteeing intra- and inter-operator repeatability. However, due to anatomical and physiological variations between patients and relative movement of anatomical substructures, it is challenging to robustly generate optimal trajectories to examine the anatomies of interest, in particular, when they comprise articulated joints. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a vision-based approach allowing autonomous robotic US limb scanning. To this end, an atlas MRI template of a human arm with annotated vascular structures is used to generate trajectories and register and project them onto patients' skin surfaces for robotic US acquisition. To effectively segment and accurately reconstruct the targeted 3D vessel, we make use of spatial continuity in consecutive US frames by incorporating channel attention modules into a U-Net-type neural network. The automatic trajectory generation method is evaluated on six volunteers with various articulated joint angles. In all cases, the system can successfully acquire the planned vascular structure on volunteers' limbs. For one volunteer the MRI scan was also available, which allows the evaluation of the average radius of the scanned artery from US images, resulting in a radius estimation ($1.2\pm0.05~mm$) comparable to the MRI ground truth ($1.2\pm0.04~mm$).
abstract_zh: 机器人超声（US）成像旨在克服徒手超声检查的一些局限性，例如难以保证运营商内部和运营商之间的可重复性。然而，由于患者之间的解剖和生理变化以及解剖亚结构的相对运动，稳健地生成最佳轨迹来检查感兴趣的解剖结构是具有挑战性的，特别是当它们包含铰接关节时。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于视觉的方法，允许自主机器人美国肢体扫描。为此，使用带有注释血管结构的人类手臂的图集 MRI 模板来生成轨迹，并将其注册并投影到患者的皮肤表面上，以供机器人 US 采集。为了有效地分割和准确地重建目标 3D 血管，我们通过将通道注意模块合并到 U-Net 型神经网络中，利用连续 US 帧中的空间连续性。自动轨迹生成方法在六名具有不同关节角度的志愿者身上进行了评估。在所有情况下，系统都能成功获取志愿者四肢上计划的血管结构。对于一名志愿者来说，还可以使用 MRI 扫描，它可以根据 US 图像评估扫描动脉的平均半径，从而得出与 MRI 地面真实值 ($1.2\pm0.04~mm$) 相当的半径估计值 ($1.2\pm0.05~mm$)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人体手臂MRI图谱模板的自主机器人超声扫描方法，用于在存在关节活动的情况下实现血管结构的自动成像。
AI.motivation: 传统自由手超声检查存在操作者重复性差的问题，而关节活动带来的解剖结构变化使得生成鲁棒扫描轨迹极具挑战性。
AI.method: 利用标注血管结构的人体手臂MRI图谱生成扫描轨迹，并通过皮肤表面配准投影至患者。采用改进的U-Net网络（含通道注意力模块）实现连续超声帧的血管三维重建。
AI.result: 系统在六名志愿者（含不同关节角度）上成功获取目标血管结构，其中一名志愿者的超声动脉半径估计值（1.2±0.05mm）与MRI真值（1.2±0.04mm）高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合图谱引导与深度学习分割，在关节活动场景下实现了自主机器人超声扫描的可行性验证。

The automatic trajectory generation method is evaluated on six volunteers with various articulated joint angles. In all cases, the system can successfully acquire the planned vascular structure on volunteers' limbs. For one volunteer the MRI scan was also available, which allows the evaluation of the average radius of the scanned artery from US images, resulting in a radius estimation ($1.2\pm0.05~mm$) comparable to the MRI ground truth ($1.2\pm0.04~mm$). 机器人超声（US）成像旨在克服徒手超声检查的一些局限性，例如难以保证运营商内部和运营商之间的可重复性。然而，由于患者之间的解剖和生理变化以及解剖亚结构的相对运动，稳健地生成最佳轨迹来检查感兴趣的解剖结构是具有挑战性的，特别是当它们包含铰接关节时。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于视觉的方法，允许自主机器人美国肢体扫描。为此，使用带有注释血管结构的人类手臂的图集 MRI 模板来生成轨迹，并将其注册并投影到患者的皮肤表面上，以供机器人 US 采集。为了有效地分割和准确地重建目标 3D 血管，我们通过将通道注意模块合并到 U-Net 型神经网络中，利用连续 US 帧中的空间连续性。自动轨迹生成方法在六名具有不同关节角度的志愿者身上进行了评估。在所有情况下，系统都能成功获取志愿者四肢上计划的血管结构。对于一名志愿者来说，还可以使用 MRI 扫描，它可以根据 US 图像评估扫描动脉的平均半径，从而得出与 MRI 地面真实值 ($1.2\pm0.04~mm$) 相当的半径估计值 ($1.2\pm0.05~mm$)。 本文提出了一种基于人体手臂MRI图谱模板的自主机器人超声扫描方法，用于在存在关节活动的情况下实现血管结构的自动成像。 Zhongliang Jiang,Yuan Gao,Le Xie,Nassir Navab cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Andreas Abels,Leon Ladewig,Kevin Schewior,Moritz Stinzendörfer
title: Knapsack Secretary Through Boosting
title_zh: 背包秘书通过Boosting
abstract: We revisit the knapsack-secretary problem (Babaioff et al.; APPROX 2007), a generalization of the classic secretary problem in which items have different sizes and multiple items may be selected if their total size does not exceed the capacity $B$ of a knapsack. Previous works show competitive ratios of $1/(10e)$ (Babaioff et al.), $1/8.06$ (Kesselheim et al.; STOC 2014), and $1/6.65$ (Albers, Khan, and Ladewig; APPROX 2019) for the general problem but no definitive answers for the achievable competitive ratio; the best known impossibility remains $1/e$ as inherited from the classic secretary problem. In an effort to make more qualitative progress, we take an orthogonal approach and give definitive answers for special cases. Our main result is on the $1$-$2$-knapsack secretary problem, the special case in which $B=2$ and all items have sizes $1$ or $2$, arguably the simplest meaningful generalization of the secretary problem towards the knapsack secretary problem. Our algorithm is simple: It $\textit{boosts}$ the value of size-$1$ items by a factor $α>1$ and then uses the size-oblivious approach by Albers, Khan, and Ladewig. We show by a nontrivial analysis that this algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $1/e$ if and only if $1.40\lesssimα\leq e/(e-1)\approx 1.58$. Towards understanding the general case, we then consider the case when sizes are $1$ and $B$, and $B$ is large. While it remains unclear if $1/e$ can be achieved in that case, we show that algorithms based only on the relative ranks of the item values can achieve precisely a competitive ratio of $1/(e+1)$. To show the impossibility, we use a non-trivial generalization of the factor-revealing linear program for the secretary problem (Buchbinder, Jain, and Singh; IPCO 2010).

Previous works show competitive ratios of $1/(10e)$ (Babaioff et al.), $1/8.06$ (Kesselheim et al.; STOC 2014), and $1/6.65$ (Albers, Khan, and Ladewig; APPROX 2019) for the general problem but no definitive answers for the achievable competitive ratio; the best known impossibility remains $1/e$ as inherited from the classic secretary problem. In an effort to make more qualitative progress, we take an orthogonal approach and give definitive answers for special cases. Our main result is on the $1$-$2$-knapsack secretary problem, the special case in which $B=2$ and all items have sizes $1$ or $2$, arguably the simplest meaningful generalization of the secretary problem towards the knapsack secretary problem. Our algorithm is simple: It $\textit{boosts}$ the value of size-$1$ items by a factor $α>1$ and then uses the size-oblivious approach by Albers, Khan, and Ladewig. We show by a nontrivial analysis that this algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $1/e$ if and only if $1.40\lesssimα\leq e/(e-1)\approx 1.58$. Towards understanding the general case, we then consider the case when sizes are $1$ and $B$, and $B$ is large. While it remains unclear if $1/e$ can be achieved in that case, we show that algorithms based only on the relative ranks of the item values can achieve precisely a competitive ratio of $1/(e+1)$. To show the impossibility, we use a non-trivial generalization of the factor-revealing linear program for the secretary problem (Buchbinder, Jain, and Singh; IPCO 2010).
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视背包秘书问题（Babaioff 等人；APPROX 2007），这是经典秘书问题的概括，其中物品具有不同的尺寸，并且如果它们的总尺寸不超过背包的容量 $B$，则可以选择多个物品。之前的研究表明，对于一般问题，竞争比为 $1/(10e)$（Babaioff 等人）、$1/8.06$（Kesselheim 等人；STOC 2014）和 $1/6.65$（Albers、Khan 和 Ladewig；APPROX 2019），但对于可实现的竞争比没有明确的答案；最著名的不可能性仍然是从经典秘书问题继承而来的 $1/e$。为了取得更多质的进展，我们采用正交方法并针对特殊情况给出明确的答案。我们的主要结果是 $1$-$2$-背包秘书问题，即 $B=2$ 且所有物品的大小为 $1$ 或 $2$ 的特殊情况，可以说是秘书问题对背包秘书问题的最简单有意义的概括。我们的算法很简单：它 $\textit{boosts}$ 将 size-$1$ 项的值提高 $α>1$，然后使用 Albers、Khan 和 Ladewig 提出的忽略大小的方法。我们通过一项重要的分析表明，当且仅当 $1.40\lesssimα\leq e/(e-1)\approx 1.58$ 时，该算法才能实现 $1/e$ 的竞争比。为了理解一般情况，我们然后考虑大小为 $1$ 和 $B$ 且 $B$ 较大时的情况。虽然尚不清楚在这种情况下是否可以实现 $1/e$，但我们表明仅基于项目值的相对排名的算法可以精确地实现 $1/(e+1)$ 的竞争比。为了证明这种不可能性，我们使用了秘书问题的因子揭示线性规划的非平凡概括（Buchbinder、Jain 和 Singh；IPCO 2010）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了背包秘书问题的特殊情形，提出通过提升小物品价值的方法来优化竞争比。
AI.motivation: 经典秘书问题的竞争比上限为1/e，但背包秘书问题的最优竞争比尚无定论。作者希望通过分析特殊情形推动理论进展。
AI.method: 针对物品大小为1或2的背包问题，采用价值放大因子α提升小物品权重，并结合无大小感知算法；对大容量背包问题则基于物品价值相对排名设计算法。
AI.result: 当α∈[1.40, e/(e-1)]时，1-2背包问题可达到1/e竞争比；大容量背包问题下基于排名的算法竞争比精确为1/(e+1)。
AI.conclusion: 特殊情形分析为背包秘书问题提供了理论边界，且通过线性规划推广证明了1/e上限的不可突破性。

authors_text: Heinrich van Deventer,Anna Bosman
title: ATLAS: Universal Function Approximator for Memory Retention
title_zh: ATLAS：用于记忆保留的通用函数逼近器
comment: :68T07ACM Class:I.5.1
comments: :68T07ACM Class:I.5.1
abstract: Artificial neural networks (ANNs), despite their universal function approximation capability and practical success, are subject to catastrophic forgetting. Catastrophic forgetting refers to the abrupt unlearning of a previous task when a new task is learned. It is an emergent phenomenon that hinders continual learning. Existing universal function approximation theorems for ANNs guarantee function approximation ability, but do not predict catastrophic forgetting. This paper presents a novel universal approximation theorem for multi-variable functions using only single-variable functions and exponential functions. Furthermore, we present ATLAS: a novel ANN architecture based on the new theorem. It is shown that ATLAS is a universal function approximator capable of some memory retention, and continual learning. The memory of ATLAS is imperfect, with some off-target effects during continual learning, but it is well-behaved and predictable. An efficient implementation of ATLAS is provided. Experiments are conducted to evaluate both the function approximation and memory retention capabilities of ATLAS.
summary: Artificial neural networks (ANNs), despite their universal function approximation capability and practical success, are subject to catastrophic forgetting. Catastrophic forgetting refers to the abrupt unlearning of a previous task when a new task is learned. It is an emergent phenomenon that hinders continual learning. Existing universal function approximation theorems for ANNs guarantee function approximation ability, but do not predict catastrophic forgetting. This paper presents a novel universal approximation theorem for multi-variable functions using only single-variable functions and exponential functions. Furthermore, we present ATLAS: a novel ANN architecture based on the new theorem. It is shown that ATLAS is a universal function approximator capable of some memory retention, and continual learning. The memory of ATLAS is imperfect, with some off-target effects during continual learning, but it is well-behaved and predictable. An efficient implementation of ATLAS is provided. Experiments are conducted to evaluate both the function approximation and memory retention capabilities of ATLAS.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络（ANN）尽管具有通用函数逼近能力并且在实践中取得了成功，但仍容易遭受灾难性遗忘。灾难性遗忘是指在学习新任务时突然忘记先前的任务。这是一种阻碍持续学习的新兴现象。现有的人工神经网络通用函数逼近定理保证了函数逼近能力，但不能预测灾难性遗忘。本文仅使用单变量函数和指数函数提出了一种新颖的多变量函数通用逼近定理。此外，我们还提出了 ATLAS：一种基于新定理的新颖的 ANN 架构。结果表明，ATLAS 是一种通用函数逼近器，能够保留一定的记忆力并持续学习。 ATLAS的记忆并不完美，在持续学习过程中会出现一些脱靶效应，但它表现良好且可预测。提供了 ATLAS 的有效实现。进行实验来评估 ATLAS 的函数逼近和记忆保留能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATLAS神经网络架构，解决传统人工神经网络在连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现记忆保留的通用函数逼近。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络虽具通用函数逼近能力，但连续学习时会遭遇灾难性遗忘，导致旧任务性能骤降，亟需理论与方法突破。
AI.method: 提出仅使用单变量函数和指数函数的新型通用逼近定理，构建ATLAS架构并实现高效算法，通过实验验证其逼近与记忆保持能力。
AI.result: ATLAS在连续学习中展现记忆保留特性，虽存在轻微偏靶效应但行为可控，实验验证其函数逼近有效性及内存保留能力。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS为连续学习提供新范式，其理论保证与工程实现证明了记忆保留型通用逼近器的可行性，为未来研究奠定基础。

Furthermore, we present ATLAS: a novel ANN architecture based on the new theorem. It is shown that ATLAS is a universal function approximator capable of some memory retention, and continual learning. The memory of ATLAS is imperfect, with some off-target effects during continual learning, but it is well-behaved and predictable. An efficient implementation of ATLAS is provided. Experiments are conducted to evaluate both the function approximation and memory retention capabilities of ATLAS. 人工神经网络（ANN）尽管具有通用函数逼近能力并且在实践中取得了成功，但仍容易遭受灾难性遗忘。灾难性遗忘是指在学习新任务时突然忘记先前的任务。这是一种阻碍持续学习的新兴现象。现有的人工神经网络通用函数逼近定理保证了函数逼近能力，但不能预测灾难性遗忘。本文仅使用单变量函数和指数函数提出了一种新颖的多变量函数通用逼近定理。此外，我们还提出了 ATLAS：一种基于新定理的新颖的 ANN 架构。结果表明，ATLAS 是一种通用函数逼近器，能够保留一定的记忆力并持续学习。 ATLAS的记忆并不完美，在持续学习过程中会出现一些脱靶效应，但它表现良好且可预测。提供了 ATLAS 的有效实现。进行实验来评估 ATLAS 的函数逼近和记忆保留能力。 本文提出ATLAS神经网络架构，解决传统人工神经网络在连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现记忆保留的通用函数逼近。 Heinrich van Deventer,Anna Bosman cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Zhongliang Jiang,Nehil Danis,Yuan Bi,Mingchuan Zhou,Markus Kroenke,Thomas Wendler,Nassir Navab
title: Precise Repositioning of Robotic Ultrasound: Improving Registration-based Motion Compensation using Ultrasound Confidence Optimization
title_zh: 机器人超声的精确重新定位：使用超声置信度优化改进基于配准的运动补偿
comment: The paper has been accepted by IEEE TIM. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MUtgSXS7EZI
comments: The paper has been accepted by IEEE TIM. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MUtgSXS7EZI
abstract: Robotic ultrasound (US) imaging has been seen as a promising solution to overcome the limitations of free-hand US examinations, i.e., inter-operator variability. However, the fact that robotic US systems cannot react to subject movements during scans limits their clinical acceptance. Regarding human sonographers, they often react to patient movements by repositioning the probe or even restarting the acquisition, in particular for the scans of anatomies with long structures like limb arteries. To realize this characteristic, we proposed a vision-based system to monitor the subject's movement and automatically update the scan trajectory thus seamlessly obtaining a complete 3D image of the target anatomy. The motion monitoring module is developed using the segmented object masks from RGB images. Once the subject is moved, the robot will stop and recompute a suitable trajectory by registering the surface point clouds of the object obtained before and after the movement using the iterative closest point algorithm. Afterward, to ensure optimal contact conditions after repositioning US probe, a confidence-based fine-tuning process is used to avoid potential gaps between the probe and contact surface. Finally, the whole system is validated on a human-like arm phantom with an uneven surface, while the object segmentation network is also validated on volunteers. The results demonstrate that the presented system can react to object movements and reliably provide accurate 3D images.
summary: Robotic ultrasound (US) imaging has been seen as a promising solution to overcome the limitations of free-hand US examinations, i.e., inter-operator variability. However, the fact that robotic US systems cannot react to subject movements during scans limits their clinical acceptance. Regarding human sonographers, they often react to patient movements by repositioning the probe or even restarting the acquisition, in particular for the scans of anatomies with long structures like limb arteries. To realize this characteristic, we proposed a vision-based system to monitor the subject's movement and automatically update the scan trajectory thus seamlessly obtaining a complete 3D image of the target anatomy. The motion monitoring module is developed using the segmented object masks from RGB images. Once the subject is moved, the robot will stop and recompute a suitable trajectory by registering the surface point clouds of the object obtained before and after the movement using the iterative closest point algorithm. Afterward, to ensure optimal contact conditions after repositioning US probe, a confidence-based fine-tuning process is used to avoid potential gaps between the probe and contact surface. Finally, the whole system is validated on a human-like arm phantom with an uneven surface, while the object segmentation network is also validated on volunteers. The results demonstrate that the presented system can react to object movements and reliably provide accurate 3D images.
abstract_zh: 机器人超声 (US) 成像被视为一种有前途的解决方案，可以克服徒手超声检查的局限性，即操作者之间的差异。然而，机器人 US 系统无法在扫描过程中对受试者的运动做出反应，这一事实限制了它们的临床接受度。对于人类超声检查人员，他们经常通过重新定位探头甚至重新启动采集来对患者的运动做出反应，特别是对于具有四肢动脉等长结构的解剖结构的扫描。为了实现这一特性，我们提出了一种基于视觉的系统来监控受试者的运动并自动更新扫描轨迹，从而无缝地获得目标解剖结构的完整 3D 图像。运动监控模块是使用 RGB 图像中的分段对象掩模开发的。一旦物体移动，机器人就会停止并通过使用迭代最近点算法注册移动前后获得的物体表面点云来重新计算合适的轨迹。之后，为了确保重新定位 US 探针后的最佳接触条件，使用基于置信度的微调过程来避免探针和接触表面之间的潜在间隙。最后，整个系统在表面不平坦的类人手臂模型上进行了验证，同时对象分割网络也在志愿者身上进行了验证。结果表明，所提出的系统可以对物体运动做出反应并可靠地提供准确的 3D 图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的系统，用于监测被检者运动并自动调整机器人超声探头轨迹，以实现精准的3D成像。
AI.motivation: 机器人超声系统无法实时响应被检者移动，导致图像不完整，而人工操作员可通过重新定位探头补偿运动，但机器人缺乏此能力，限制了其临床应用。
AI.method: 利用RGB图像分割的物体掩膜监测运动，通过ICP算法注册移动前后点云重新规划轨迹，并采用置信度优化的细调过程确保探头与接触面贴合。
AI.result: 系统在仿生手臂和志愿者实验中验证了有效性，能可靠应对物体移动并生成高精度3D图像。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过自动重新定位补偿运动，提升了机器人超声的临床实用性，为长结构成像提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Guy Rotman,Roi Reichart
title: Multi-task Active Learning for Pre-trained Transformer-based Models
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的预训练模型的多任务主动学习
comment: Accepted for publication in Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL), 2022. Pre-MIT Press publication version
comments: Accepted for publication in Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL), 2022. Pre-MIT Press publication version
abstract: Multi-task learning, in which several tasks are jointly learned by a single model, allows NLP models to share information from multiple annotations and may facilitate better predictions when the tasks are inter-related. This technique, however, requires annotating the same text with multiple annotation schemes which may be costly and laborious. Active learning (AL) has been demonstrated to optimize annotation processes by iteratively selecting unlabeled examples whose annotation is most valuable for the NLP model. Yet, multi-task active learning (MT-AL) has not been applied to state-of-the-art pre-trained Transformer-based NLP models. This paper aims to close this gap. We explore various multi-task selection criteria in three realistic multi-task scenarios, reflecting different relations between the participating tasks, and demonstrate the effectiveness of multi-task compared to single-task selection. Our results suggest that MT-AL can be effectively used in order to minimize annotation efforts for multi-task NLP models.
summary: Multi-task learning, in which several tasks are jointly learned by a single model, allows NLP models to share information from multiple annotations and may facilitate better predictions when the tasks are inter-related. This technique, however, requires annotating the same text with multiple annotation schemes which may be costly and laborious. Active learning (AL) has been demonstrated to optimize annotation processes by iteratively selecting unlabeled examples whose annotation is most valuable for the NLP model. Yet, multi-task active learning (MT-AL) has not been applied to state-of-the-art pre-trained Transformer-based NLP models. This paper aims to close this gap. We explore various multi-task selection criteria in three realistic multi-task scenarios, reflecting different relations between the participating tasks, and demonstrate the effectiveness of multi-task compared to single-task selection. Our results suggest that MT-AL can be effectively used in order to minimize annotation efforts for multi-task NLP models.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习（其中多个任务由单个模型联合学习）允许 NLP 模型共享来自多个注释的信息，并且当任务相互关联时可以促进更好的预测。然而，这种技术需要使用多种注释方案来注释相同的文本，这可能是昂贵且费力的。主动学习 (AL) 已被证明可以通过迭代选择未标记的示例来优化注释过程，这些示例的注释对 NLP 模型最有价值。然而，多任务主动学习（MT-AL）尚未应用于最先进的基于 Transformer 的预训练 NLP 模型。本文旨在缩小这一差距。我们在三个现实的多任务场景中探索了各种多任务选择标准，反映了参与任务之间的不同关系，并证明了多任务相对于单任务选择的有效性。我们的结果表明，可以有效地使用 MT-AL 来最大限度地减少多任务 NLP 模型的注释工作。

AI.tldr: 提出多任务主动学习方法，用于预训练Transformer模型，以减少多任务NLP模型的标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习需多个标注方案成本高昂，而主动学习可优化标注流程，但尚未应用于预训练Transformer模型。
AI.method: 探索多任务选择标准，设计三种真实场景验证任务间关系，对比多任务与单任务选择效果。
AI.result: 实验表明MT-AL能有效降低多任务模型的标注需求，优于单任务主动学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MT-AL可高效减少多任务NLP模型的标注工作量，填补了预训练模型在该领域的研究空白。
