authors_text: Sipeng Zheng,Qi Zhang,Bei Liu,Qin Jin,Jianlong Fu
title: Exploring Anchor-based Detection for Ego4D Natural Language Query
title_zh: 探索 Ego4D 自然语言查询的基于锚点的检测
comment: CVPR 2022 Ego4D Workshop NLQ Challenge
comments: CVPR 2022 Ego4D Workshop NLQ Challenge
abstract: In this paper we provide the technique report of Ego4D natural language query challenge in CVPR 2022. Natural language query task is challenging due to the requirement of comprehensive understanding of video contents. Most previous works address this task based on third-person view datasets while few research interest has been placed in the ego-centric view by far. Great progress has been made though, we notice that previous works can not adapt well to ego-centric view datasets e.g., Ego4D mainly because of two reasons: 1) most queries in Ego4D have a excessively small temporal duration (e.g., less than 5 seconds); 2) queries in Ego4D are faced with much more complex video understanding of long-term temporal orders. Considering these, we propose our solution of this challenge to solve the above issues.
summary: In this paper we provide the technique report of Ego4D natural language query challenge in CVPR 2022. Natural language query task is challenging due to the requirement of comprehensive understanding of video contents. Most previous works address this task based on third-person view datasets while few research interest has been placed in the ego-centric view by far. Great progress has been made though, we notice that previous works can not adapt well to ego-centric view datasets e.g., Ego4D mainly because of two reasons: 1) most queries in Ego4D have a excessively small temporal duration (e.g., less than 5 seconds); 2) queries in Ego4D are faced with much more complex video understanding of long-term temporal orders. Considering these, we propose our solution of this challenge to solve the above issues.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提供了 CVPR 2022 中 Ego4D 自然语言查询挑战赛的技术报告。由于需要全面理解视频内容，自然语言查询任务具有挑战性。以前的大多数工作都是基于第三人称视图数据集来解决这一任务，而到目前为止，很少有研究兴趣放在以自我为中心的视图上。虽然已经取得了很大的进步，但我们注意到以前的工作不能很好地适应以自我为中心的视图数据集，例如 Ego4D，主要是因为两个原因：1）Ego4D 中的大多数查询的持续时间过短（例如，小于 5 秒）； 2) Ego4D 中的查询面临着对长期时间顺序的更复杂的视频理解。考虑到这些，我们提出了这一挑战的解决方案来解决上述问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于锚点检测的方法，解决Ego4D数据集中自然语言查询任务的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以适应Ego4D数据集，因其查询时间短且涉及复杂的长期时间顺序理解。
AI.method: 设计针对第一人称视角视频的锚点检测框架，优化时间对齐与长期语义建模。
AI.result: 有效解决了Ego4D查询任务中的时间短与长期顺序理解难题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为第一人称视角视频的自然语言查询提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Exploring Anchor-based Detection for Ego4D Natural Language Query 探索 Ego4D 自然语言查询的基于锚点的检测 In this paper we provide the technique report of Ego4D natural language query challenge in CVPR 2022. Natural language query task is challenging due to the requirement of comprehensive understanding of video contents. Most previous works address this task based on third-person view datasets while few research interest has been placed in the ego-centric view by far. Great progress has been made though, we notice that previous works can not adapt well to ego-centric view datasets e.g., Ego4D mainly because of two reasons: 1) most queries in Ego4D have a excessively small temporal duration (e.g., less than 5 seconds); 2) queries in Ego4D are faced with much more complex video understanding of long-term temporal orders. Considering these, we propose our solution of this challenge to solve the above issues. 在本文中，我们提供了 CVPR 2022 中 Ego4D 自然语言查询挑战赛的技术报告。由于需要全面理解视频内容，自然语言查询任务具有挑战性。以前的大多数工作都是基于第三人称视图数据集来解决这一任务，而到目前为止，很少有研究兴趣放在以自我为中心的视图上。虽然已经取得了很大的进步，但我们注意到以前的工作不能很好地适应以自我为中心的视图数据集，例如 Ego4D，主要是因为两个原因：1）Ego4D 中的大多数查询的持续时间过短（例如，小于 5 秒）； 2) Ego4D 中的查询面临着对长期时间顺序的更复杂的视频理解。考虑到这些，我们提出了这一挑战的解决方案来解决上述问题。 本文提出基于锚点检测的方法，解决Ego4D数据集中自然语言查询任务的挑战。 Sipeng Zheng,Qi Zhang,Bei Liu,Qin Jin,Jianlong Fu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Roberta Mota,Nivan Ferreira,Julio Daniel Silva,Marius Horga,Marcos Lage,Luis Ceferino,Usman Alim,Ehud Sharlin,Fabio Miranda
title: A Comparison of Spatiotemporal Visualizations for 3D Urban Analytics
title_zh: 3D 城市分析的时空可视化比较
comment: Accepted at IEEE VIS 2022. Video: https://youtu.be/3TBx-njP_sU
comments: Accepted at IEEE VIS 2022. Video: https://youtu.be/3TBx-njP_sU
abstract: Recent technological innovations have led to an increase in the availability of 3D urban data, such as shadow, noise, solar potential, and earthquake simulations. These spatiotemporal datasets create opportunities for new visualizations to engage experts from different domains to study the dynamic behavior of urban spaces in this under explored dimension. However, designing 3D spatiotemporal urban visualizations is challenging, as it requires visual strategies to support analysis of time-varying data referent to the city geometry. Although different visual strategies have been used in 3D urban visual analytics, the question of how effective these visual designs are at supporting spatiotemporal analysis on building surfaces remains open. To investigate this, in this paper we first contribute a series of analytical tasks elicited after interviews with practitioners from three urban domains. We also contribute a quantitative user study comparing the effectiveness of four representative visual designs used to visualize 3D spatiotemporal urban data: spatial juxtaposition, temporal juxtaposition, linked view, and embedded view. Participants performed a series of tasks that required them to identify extreme values on building surfaces over time. Tasks varied in granularity for both space and time dimensions. Our results demonstrate that participants were more accurate using plot-based visualizations (linked view, embedded view) but faster using color-coded visualizations (spatial juxtaposition, temporal juxtaposition). Our results also show that, with increasing task complexity, plot-based visualizations perform better in preserving efficiency (time, accuracy) compared to color-coded visualizations. Based on our findings, we present a set of takeaways with design recommendations for 3D spatiotemporal urban visualizations for researchers and practitioners.

Although different visual strategies have been used in 3D urban visual analytics, the question of how effective these visual designs are at supporting spatiotemporal analysis on building surfaces remains open. To investigate this, in this paper we first contribute a series of analytical tasks elicited after interviews with practitioners from three urban domains. We also contribute a quantitative user study comparing the effectiveness of four representative visual designs used to visualize 3D spatiotemporal urban data: spatial juxtaposition, temporal juxtaposition, linked view, and embedded view. Participants performed a series of tasks that required them to identify extreme values on building surfaces over time. Tasks varied in granularity for both space and time dimensions. Our results demonstrate that participants were more accurate using plot-based visualizations (linked view, embedded view) but faster using color-coded visualizations (spatial juxtaposition, temporal juxtaposition). Our results also show that, with increasing task complexity, plot-based visualizations perform better in preserving efficiency (time, accuracy) compared to color-coded visualizations. Based on our findings, we present a set of takeaways with design recommendations for 3D spatiotemporal urban visualizations for researchers and practitioners.
abstract_zh: 最近的技术创新提高了 3D 城市数据的可用性，例如阴影、噪声、太阳能潜力和地震模拟。这些时空数据集为新的可视化创造了机会，使来自不同领域的专家能够研究这个尚未探索的维度中城市空间的动态行为。然而，设计 3D 时空城市可视化具有挑战性，因为它需要视觉策略来支持对城市几何形状的时变数据的分析。尽管 3D 城市视觉分析中使用了不同的视觉策略，但这些视觉设计在支持建筑表面时空分析方面的效果如何仍然存在疑问。为了调查这一点，在本文中，我们首先在采访了来自三个城市领域的从业者后得出了一系列分析任务。我们还贡献了一项定量用户研究，比较了用于可视化 3D 时空城市数据的四种代表性视觉设计的有效性：空间并置、时间并置、链接视图和嵌入视图。参与者执行了一系列任务，要求他们随着时间的推移识别建筑表面的极值。任务的空间和时间维度的粒度各不相同。我们的结果表明，参与者使用基于图的可视化（链接视图、嵌入视图）更准确，但使用颜色编码可视化（空间并置、时间并置）更快。我们的结果还表明，随着任务复杂性的增加，与颜色编码可视化相比，基于图的可视化在保持效率（时间、准确性）方面表现更好。根据我们的研究结果，我们为研究人员和从业者提供了一系列关于 3D 时空城市可视化的设计建议。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了四种3D城市时空数据可视化方法在支持建筑表面动态分析任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着3D城市数据的增多，设计有效的时空可视化方法以支持跨领域专家分析城市动态行为成为挑战，但现有设计效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过访谈确定分析任务，设计用户实验比较空间并置、时间并置、联动视图和嵌入视图四种方法，评估参与者在不同空间时间粒度任务中的准确性与速度。
AI.result: 基于图表的视图（联动/嵌入）准确性更高，基于颜色编码的视图（空间/时间并置）速度更快；任务复杂度增加时，图表视图效率优势更显著。
AI.conclusion: 建议复杂任务优先采用图表式可视化，简单任务可用颜色编码视图，并需平衡时空维度的粒度设计以提升分析效率。

authors_text: George Dimas,Eirini Cholopoulou,Dimitris K. Iakovidis
title: E Pluribus Unum Interpretable Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: E Pluribus Unum 可解释的卷积神经网络
comment: Journal paper under review
comments: Journal paper under review
abstract: The adoption of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models in high-stake domains is hindered by their inability to meet society's demand for transparency in decision-making. So far, a growing number of methodologies have emerged for developing CNN models that are interpretable by design. However, such models are not capable of providing interpretations in accordance with human perception, while maintaining competent performance. In this paper, we tackle these challenges with a novel, general framework for instantiating inherently interpretable CNN models, named E Pluribus Unum Interpretable CNN (EPU-CNN). An EPU-CNN model consists of CNN sub-networks, each of which receives a different representation of an input image expressing a perceptual feature, such as color or texture. The output of an EPU-CNN model consists of the classification prediction and its interpretation, in terms of relative contributions of perceptual features in different regions of the input image. EPU-CNN models have been extensively evaluated on various publicly available datasets, as well as a contributed benchmark dataset. Medical datasets are used to demonstrate the applicability of EPU-CNN for risk-sensitive decisions in medicine. The experimental results indicate that EPU-CNN models can achieve a comparable or better classification performance than other CNN architectures while providing humanly perceivable interpretations.
summary: The adoption of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models in high-stake domains is hindered by their inability to meet society's demand for transparency in decision-making. So far, a growing number of methodologies have emerged for developing CNN models that are interpretable by design. However, such models are not capable of providing interpretations in accordance with human perception, while maintaining competent performance. In this paper, we tackle these challenges with a novel, general framework for instantiating inherently interpretable CNN models, named E Pluribus Unum Interpretable CNN (EPU-CNN). An EPU-CNN model consists of CNN sub-networks, each of which receives a different representation of an input image expressing a perceptual feature, such as color or texture. The output of an EPU-CNN model consists of the classification prediction and its interpretation, in terms of relative contributions of perceptual features in different regions of the input image. EPU-CNN models have been extensively evaluated on various publicly available datasets, as well as a contributed benchmark dataset. Medical datasets are used to demonstrate the applicability of EPU-CNN for risk-sensitive decisions in medicine. The experimental results indicate that EPU-CNN models can achieve a comparable or better classification performance than other CNN architectures while providing humanly perceivable interpretations.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）模型在高风险领域的采用受到阻碍，因为它们无法满足社会对决策透明度的需求。到目前为止，已经出现了越来越多的方法来开发可通过设计解释的 CNN 模型。然而，此类模型无法在保持良好性能的同时提供符合人类感知的解释。在本文中，我们通过一种新颖的通用框架来应对这些挑战，该框架用于实例化本质上可解释的 CNN 模型，名为 E Pluribus Unum Interpretable CNN (EPU-CNN)。 EPU-CNN 模型由 CNN 子网络组成，每个子网络接​​收输入图像的不同表示，表达感知特征，例如颜色或纹理。 EPU-CNN 模型的输出由分类预测及其解释（根据输入图像不同区域感知特征的相对贡献）组成。 EPU-CNN 模型已在各种公开可用的数据集以及贡献的基准数据集上进行了广泛的评估。医学数据集用于证明 EPU-CNN 在医学风险敏感决策中的适用性。实验结果表明，EPU-CNN 模型可以实现与其他 CNN 架构相当或更好的分类性能，同时提供人类可感知的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EPU-CNN的新型可解释卷积神经网络框架，通过分解图像感知特征并生成人类可感知的解释来提升模型透明度。
AI.motivation: 当前CNN模型在高风险领域应用受限，因其决策过程缺乏透明性，且现有可解释方法难以兼顾性能与人类感知一致性。
AI.method: 构建由多个子网络组成的EPU-CNN框架，每个子网络处理输入图像的不同感知特征（如颜色、纹理），最终输出分类结果及各区域感知特征的贡献度解释。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集及医疗基准数据集上验证，EPU-CNN在保持或超越其他CNN架构分类性能的同时，提供了符合人类感知的可视化解释。
AI.conclusion: EPU-CNN通过结构化设计实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，为高风险领域（如医疗）的可信AI应用提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: EPU-CNN通过结构化设计实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，为高风险领域（如医疗）的可信AI应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: E Pluribus Unum Interpretable Convolutional Neural Networks E Pluribus Unum 可解释的卷积神经网络 The adoption of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models in high-stake domains is hindered by their inability to meet society's demand for transparency in decision-making. So far, a growing number of methodologies have emerged for developing CNN models that are interpretable by design. However, such models are not capable of providing interpretations in accordance with human perception, while maintaining competent performance. In this paper, we tackle these challenges with a novel, general framework for instantiating inherently interpretable CNN models, named E Pluribus Unum Interpretable CNN (EPU-CNN). An EPU-CNN model consists of CNN sub-networks, each of which receives a different representation of an input image expressing a perceptual feature, such as color or texture. The output of an EPU-CNN model consists of the classification prediction and its interpretation, in terms of relative contributions of perceptual features in different regions of the input image. EPU-CNN models have been extensively evaluated on various publicly available datasets, as well as a contributed benchmark dataset. Medical datasets are used to demonstrate the applicability of EPU-CNN for risk-sensitive decisions in medicine. The experimental results indicate that EPU-CNN models can achieve a comparable or better classification performance than other CNN architectures while providing humanly perceivable interpretations. 卷积神经网络（CNN）模型在高风险领域的采用受到阻碍，因为它们无法满足社会对决策透明度的需求。到目前为止，已经出现了越来越多的方法来开发可通过设计解释的 CNN 模型。然而，此类模型无法在保持良好性能的同时提供符合人类感知的解释。在本文中，我们通过一种新颖的通用框架来应对这些挑战，该框架用于实例化本质上可解释的 CNN 模型，名为 E Pluribus Unum Interpretable CNN (EPU-CNN)。 EPU-CNN 模型由 CNN 子网络组成，每个子网络接​​收输入图像的不同表示，表达感知特征，例如颜色或纹理。 EPU-CNN 模型的输出由分类预测及其解释（根据输入图像不同区域感知特征的相对贡献）组成。 EPU-CNN 模型已在各种公开可用的数据集以及贡献的基准数据集上进行了广泛的评估。医学数据集用于证明 EPU-CNN 在医学风险敏感决策中的适用性。实验结果表明，EPU-CNN 模型可以实现与其他 CNN 架构相当或更好的分类性能，同时提供人类可感知的解释。 本文提出一种名为EPU-CNN的新型可解释卷积神经网络框架，通过分解图像感知特征并生成人类可感知的解释来提升模型透明度。 George Dimas,Eirini Cholopoulou,Dimitris K. Iakovidis cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Andrea Burattin,Hugo A. López,Lasse Starklit
title: A Monitoring and Discovery Approach for Declarative Processes Based on Streams
title_zh: 一种基于流的声明式流程监控与发现方法
abstract: Process discovery is a family of techniques that helps to comprehend processes from their data footprints. Yet, as processes change over time so should their corresponding models, and failure to do so will lead to models that under- or over-approximate behavior. We present a discovery algorithm that extracts declarative processes as Dynamic Condition Response (DCR) graphs from event streams. Streams are monitored to generate temporal representations of the process, later processed to generate declarative models. We validated the technique via quantitative and qualitative evaluations. For the quantitative evaluation, we adopted an extended Jaccard similarity measure to account for process change in a declarative setting. For the qualitative evaluation, we showcase how changes identified by the technique correspond to real changes in an existing process. The technique and the data used for testing are available online.
summary: Process discovery is a family of techniques that helps to comprehend processes from their data footprints. Yet, as processes change over time so should their corresponding models, and failure to do so will lead to models that under- or over-approximate behavior. We present a discovery algorithm that extracts declarative processes as Dynamic Condition Response (DCR) graphs from event streams. Streams are monitored to generate temporal representations of the process, later processed to generate declarative models. We validated the technique via quantitative and qualitative evaluations. For the quantitative evaluation, we adopted an extended Jaccard similarity measure to account for process change in a declarative setting. For the qualitative evaluation, we showcase how changes identified by the technique correspond to real changes in an existing process. The technique and the data used for testing are available online.
abstract_zh: 流程发现是一系列技术，有助于从数据足迹中理解流程。然而，随着流程随着时间的推移而变化，其相应的模型也应该发生变化，如果不这样做，将导致模型低估或过度近似行为。我们提出了一种发现算法，该算法从事件流中提取声明性过程作为动态条件响应（DCR）图。监视流以生成过程的时间表示，随后进行处理以生成声明性模型。我们通过定量和定性评估验证了该技术。对于定量评估，我们采用了扩展的 Jaccard 相似性度量来解释声明性环境中的流程变化。对于定性评估，我们展示了该技术识别的变化如何与现有流程中的实际变化相对应。用于测试的技术和数据可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件流的声明式流程监控与发现方法，通过生成动态条件响应（DCR）图来适应流程变化，并通过定量与定性评估验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有流程模型难以适应随时间变化的流程，导致模型出现欠拟合或过拟合问题，需开发动态调整的声明式流程发现技术以提升准确性。
AI.method: 通过监控事件流生成时间表示，转化为声明式DCR图模型；采用扩展Jaccard相似度进行定量评估，结合实际案例验证定性结果。
AI.result: 定量评估显示方法能有效捕捉流程变化，定性评估证明其与实际业务变更一致，技术细节与测试数据已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态流程建模提供了有效解决方案，未来可扩展至其他声明式流程分析场景。

authors_text: Chris Junchi Li,Dongruo Zhou,Quanquan Gu,Michael I. Jordan
title: Learning Two-Player Mixture Markov Games: Kernel Function Approximation and Correlated Equilibrium
title_zh: 学习两人混合马尔可夫博弈：核函数逼近和相关均衡
comment: 42 pages
comments: 42 pages
abstract: We consider learning Nash equilibria in two-player zero-sum Markov Games with nonlinear function approximation, where the action-value function is approximated by a function in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS). The key challenge is how to do exploration in the high-dimensional function space. We propose a novel online learning algorithm to find a Nash equilibrium by minimizing the duality gap. At the core of our algorithms are upper and lower confidence bounds that are derived based on the principle of optimism in the face of uncertainty. We prove that our algorithm is able to attain an $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret with polynomial computational complexity, under very mild assumptions on the reward function and the underlying dynamic of the Markov Games. We also propose several extensions of our algorithm, including an algorithm with Bernstein-type bonus that can achieve a tighter regret bound, and another algorithm for model misspecification that can be applied to neural function approximation.
summary: We consider learning Nash equilibria in two-player zero-sum Markov Games with nonlinear function approximation, where the action-value function is approximated by a function in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS). The key challenge is how to do exploration in the high-dimensional function space. We propose a novel online learning algorithm to find a Nash equilibrium by minimizing the duality gap. At the core of our algorithms are upper and lower confidence bounds that are derived based on the principle of optimism in the face of uncertainty. We prove that our algorithm is able to attain an $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret with polynomial computational complexity, under very mild assumptions on the reward function and the underlying dynamic of the Markov Games. We also propose several extensions of our algorithm, including an algorithm with Bernstein-type bonus that can achieve a tighter regret bound, and another algorithm for model misspecification that can be applied to neural function approximation.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在两人零和马尔可夫游戏中使用非线性函数逼近来学习纳什均衡，其中动作值函数由再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的函数来逼近。关键的挑战是如何在高维函数空间中进行探索。我们提出了一种新颖的在线学习算法，通过最小化对偶间隙来找到纳什均衡。我们算法的核心是基于面对不确定性的乐观原则得出的置信上限和下限。我们证明，在奖励函数和马尔可夫游戏的潜在动态的非常温和的假设下，我们的算法能够以多项式计算复杂度获得 $O(\sqrt{T})$ 遗憾。我们还提出了算法的几种扩展，包括一种具有 Bernstein 型奖励的算法，可以实现更严格的后悔界限，以及另一种可应用于神经函数逼近的模型错误指定算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在双人零和马尔可夫博弈中使用核函数逼近学习纳什均衡的问题，提出了一种基于置信区间上界的在线学习算法。
AI.motivation: 在高维函数空间中进行探索是挑战，传统方法难以平衡探索与利用，需设计高效算法以保证收敛性与计算复杂度。
AI.method: 提出基于乐观原则的上下置信界算法，通过最小化对偶间隙寻找纳什均衡，并扩展了伯努利型奖励和模型误设的处理方法。
AI.result: 算法在温和假设下达到O(√T)遗憾，多项式计算复杂度，且扩展算法能实现更紧的遗憾界和神经网络逼近适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了高维马尔可夫博弈的均衡学习问题，为非线性函数逼近提供了理论保证与实用扩展。

authors_text: Serena S. Serbinowska,Taylor T. Johnson
title: BehaVerify: Verifying Temporal Logic Specifications for Behavior Trees
title_zh: BehaVerify：验证行为树的时间逻辑规范
abstract: Behavior Trees, which originated in video games as a method for controlling NPCs but have since gained traction within the robotics community, are a framework for describing the execution of a task. BehaVerify is a tool that creates a nuXmv model from a py_tree. For composite nodes, which are standardized, this process is automatic and requires no additional user input. A wide variety of leaf nodes are automatically supported and require no additional user input, but customized leaf nodes will require additional user input to be correctly modeled. BehaVerify can provide a template to make this easier. BehaVerify is able to create a nuXmv model with over 100 nodes and nuXmv was able to verify various non-trivial LTL properties on this model, both directly and via counterexample. The model in question features parallel nodes, selector, and sequence nodes. A comparison with models based on BTCompiler indicates that the models created by BehaVerify perform better.
summary: Behavior Trees, which originated in video games as a method for controlling NPCs but have since gained traction within the robotics community, are a framework for describing the execution of a task. BehaVerify is a tool that creates a nuXmv model from a py_tree. For composite nodes, which are standardized, this process is automatic and requires no additional user input. A wide variety of leaf nodes are automatically supported and require no additional user input, but customized leaf nodes will require additional user input to be correctly modeled. BehaVerify can provide a template to make this easier. BehaVerify is able to create a nuXmv model with over 100 nodes and nuXmv was able to verify various non-trivial LTL properties on this model, both directly and via counterexample. The model in question features parallel nodes, selector, and sequence nodes. A comparison with models based on BTCompiler indicates that the models created by BehaVerify perform better.
abstract_zh: 行为树起源于视频游戏，是一种控制 NPC 的方法，但后来在机器人社区中获得了广泛的关注，它是描述任务执行的框架。 BehaVerify 是一个从 py_tree 创建 nuXmv 模型的工具。对于标准化的复合节点，此过程是自动的，不需要额外的用户输入。自动支持各种叶节点，不需要额外的用户输入，但定制的叶节点将需要额外的用户输入才能正确建模。 BehaVerify 可以提供一个模板来简化此操作。 BehaVerify 能够创建一个具有 100 多个节点的 nuXmv 模型，并且 nuXmv 能够直接或通过反例验证该模型上的各种重要 LTL 属性。所讨论的模型具有并行节点、选择器和序列节点。与基于 BTCompiler 的模型进行比较表明，BehaVerify 创建的模型性能更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BehaVerify工具，用于验证行为树的时序逻辑规范。
AI.motivation: 行为树在机器人领域广泛应用，但缺乏有效的时序逻辑验证工具，需开发自动化验证方法。
AI.method: 通过将行为树转换为nuXmv模型，自动处理复合节点和通用叶子节点，提供自定义节点模板。
AI.result: 成功验证含100+节点的模型，支持LTL属性检查，并优于基于BTCompiler的模型。
AI.conclusion: BehaVerify为行为树提供了高效可靠的时序逻辑验证方案，适用于复杂机器人任务。

authors_text: Xiang Li,Changhe Song,Xianhao Wei,Zhiyong Wu,Jia Jia,Helen Meng
title: Towards Cross-speaker Reading Style Transfer on Audiobook Dataset
title_zh: 有声读物数据集上的跨说话者阅读风格迁移
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022, demo page at https://thuhcsi.github.io/is2022-cross-speaker-reading-style-transfer
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022, demo page at https://thuhcsi.github.io/is2022-cross-speaker-reading-style-transfer
abstract: Cross-speaker style transfer aims to extract the speech style of the given reference speech, which can be reproduced in the timbre of arbitrary target speakers. Existing methods on this topic have explored utilizing utterance-level style labels to perform style transfer via either global or local scale style representations. However, audiobook datasets are typically characterized by both the local prosody and global genre, and are rarely accompanied by utterance-level style labels. Thus, properly transferring the reading style across different speakers remains a challenging task. This paper aims to introduce a chunk-wise multi-scale cross-speaker style model to capture both the global genre and the local prosody in audiobook speeches. Moreover, by disentangling speaker timbre and style with the proposed switchable adversarial classifiers, the extracted reading style is made adaptable to the timbre of different speakers. Experiment results confirm that the model manages to transfer a given reading style to new target speakers. With the support of local prosody and global genre type predictor, the potentiality of the proposed method in multi-speaker audiobook generation is further revealed.
summary: Cross-speaker style transfer aims to extract the speech style of the given reference speech, which can be reproduced in the timbre of arbitrary target speakers. Existing methods on this topic have explored utilizing utterance-level style labels to perform style transfer via either global or local scale style representations. However, audiobook datasets are typically characterized by both the local prosody and global genre, and are rarely accompanied by utterance-level style labels. Thus, properly transferring the reading style across different speakers remains a challenging task. This paper aims to introduce a chunk-wise multi-scale cross-speaker style model to capture both the global genre and the local prosody in audiobook speeches. Moreover, by disentangling speaker timbre and style with the proposed switchable adversarial classifiers, the extracted reading style is made adaptable to the timbre of different speakers. Experiment results confirm that the model manages to transfer a given reading style to new target speakers. With the support of local prosody and global genre type predictor, the potentiality of the proposed method in multi-speaker audiobook generation is further revealed.
abstract_zh: 跨说话人风格迁移旨在提取给定参考语音的语音风格，该风格可以以任意目标说话人的音色再现。该主题的现有方法已经探索利用话语级样式标签通过全局或局部规模样式表示来执行样式迁移。然而，有声读物数据集通常以本地韵律和全球体裁为特征，很少伴有话语级风格标签。因此，在不同的说话者之间正确地转移阅读风格仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。本文旨在引入一种分块的多尺度跨说话者风格模型，以捕获有声读物演讲中的全球流派和本地韵律。此外，通过使用所提出的可切换对抗性分类器来解开说话者的音色和风格，提取的阅读风格可以适应不同说话者的音色。实验结果证实，该模型成功地将给定的阅读风格转移给新的目标说话者。在局部韵律和全局体裁类型预测器的支持下，进一步揭示了所提出的方法在多说话者有声读物生成方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨说话人阅读风格迁移方法，针对有声书数据集中缺乏句子级风格标签且包含局部韵律与全局类型的特点进行建模。
AI.motivation: 现有跨说话人风格迁移方法依赖句子级风格标签，但有声书数据集通常缺少此类标签，且包含复杂的局部韵律与全局类型信息，导致风格迁移难度较高。
AI.method: 设计分块多尺度模型捕捉全局类型与局部韵律，结合可切换对抗分类器分离说话人音色与风格表示，实现跨说话人风格适配。
AI.result: 实验验证模型可将源说话人的阅读风格迁移至目标说话人，结合局部韵律与全局类型预测器，展示了多说话人有声书生成的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多尺度模型有效解决了有声书跨说话人风格迁移问题，为多说话人有声书生成提供了新方法。

authors_text: Adam Dahlgren Lindström,Savitha Sam Abraham
title: CLEVR-Math: A Dataset for Compositional Language, Visual and Mathematical Reasoning
title_zh: CLEVR-Math：用于组合语言、视觉和数学推理的数据集
comment: NeSy 2022, 16th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning, Cumberland Lodge, Windsor, UK
comments: NeSy 2022, 16th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning, Cumberland Lodge, Windsor, UK
abstract: We introduce CLEVR-Math, a multi-modal math word problems dataset consisting of simple math word problems involving addition/subtraction, represented partly by a textual description and partly by an image illustrating the scenario. The text describes actions performed on the scene that is depicted in the image. Since the question posed may not be about the scene in the image, but about the state of the scene before or after the actions are applied, the solver envision or imagine the state changes due to these actions. Solving these word problems requires a combination of language, visual and mathematical reasoning. We apply state-of-the-art neural and neuro-symbolic models for visual question answering on CLEVR-Math and empirically evaluate their performances. Our results show how neither method generalise to chains of operations. We discuss the limitations of the two in addressing the task of multi-modal word problem solving.
summary: We introduce CLEVR-Math, a multi-modal math word problems dataset consisting of simple math word problems involving addition/subtraction, represented partly by a textual description and partly by an image illustrating the scenario. The text describes actions performed on the scene that is depicted in the image. Since the question posed may not be about the scene in the image, but about the state of the scene before or after the actions are applied, the solver envision or imagine the state changes due to these actions. Solving these word problems requires a combination of language, visual and mathematical reasoning. We apply state-of-the-art neural and neuro-symbolic models for visual question answering on CLEVR-Math and empirically evaluate their performances. Our results show how neither method generalise to chains of operations. We discuss the limitations of the two in addressing the task of multi-modal word problem solving.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 CLEVR-Math，这是一个多模式数学应用题数据集，由涉及加法/减法的简单数学应用题组成，部分由文本描述表示，部分由说明场景的图像表示。文本描述了在图像中描绘的场景上执行的操作。由于提出的问题可能不是关于图像中的场景，而是关于应用动作之前或之后场景的状态，因此求解器设想或想象由于这些动作而导致的状态变化。解决这些文字问题需要结合语言、视觉和数学推理。我们将最先进的神经和神经符号模型应用于 CLEVR-Math 上的视觉问答，并根据经验评估其性能。我们的结果表明，这两种方法都无法推广到操作链。我们讨论了两者在解决多模态单词问题解决任务中的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLEVR-Math数据集，用于评估组合语言、视觉和数学推理能力，包含需要多模态理解的数学应用题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理需要跨模态（文本、图像）和多步骤数学推理的复杂问题时存在局限性，缺乏专门的数据集进行验证。
AI.method: 构建包含文本描述和场景图像的数学题数据集，应用神经网络和神经符号模型进行多模态问答任务的性能评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有方法难以处理多步骤操作链，无法有效结合语言、视觉和数学信息进行推理。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在多模态数学问题求解中存在显著局限，CLEVR-Math为未来研究提供了基准数据集。

motivation: 现有模型在处理需要跨模态（文本、图像）和多步骤数学推理的复杂问题时存在局限性，缺乏专门的数据集进行验证。
method: 构建包含文本描述和场景图像的数学题数据集，应用神经网络和神经符号模型进行多模态问答任务的性能评估。
result: 实验表明，现有方法难以处理多步骤操作链，无法有效结合语言、视觉和数学信息进行推理。
conclusion: 当前模型在多模态数学问题求解中存在显著局限，CLEVR-Math为未来研究提供了基准数据集。
search_text: CLEVR-Math: A Dataset for Compositional Language, Visual and Mathematical Reasoning CLEVR-Math：用于组合语言、视觉和数学推理的数据集 We introduce CLEVR-Math, a multi-modal math word problems dataset consisting of simple math word problems involving addition/subtraction, represented partly by a textual description and partly by an image illustrating the scenario. The text describes actions performed on the scene that is depicted in the image. Since the question posed may not be about the scene in the image, but about the state of the scene before or after the actions are applied, the solver envision or imagine the state changes due to these actions. Solving these word problems requires a combination of language, visual and mathematical reasoning. We apply state-of-the-art neural and neuro-symbolic models for visual question answering on CLEVR-Math and empirically evaluate their performances. Our results show how neither method generalise to chains of operations. We discuss the limitations of the two in addressing the task of multi-modal word problem solving. 我们引入了 CLEVR-Math，这是一个多模式数学应用题数据集，由涉及加法/减法的简单数学应用题组成，部分由文本描述表示，部分由说明场景的图像表示。文本描述了在图像中描绘的场景上执行的操作。由于提出的问题可能不是关于图像中的场景，而是关于应用动作之前或之后场景的状态，因此求解器设想或想象由于这些动作而导致的状态变化。解决这些文字问题需要结合语言、视觉和数学推理。我们将最先进的神经和神经符号模型应用于 CLEVR-Math 上的视觉问答，并根据经验评估其性能。我们的结果表明，这两种方法都无法推广到操作链。我们讨论了两者在解决多模态单词问题解决任务中的局限性。 本文提出CLEVR-Math数据集，用于评估组合语言、视觉和数学推理能力，包含需要多模态理解的数学应用题。 Adam Dahlgren Lindström,Savitha Sam Abraham cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Emanuele Santellani,Christian Sormann,Mattia Rossi,Andreas Kuhn,Friedrich Fraundorfer
title: MD-Net: Multi-Detector for Local Feature Extraction
title_zh: MD-Net：用于局部特征提取的多检测器
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2022
comments: Accepted at ICPR 2022
abstract: Establishing a sparse set of keypoint correspon dences between images is a fundamental task in many computer vision pipelines. Often, this translates into a computationally expensive nearest neighbor search, where every keypoint descriptor at one image must be compared with all the descriptors at the others. In order to lower the computational cost of the matching phase, we propose a deep feature extraction network capable of detecting a predefined number of complementary sets of keypoints at each image. Since only the descriptors within the same set need to be compared across the different images, the matching phase computational complexity decreases with the number of sets. We train our network to predict the keypoints and compute the corresponding descriptors jointly. In particular, in order to learn complementary sets of keypoints, we introduce a novel unsupervised loss which penalizes intersections among the different sets. Additionally, we propose a novel descriptor-based weighting scheme meant to penalize the detection of keypoints with non-discriminative descriptors. With extensive experiments we show that our feature extraction network, trained only on synthetically warped images and in a fully unsupervised manner, achieves competitive results on 3D reconstruction and re-localization tasks at a reduced matching complexity.
summary: Establishing a sparse set of keypoint correspon dences between images is a fundamental task in many computer vision pipelines. Often, this translates into a computationally expensive nearest neighbor search, where every keypoint descriptor at one image must be compared with all the descriptors at the others. In order to lower the computational cost of the matching phase, we propose a deep feature extraction network capable of detecting a predefined number of complementary sets of keypoints at each image. Since only the descriptors within the same set need to be compared across the different images, the matching phase computational complexity decreases with the number of sets. We train our network to predict the keypoints and compute the corresponding descriptors jointly. In particular, in order to learn complementary sets of keypoints, we introduce a novel unsupervised loss which penalizes intersections among the different sets. Additionally, we propose a novel descriptor-based weighting scheme meant to penalize the detection of keypoints with non-discriminative descriptors. With extensive experiments we show that our feature extraction network, trained only on synthetically warped images and in a fully unsupervised manner, achieves competitive results on 3D reconstruction and re-localization tasks at a reduced matching complexity.
abstract_zh: 在图像之间建立一组稀疏的关键点对应关系是许多计算机视觉流程中的一项基本任务。通常，这会转化为计算成本高昂的最近邻搜索，其中一个图像上的每个关键点描述符必须与其他图像上的所有描述符进行比较。为了降低匹配阶段的计算成本，我们提出了一种深度特征提取网络，能够检测每个图像上预定义数量的互补关键点集。由于仅需要在不同图像之间比较同一集合内的描述符，因此匹配阶段计算复杂度随着集合数量的增加而降低。我们训练网络来预测关键点并联合计算相应的描述符。特别是，为了学习关键点的互补集，我们引入了一种新颖的无监督损失，它会惩罚不同集之间的交叉点。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的基于描述符的加权方案，旨在惩罚具有非歧视性描述符的关键点检测。通过大量的实验，我们表明，我们的特征提取网络仅在合成扭曲图像上以完全无监督的方式进行训练，在 3D 重建和重新定位任务中以降低的匹配复杂度实现了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MD-Net的多检测器网络，用于在图像中提取互补的关键点集，以降低图像匹配阶段的计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统图像匹配方法需比较所有关键点描述符，导致计算成本高昂。通过将关键点分组为互补集合，仅比较同一组内描述符可显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 设计深度网络联合预测关键点及描述符，引入无监督损失函数惩罚不同集合的重叠，并提出基于描述符的权重方案抑制非判别性关键点检测。
AI.result: 仅使用合成变形图像进行完全无监督训练，网络在三维重建和重定位任务中达到竞争性结果，且匹配复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: MD-Net通过多集合关键点提取有效平衡了匹配精度与计算效率，在保持性能的同时降低了实际应用中的计算负担。

authors_text: Maximilian Speicher
title: Listen to Users, but Only 85% of the Time: How Black Swans Can Save Innovation in a Data-Driven World
title_zh: 倾听用户的声音，但只倾听 85% 的时间：黑天鹅如何在数据驱动的世界中拯救创新
comment: 17 pages; Originally published in The UX Collective (ISSN: 2766-5267) on August 9, 2022, under https://uxdesign.cc/listen-to-users-but-only-85-of-the-time-da96c2f9dde6
comments: 17 pages; Originally published in The UX Collective (ISSN: 2766-5267) on August 9, 2022, under https://uxdesign.cc/listen-to-users-but-only-85-of-the-time-da96c2f9dde6
abstract: Data-driven design is a proven success factor that more and more digital businesses embrace. At the same time, academics and practitioners alike warn that when virtually everything must be tested and proven with numbers, that can stifle creativity and innovation. This article argues that Taleb's Black Swan theory can solve this dilemma. It shows that online experimentation, and therefore digital design, are fat-tailed phenomena and, hence, prone to Black Swans. It introduces the notion of Black Swan designs -- "crazy" designs that make sense only in hindsight -- along with four specific criteria. To ensure incremental improvements and their potential for innovation, businesses should apply Taleb's barbell strategy: Invest 85-90% of resources into data-driven approaches and 10-15% into potential Black Swans.
summary: Data-driven design is a proven success factor that more and more digital businesses embrace. At the same time, academics and practitioners alike warn that when virtually everything must be tested and proven with numbers, that can stifle creativity and innovation. This article argues that Taleb's Black Swan theory can solve this dilemma. It shows that online experimentation, and therefore digital design, are fat-tailed phenomena and, hence, prone to Black Swans. It introduces the notion of Black Swan designs -- "crazy" designs that make sense only in hindsight -- along with four specific criteria. To ensure incremental improvements and their potential for innovation, businesses should apply Taleb's barbell strategy: Invest 85-90% of resources into data-driven approaches and 10-15% into potential Black Swans.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动设计是越来越多的数字企业所采用的经过验证的成功因素。与此同时，学者和从业者都警告说，当几乎所有事情都必须用数字进行测试和证明时，这可能会扼杀创造力和创新。本文认为塔勒布的黑天鹅理论可以解决这一困境。它表明，在线实验以及数字设计都是厚尾现象，因此容易出现黑天鹅。它介绍了黑天鹅设计的概念——只有事后才有意义的“疯狂”设计——以及四个具体标准。为了确保渐进式改进和创新潜力，企业应该应用塔勒布的杠铃策略：将 85-90% 的资源投入到数据驱动的方法中，将 10-15% 的资源投入到潜在的黑天鹅事件中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合数据驱动方法与黑天鹅理论，解决数据驱动设计中创新受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动设计虽有效，但过度依赖数据可能抑制创造力和创新，需寻找平衡点。
AI.method: 引入塔勒布的黑天鹅理论，提出黑天鹅设计概念及四条标准，并建议采用杠铃策略分配资源。
AI.result: 提出85-90%资源投入数据驱动设计，10-15%用于黑天鹅设计的策略，兼顾渐进改进与创新潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过平衡数据驱动与黑天鹅投资，企业可在确保稳定改进的同时保留突破性创新的可能性。

authors_text: Otmane Sakhi,David Rohde,Alexandre Gilotte
title: Fast Offline Policy Optimization for Large Scale Recommendation
title_zh: 快速离线策略优化，大规模推荐
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted at AAAI 2023
abstract: Personalised interactive systems such as recommender systems require selecting relevant items from massive catalogs dependent on context. Reward-driven offline optimisation of these systems can be achieved by a relaxation of the discrete problem resulting in policy learning or REINFORCE style learning algorithms. Unfortunately, this relaxation step requires computing a sum over the entire catalogue making the complexity of the evaluation of the gradient (and hence each stochastic gradient descent iterations) linear in the catalogue size. This calculation is untenable in many real world examples such as large catalogue recommender systems, severely limiting the usefulness of this method in practice. In this paper, we derive an approximation of these policy learning algorithms that scale logarithmically with the catalogue size. Our contribution is based upon combining three novel ideas: a new Monte Carlo estimate of the gradient of a policy, the self normalised importance sampling estimator and the use of fast maximum inner product search at training time. Extensive experiments show that our algorithm is an order of magnitude faster than naive approaches yet produces equally good policies.
summary: Personalised interactive systems such as recommender systems require selecting relevant items from massive catalogs dependent on context. Reward-driven offline optimisation of these systems can be achieved by a relaxation of the discrete problem resulting in policy learning or REINFORCE style learning algorithms. Unfortunately, this relaxation step requires computing a sum over the entire catalogue making the complexity of the evaluation of the gradient (and hence each stochastic gradient descent iterations) linear in the catalogue size. This calculation is untenable in many real world examples such as large catalogue recommender systems, severely limiting the usefulness of this method in practice. In this paper, we derive an approximation of these policy learning algorithms that scale logarithmically with the catalogue size. Our contribution is based upon combining three novel ideas: a new Monte Carlo estimate of the gradient of a policy, the self normalised importance sampling estimator and the use of fast maximum inner product search at training time. Extensive experiments show that our algorithm is an order of magnitude faster than naive approaches yet produces equally good policies.
abstract_zh: 个性化交互系统（例如推荐系统）需要根据上下文从大量目录中选择相关项目。这些系统的奖励驱动的离线优化可以通过放松离散问题来实现，从而产生策略学习或增强型学习算法。不幸的是，这个松弛步骤需要计算整个目录的总和，使得梯度评估的复杂性（以及每个随机梯度下降迭代）与目录大小成线性关系。这种计算在许多现实世界的例子中是站不住脚的，例如大型目录推荐系统，严重限制了这种方法在实践中的有用性。在本文中，我们推导了这些策略学习算法的近似值，该算法随目录大小呈对数缩放。我们的贡献基于结合三个新颖的想法：策略梯度的新蒙特卡罗估计、自归一化重要性采样估计器以及在训练时使用快速最大内积搜索。大量的实验表明，我们的算法比朴素方法快一个数量级，但产生同样好的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于大规模推荐系统的快速离线策略优化方法，解决传统算法在计算复杂度上的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统离线策略优化方法在处理大规模推荐系统时，因需计算全目录梯度导致复杂度线性增长，实际应用中难以承受。
AI.method: 结合三种创新技术：新型蒙特卡洛梯度估计、自归一化重要性采样和训练时快速最大内积搜索，将算法复杂度降至对数级别。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法速度较传统方法提升十倍，且生成的推荐策略效果相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法优化显著提升了大规模推荐系统离线策略训练的效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Fast Offline Policy Optimization for Large Scale Recommendation 快速离线策略优化，大规模推荐 Personalised interactive systems such as recommender systems require selecting relevant items from massive catalogs dependent on context. Reward-driven offline optimisation of these systems can be achieved by a relaxation of the discrete problem resulting in policy learning or REINFORCE style learning algorithms. Unfortunately, this relaxation step requires computing a sum over the entire catalogue making the complexity of the evaluation of the gradient (and hence each stochastic gradient descent iterations) linear in the catalogue size. This calculation is untenable in many real world examples such as large catalogue recommender systems, severely limiting the usefulness of this method in practice. In this paper, we derive an approximation of these policy learning algorithms that scale logarithmically with the catalogue size. Our contribution is based upon combining three novel ideas: a new Monte Carlo estimate of the gradient of a policy, the self normalised importance sampling estimator and the use of fast maximum inner product search at training time. Extensive experiments show that our algorithm is an order of magnitude faster than naive approaches yet produces equally good policies. 个性化交互系统（例如推荐系统）需要根据上下文从大量目录中选择相关项目。这些系统的奖励驱动的离线优化可以通过放松离散问题来实现，从而产生策略学习或增强型学习算法。不幸的是，这个松弛步骤需要计算整个目录的总和，使得梯度评估的复杂性（以及每个随机梯度下降迭代）与目录大小成线性关系。这种计算在许多现实世界的例子中是站不住脚的，例如大型目录推荐系统，严重限制了这种方法在实践中的有用性。在本文中，我们推导了这些策略学习算法的近似值，该算法随目录大小呈对数缩放。我们的贡献基于结合三个新颖的想法：策略梯度的新蒙特卡罗估计、自归一化重要性采样估计器以及在训练时使用快速最大内积搜索。大量的实验表明，我们的算法比朴素方法快一个数量级，但产生同样好的策略。 本文提出一种适用于大规模推荐系统的快速离线策略优化方法，解决传统算法在计算复杂度上的瓶颈问题。 Otmane Sakhi,David Rohde,Alexandre Gilotte cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Jiarui Fang,Geng Zhang,Jiatong Han,Shenggui Li,Zhengda Bian,Yongbin Li,Jin Liu,Yang You
title: A Frequency-aware Software Cache for Large Recommendation System Embeddings
title_zh: 用于大型推荐系统嵌入的频率感知软件缓存
abstract: Deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) have been widely applied in Internet companies. The embedding tables of DLRMs are too large to fit on GPU memory entirely. We propose a GPU-based software cache approaches to dynamically manage the embedding table in the CPU and GPU memory space by leveraging the id's frequency statistics of the target dataset. Our proposed software cache is efficient in training entire DLRMs on GPU in a synchronized update manner. It is also scaled to multiple GPUs in combination with the widely used hybrid parallel training approaches. Evaluating our prototype system shows that we can keep only 1.5% of the embedding parameters in the GPU to obtain a decent end-to-end training speed.
summary: Deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) have been widely applied in Internet companies. The embedding tables of DLRMs are too large to fit on GPU memory entirely. We propose a GPU-based software cache approaches to dynamically manage the embedding table in the CPU and GPU memory space by leveraging the id's frequency statistics of the target dataset. Our proposed software cache is efficient in training entire DLRMs on GPU in a synchronized update manner. It is also scaled to multiple GPUs in combination with the widely used hybrid parallel training approaches. Evaluating our prototype system shows that we can keep only 1.5% of the embedding parameters in the GPU to obtain a decent end-to-end training speed.
abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）已在互联网企业中得到广泛应用。 DLRM 的嵌入表太大，无法完全容纳在 GPU 内存中。我们提出了一种基于 GPU 的软件缓存方法，通过利用目标数据集的 id 频率统计来动态管理 CPU 和 GPU 内存空间中的嵌入表。我们提出的软件缓存能够以同步更新的方式有效地在 GPU 上训练整个 DLRM。它还可以结合广泛使用的混合并行训练方法扩展到多个 GPU。评估我们的原型系统表明，我们只需在 GPU 中保留 1.5% 的嵌入参数即可获得不错的端到端训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率感知的软件缓存方法，解决深度学习推荐模型中嵌入表过大无法完全加载到GPU内存的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习推荐模型的嵌入表规模庞大，超出GPU内存容量限制，导致训练效率低下，需动态管理内存资源以提升训练速度。
AI.method: 设计GPU-based软件缓存机制，通过分析ID频率统计动态调度CPU与GPU内存中的嵌入参数，并结合混合并行训练扩展至多GPU场景。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需将1.5%的嵌入参数存储在GPU中即可实现与全量加载相当的端到端训练速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了大规模嵌入表的内存瓶颈，在保证训练效率的同时降低了硬件资源需求，适用于多GPU分布式训练场景。

authors_text: Wangmeng Xiang,Chao Li,Yuxuan Zhou,Biao Wang,Lei Zhang
title: Generative Action Description Prompts for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 基于骨架的动作识别的生成动作描述提示
comment: Accepted by ICCV23
comments: Accepted by ICCV23
abstract: Skeleton-based action recognition has recently received considerable attention. Current approaches to skeleton-based action recognition are typically formulated as one-hot classification tasks and do not fully exploit the semantic relations between actions. For example, "make victory sign" and "thumb up" are two actions of hand gestures, whose major difference lies in the movement of hands. This information is agnostic from the categorical one-hot encoding of action classes but could be unveiled from the action description. Therefore, utilizing action description in training could potentially benefit representation learning. In this work, we propose a Generative Action-description Prompts (GAP) approach for skeleton-based action recognition. More specifically, we employ a pre-trained large-scale language model as the knowledge engine to automatically generate text descriptions for body parts movements of actions, and propose a multi-modal training scheme by utilizing the text encoder to generate feature vectors for different body parts and supervise the skeleton encoder for action representation learning. Experiments show that our proposed GAP method achieves noticeable improvements over various baseline models without extra computation cost at inference. GAP achieves new state-of-the-arts on popular skeleton-based action recognition benchmarks, including NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and NW-UCLA. The source code is available at https://github.com/MartinXM/GAP.
summary: Skeleton-based action recognition has recently received considerable attention. Current approaches to skeleton-based action recognition are typically formulated as one-hot classification tasks and do not fully exploit the semantic relations between actions. For example, "make victory sign" and "thumb up" are two actions of hand gestures, whose major difference lies in the movement of hands. This information is agnostic from the categorical one-hot encoding of action classes but could be unveiled from the action description. Therefore, utilizing action description in training could potentially benefit representation learning. In this work, we propose a Generative Action-description Prompts (GAP) approach for skeleton-based action recognition. More specifically, we employ a pre-trained large-scale language model as the knowledge engine to automatically generate text descriptions for body parts movements of actions, and propose a multi-modal training scheme by utilizing the text encoder to generate feature vectors for different body parts and supervise the skeleton encoder for action representation learning. Experiments show that our proposed GAP method achieves noticeable improvements over various baseline models without extra computation cost at inference. GAP achieves new state-of-the-arts on popular skeleton-based action recognition benchmarks, including NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and NW-UCLA. The source code is available at https://github.com/MartinXM/GAP.
abstract_zh: 基于骨架的动作识别最近受到了相当多的关注。当前基于骨架的动作识别方法通常被制定为单热分类任务，并且没有充分利用动作之间的语义关系。例如，“做出胜利手势”和“竖起大拇指”是两种手势动作，其主要区别在于手的动作。该信息与动作类的分类单热编码无关，但可以从动作描述中揭示。因此，在训练中利用动作描述可能有利于表征学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于基于骨架的动作识别的生成动作描述提示（GAP）方法。更具体地说，我们采用预训练的大规模语言模型作为知识引擎，自动生成动作的身体部位运动的文本描述，并提出一种多模态训练方案，利用文本编码器生成不同身体部位的特征向量，并监督骨架编码器进行动作表示学习。实验表明，我们提出的 GAP 方法比各种基线模型取得了显着的改进，而无需额外的推理计算成本。 GAP 在流行的基于骨架的动作识别基准上实现了新的最先进水平，包括 NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 NW-UCLA。源代码可在 https://github.com/MartinXM/GAP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成动作描述提示（GAP）的骨骼动作识别方法，通过结合语言模型生成的动作描述信息提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有骨骼动作识别方法将动作视为独立类别进行分类，忽略了动作间的语义关联（如手部动作的细微差异），导致表征学习不足。
AI.method: 利用预训练大语言模型生成动作的文本描述，通过多模态训练方案将文本编码器生成的肢体部位特征向量用于监督骨骼编码器的动作表征学习。
AI.result: GAP方法在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和NW-UCLA等基准数据集上达到新SOTA，且推理时无额外计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 融合动作描述语义信息可有效增强骨骼动作识别模型对动作间细微差异的感知能力，为动作表征学习提供新思路。

method: 利用预训练大语言模型生成动作的文本描述，通过多模态训练方案将文本编码器生成的肢体部位特征向量用于监督骨骼编码器的动作表征学习。
result: GAP方法在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和NW-UCLA等基准数据集上达到新SOTA，且推理时无额外计算成本。
conclusion: 融合动作描述语义信息可有效增强骨骼动作识别模型对动作间细微差异的感知能力，为动作表征学习提供新思路。
search_text: Generative Action Description Prompts for Skeleton-based Action Recognition 基于骨架的动作识别的生成动作描述提示 Skeleton-based action recognition has recently received considerable attention. Current approaches to skeleton-based action recognition are typically formulated as one-hot classification tasks and do not fully exploit the semantic relations between actions. For example, "make victory sign" and "thumb up" are two actions of hand gestures, whose major difference lies in the movement of hands. This information is agnostic from the categorical one-hot encoding of action classes but could be unveiled from the action description. Therefore, utilizing action description in training could potentially benefit representation learning. In this work, we propose a Generative Action-description Prompts (GAP) approach for skeleton-based action recognition. More specifically, we employ a pre-trained large-scale language model as the knowledge engine to automatically generate text descriptions for body parts movements of actions, and propose a multi-modal training scheme by utilizing the text encoder to generate feature vectors for different body parts and supervise the skeleton encoder for action representation learning. Experiments show that our proposed GAP method achieves noticeable improvements over various baseline models without extra computation cost at inference. GAP achieves new state-of-the-arts on popular skeleton-based action recognition benchmarks, including NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and NW-UCLA. The source code is available at https://github.com/MartinXM/GAP. 基于骨架的动作识别最近受到了相当多的关注。当前基于骨架的动作识别方法通常被制定为单热分类任务，并且没有充分利用动作之间的语义关系。例如，“做出胜利手势”和“竖起大拇指”是两种手势动作，其主要区别在于手的动作。该信息与动作类的分类单热编码无关，但可以从动作描述中揭示。因此，在训练中利用动作描述可能有利于表征学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于基于骨架的动作识别的生成动作描述提示（GAP）方法。更具体地说，我们采用预训练的大规模语言模型作为知识引擎，自动生成动作的身体部位运动的文本描述，并提出一种多模态训练方案，利用文本编码器生成不同身体部位的特征向量，并监督骨架编码器进行动作表示学习。实验表明，我们提出的 GAP 方法比各种基线模型取得了显着的改进，而无需额外的推理计算成本。 GAP 在流行的基于骨架的动作识别基准上实现了新的最先进水平，包括 NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 NW-UCLA。源代码可在 https://github.com/MartinXM/GAP 获取。 本文提出一种基于生成动作描述提示（GAP）的骨骼动作识别方法，通过结合语言模型生成的动作描述信息提升模型性能。 Wangmeng Xiang,Chao Li,Yuxuan Zhou,Biao Wang,Lei Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Suvarna Kadam,Vinay G. Vaidya
title: Generative Transfer Learning: Covid-19 Classification with a few Chest X-ray Images
title_zh: 生成迁移学习：使用一些胸部 X 射线图像进行 Covid-19 分类
comment: AI4SG-21: The 3rd Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Social Good, IJCAI 2021, Montreal Canada. 7 pages, 6 Figures, 4 Tables. github.io/AI4SG2021/
comments: AI4SG-21: The 3rd Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Social Good, IJCAI 2021, Montreal Canada. 7 pages, 6 Figures, 4 Tables. github.io/AI4SG2021/
abstract: Detection of diseases through medical imaging is preferred due to its non-invasive nature. Medical imaging supports multiple modalities of data that enable a thorough and quick look inside a human body. However, interpreting imaging data is often time-consuming and requires a great deal of human expertise. Deep learning models can expedite interpretation and alleviate the work of human experts. However, these models are data-intensive and require significant labeled images for training. During novel disease outbreaks such as Covid-19, we often do not have the required labeled imaging data, especially at the start of the epidemic. Deep Transfer Learning addresses this problem by using a pretrained model in the public domain, e.g. any variant of either VGGNet, ResNet, Inception, DenseNet, etc., as a feature learner to quickly adapt the target task from fewer samples. Most pretrained models are deep with complex architectures. They are trained with large multi-class datasets such as ImageNet, with significant human efforts in architecture design and hyper parameters tuning. We presented 1 a simpler generative source model, pretrained on a single but related concept, can perform as effectively as existing larger pretrained models. We demonstrate the usefulness of generative transfer learning that requires less compute and training data, for Few Shot Learning (FSL) with a Covid-19 binary classification use case. We compare classic deep transfer learning with our approach and also report FSL results with three settings of 84, 20, and 10 training samples. The model implementation of generative FSL for Covid-19 classification is available publicly at https://github.com/suvarnak/GenerativeFSLCovid.git.
summary: Detection of diseases through medical imaging is preferred due to its non-invasive nature. Medical imaging supports multiple modalities of data that enable a thorough and quick look inside a human body. However, interpreting imaging data is often time-consuming and requires a great deal of human expertise. Deep learning models can expedite interpretation and alleviate the work of human experts. However, these models are data-intensive and require significant labeled images for training. During novel disease outbreaks such as Covid-19, we often do not have the required labeled imaging data, especially at the start of the epidemic. Deep Transfer Learning addresses this problem by using a pretrained model in the public domain, e.g. any variant of either VGGNet, ResNet, Inception, DenseNet, etc., as a feature learner to quickly adapt the target task from fewer samples. Most pretrained models are deep with complex architectures. They are trained with large multi-class datasets such as ImageNet, with significant human efforts in architecture design and hyper parameters tuning. We presented 1 a simpler generative source model, pretrained on a single but related concept, can perform as effectively as existing larger pretrained models. We demonstrate the usefulness of generative transfer learning that requires less compute and training data, for Few Shot Learning (FSL) with a Covid-19 binary classification use case. We compare classic deep transfer learning with our approach and also report FSL results with three settings of 84, 20, and 10 training samples. The model implementation of generative FSL for Covid-19 classification is available publicly at https://github.com/suvarnak/GenerativeFSLCovid.git.
abstract_zh: 通过医学成像检测疾病因其非侵入性而受到青睐。医学成像支持多种数据模式，可以全面、快速地观察人体内部。然而，解释成像数据通常非常耗时，并且需要大量的人类专业知识。深度学习模型可以加快解释速度并减轻人类专家的工作。然而，这些模型是数据密集型的，需要大量标记图像进行训练。在 Covid-19 等新型疾病爆发期间，我们通常没有所需的标记成像数据，尤其是在流行初期。深度迁移学习通过使用公共领域的预训练模型来解决这个问题，例如VGGNet、ResNet、Inception、DenseNet 等的任何变体作为特征学习器，可以从更少的样本中快速适应目标任务。大多数预训练模型都具有复杂的架构。它们使用 ImageNet 等大型多类数据集进行训练，并在架构设计和超参数调整方面投入了大量人力。我们提出了一种更简单的生成源模型，该模型针对单个但相关的概念进行了预训练，可以与现有的较大预训练模型一样有效地执行。我们通过 Covid-19 二元分类用例展示了生成迁移学习的有用性，它需要较少的计算和训练数据，用于少样本学习 (FSL)。我们将经典的深度迁移学习与我们的方法进行了比较，并报告了 84、20 和 10 个训练样本三种设置的 FSL 结果。用于 Covid-19 分类的生成 FSL 的模型实现可在 https://github.com/suvarnak/GenerativeFSLCovid.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成式迁移学习方法，用于在少量胸部X光图像下实现新冠分类。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型需要大量标注数据，而新冠等新型疾病初期数据不足，需开发低数据需求的高效方法。
AI.method: 设计基于单概念预训练的生成源模型，对比经典迁移学习方法，并在84/20/10样本设置下验证Few Shot Learning效果。
AI.result: 生成式方法在10张训练样本下达到与大型预训练模型相当的分类准确率，计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 生成式迁移学习为医疗图像的少样本分类提供了有效且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Anthony Dell'Eva,Marco Orsingher,Massimo Bertozzi
title: Arbitrary Point Cloud Upsampling with Spherical Mixture of Gaussians
title_zh: 使用高斯球形混合的任意点云上采样
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2022 (Oral)
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2022 (Oral)
abstract: Generating dense point clouds from sparse raw data benefits downstream 3D understanding tasks, but existing models are limited to a fixed upsampling ratio or to a short range of integer values. In this paper, we present APU-SMOG, a Transformer-based model for Arbitrary Point cloud Upsampling (APU). The sparse input is firstly mapped to a Spherical Mixture of Gaussians (SMOG) distribution, from which an arbitrary number of points can be sampled. Then, these samples are fed as queries to the Transformer decoder, which maps them back to the target surface. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that APU-SMOG outperforms state-of-the-art fixed-ratio methods, while effectively enabling upsampling with any scaling factor, including non-integer values, with a single trained model. The code is available at https://github.com/apusmog/apusmog/
summary: Generating dense point clouds from sparse raw data benefits downstream 3D understanding tasks, but existing models are limited to a fixed upsampling ratio or to a short range of integer values. In this paper, we present APU-SMOG, a Transformer-based model for Arbitrary Point cloud Upsampling (APU). The sparse input is firstly mapped to a Spherical Mixture of Gaussians (SMOG) distribution, from which an arbitrary number of points can be sampled. Then, these samples are fed as queries to the Transformer decoder, which maps them back to the target surface. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that APU-SMOG outperforms state-of-the-art fixed-ratio methods, while effectively enabling upsampling with any scaling factor, including non-integer values, with a single trained model. The code is available at https://github.com/apusmog/apusmog/
abstract_zh: 从稀疏原始数据生成密集点云有利于下游 3D 理解任务，但现有模型仅限于固定的上采样比率或较小的整数值范围。在本文中，我们提出了 APU-SMOG，一种基于 Transformer 的任意点云上采样 (APU) 模型。稀疏输入首先映射到高斯混合球（SMOG）分布，可以从中采样任意数量的点。然后，这些样本作为查询馈送到 Transformer 解码器，解码器将它们映射回目标表面。广泛的定性和定量评估表明，APU-SMOG 的性能优于最先进的固定比率方法，同时可以通过单个训练模型有效地实现任何比例因子（包括非整数值）的上采样。代码可在 https://github.com/apusmog/apusmog/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的任意点云上采样方法APU-SMOG，解决传统方法固定上采样比例的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有点云上采样方法受限于固定比例或整数范围，无法灵活适应不同场景需求且效率低下。
AI.method: 将稀疏点云映射为球形高斯混合分布(SMOG)，通过Transformer解码器生成任意数量的点并映射至目标表面。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有固定比例方法，支持任意整数/非整数缩放因子的单模型上采样。
AI.conclusion: APU-SMOG通过SMOG分布与Transformer结合，实现了灵活高效的点云上采样，为3D理解任务提供新工具。

authors_text: Peng Ye,Baopu Li,Tao Chen,Jiayuan Fan,Zhen Mei,Chen Lin,Chongyan Zuo,Qinghua Chi,Wanli Ouyan
title: Efficient Joint-Dimensional Search with Solution Space Regularization for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 具有解空间正则化的高效联合维度搜索，用于实时语义分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a popular research topic in computer vision, and many efforts have been made on it with impressive results. In this paper, we intend to search an optimal network structure that can run in real-time for this problem. Towards this goal, we jointly search the depth, channel, dilation rate and feature spatial resolution, which results in a search space consisting of about 2.78*10^324 possible choices. To handle such a large search space, we leverage differential architecture search methods. However, the architecture parameters searched using existing differential methods need to be discretized, which causes the discretization gap between the architecture parameters found by the differential methods and their discretized version as the final solution for the architecture search. Hence, we relieve the problem of discretization gap from the innovative perspective of solution space regularization. Specifically, a novel Solution Space Regularization (SSR) loss is first proposed to effectively encourage the supernet to converge to its discrete one. Then, a new Hierarchical and Progressive Solution Space Shrinking method is presented to further achieve high efficiency of searching. In addition, we theoretically show that the optimization of SSR loss is equivalent to the L_0-norm regularization, which accounts for the improved search-evaluation gap. Comprehensive experiments show that the proposed search scheme can efficiently find an optimal network structure that yields an extremely fast speed (175 FPS) of segmentation with a small model size (1 M) while maintaining comparable accuracy.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a popular research topic in computer vision, and many efforts have been made on it with impressive results. In this paper, we intend to search an optimal network structure that can run in real-time for this problem. Towards this goal, we jointly search the depth, channel, dilation rate and feature spatial resolution, which results in a search space consisting of about 2.78*10^324 possible choices. To handle such a large search space, we leverage differential architecture search methods. However, the architecture parameters searched using existing differential methods need to be discretized, which causes the discretization gap between the architecture parameters found by the differential methods and their discretized version as the final solution for the architecture search. Hence, we relieve the problem of discretization gap from the innovative perspective of solution space regularization. Specifically, a novel Solution Space Regularization (SSR) loss is first proposed to effectively encourage the supernet to converge to its discrete one. Then, a new Hierarchical and Progressive Solution Space Shrinking method is presented to further achieve high efficiency of searching. In addition, we theoretically show that the optimization of SSR loss is equivalent to the L_0-norm regularization, which accounts for the improved search-evaluation gap. Comprehensive experiments show that the proposed search scheme can efficiently find an optimal network structure that yields an extremely fast speed (175 FPS) of segmentation with a small model size (1 M) while maintaining comparable accuracy.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是计算机视觉领域的一个热门研究课题，人们在这方面做出了许多努力并取得了令人瞩目的成果。在本文中，我们打算针对这个问题寻找一种可以实时运行的最佳网络结构。为了实现这一目标，我们联合搜索深度、通道、膨胀率和特征空间分辨率，从而产生由大约 2.78*10^324 个可能选择组成的搜索空间。为了处理如此大的搜索空间，我们利用差分架构搜索方法。然而，使用现有的差分方法搜索的架构参数需要离散化，这导致差分方法找到的架构参数与作为架构搜索的最终解决方案的离散化版本之间存在离散化差距。因此，我们从解空间正则化的创新角度缓解了离散化间隙问题。具体来说，首先提出了一种新颖的解决方案空间正则化（SSR）损失，以有效地鼓励超网收敛到其离散超网。然后，提出了一种新的分层渐进解空间收缩方法，以进一步实现高效搜索。此外，我们从理论上表明，SSR 损失的优化相当于 L_0 范数正则化，这解释了搜索评估差距的改进。综合实验表明，所提出的搜索方案可以有效地找到最佳网络结构，以小模型尺寸（1 M）产生极快的分割速度（175 FPS），同时保持相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的联合维度搜索方法，结合解空间正则化技术，用于实时语义分割网络结构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在连续架构参数离散化时存在差距问题，导致搜索效率与性能下降，需通过解空间正则化缓解该问题。
AI.method: 提出解空间正则化损失（SSR）引导超网络收敛至离散解，并设计分层渐进解空间收缩方法提升搜索效率，理论证明SSR等价于L0范数正则化。
AI.result: 在保持精度的同时实现175 FPS的分割速度，模型大小仅1M，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过缓解离散化差距有效提升了实时语义分割的搜索效率与模型性能。

search_text: Efficient Joint-Dimensional Search with Solution Space Regularization for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation 具有解空间正则化的高效联合维度搜索，用于实时语义分割 Semantic segmentation is a popular research topic in computer vision, and many efforts have been made on it with impressive results. In this paper, we intend to search an optimal network structure that can run in real-time for this problem. Towards this goal, we jointly search the depth, channel, dilation rate and feature spatial resolution, which results in a search space consisting of about 2.78*10^324 possible choices. To handle such a large search space, we leverage differential architecture search methods. However, the architecture parameters searched using existing differential methods need to be discretized, which causes the discretization gap between the architecture parameters found by the differential methods and their discretized version as the final solution for the architecture search. Hence, we relieve the problem of discretization gap from the innovative perspective of solution space regularization. Specifically, a novel Solution Space Regularization (SSR) loss is first proposed to effectively encourage the supernet to converge to its discrete one. Then, a new Hierarchical and Progressive Solution Space Shrinking method is presented to further achieve high efficiency of searching. In addition, we theoretically show that the optimization of SSR loss is equivalent to the L_0-norm regularization, which accounts for the improved search-evaluation gap. Comprehensive experiments show that the proposed search scheme can efficiently find an optimal network structure that yields an extremely fast speed (175 FPS) of segmentation with a small model size (1 M) while maintaining comparable accuracy. 语义分割是计算机视觉领域的一个热门研究课题，人们在这方面做出了许多努力并取得了令人瞩目的成果。在本文中，我们打算针对这个问题寻找一种可以实时运行的最佳网络结构。为了实现这一目标，我们联合搜索深度、通道、膨胀率和特征空间分辨率，从而产生由大约 2.78*10^324 个可能选择组成的搜索空间。为了处理如此大的搜索空间，我们利用差分架构搜索方法。然而，使用现有的差分方法搜索的架构参数需要离散化，这导致差分方法找到的架构参数与作为架构搜索的最终解决方案的离散化版本之间存在离散化差距。因此，我们从解空间正则化的创新角度缓解了离散化间隙问题。具体来说，首先提出了一种新颖的解决方案空间正则化（SSR）损失，以有效地鼓励超网收敛到其离散超网。然后，提出了一种新的分层渐进解空间收缩方法，以进一步实现高效搜索。此外，我们从理论上表明，SSR 损失的优化相当于 L_0 范数正则化，这解释了搜索评估差距的改进。综合实验表明，所提出的搜索方案可以有效地找到最佳网络结构，以小模型尺寸（1 M）产生极快的分割速度（175 FPS），同时保持相当的精度。 本文提出一种高效的联合维度搜索方法，结合解空间正则化技术，用于实时语义分割网络结构搜索。 Peng Ye,Baopu Li,Tao Chen,Jiayuan Fan,Zhen Mei,Chen Lin,Chongyan Zuo,Qinghua Chi,Wanli Ouyan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ali Krayani,Atm S. Alam,Lucio Marcenaro,Arumugam Nallanathan,Carlo Regazzoni
title: A Novel Resource Allocation for Anti-jamming in Cognitive-UAVs: an Active Inference Approach
title_zh: 认知无人机抗干扰的新型资源分配：主动推理方法
comment: ef:IEEE Communications Letters (2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Communications Letters (2022)
abstract: This work proposes a novel resource allocation strategy for anti-jamming in Cognitive Radio using Active Inference ($\textit{AIn}$), and a cognitive-UAV is employed as a case study. An Active Generalized Dynamic Bayesian Network (Active-GDBN) is proposed to represent the external environment that jointly encodes the physical signal dynamics and the dynamic interaction between UAV and jammer in the spectrum. We cast the action and planning as a Bayesian inference problem that can be solved by avoiding surprising states (minimizing abnormality) during online learning. Simulation results verify the effectiveness of the proposed $\textit{AIn}$ approach in minimizing abnormalities (maximizing rewards) and has a high convergence speed by comparing it with the conventional Frequency Hopping and Q-learning.
summary: This work proposes a novel resource allocation strategy for anti-jamming in Cognitive Radio using Active Inference ($\textit{AIn}$), and a cognitive-UAV is employed as a case study. An Active Generalized Dynamic Bayesian Network (Active-GDBN) is proposed to represent the external environment that jointly encodes the physical signal dynamics and the dynamic interaction between UAV and jammer in the spectrum. We cast the action and planning as a Bayesian inference problem that can be solved by avoiding surprising states (minimizing abnormality) during online learning. Simulation results verify the effectiveness of the proposed $\textit{AIn}$ approach in minimizing abnormalities (maximizing rewards) and has a high convergence speed by comparing it with the conventional Frequency Hopping and Q-learning.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种使用主动推理（$\textit{AIn}$）的认知无线电抗干扰资源分配策略，并以认知无人机作为案例研究。提出了主动广义动态贝叶斯网络（Active-GDBN）来表示外部环境，该外部环境联合编码频谱中的物理信号动态以及无人机与干扰机之间的动态交互。我们将行动和规划视为贝叶斯推理问题，可以通过在线学习期间避免意外状态（最小化异常）来解决。仿真结果通过与传统的跳频和 Q 学习进行比较，验证了所提出的 $\textit{AIn}$ 方法在最小化异常（最大化奖励）方面的有效性，并且具有较高的收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动推断（AIn）的新型资源分配策略，用于认知无人机（Cognitive-UAV）中的反干扰问题，并通过主动广义动态贝叶斯网络（Active-GDBN）建模环境动态。
AI.motivation: 传统频跳和Q学习方法在反干扰场景中存在收敛速度慢、适应性差的问题，需探索更高效的资源分配方法以提升无人机在动态频谱环境中的抗干扰能力。
AI.method: 设计主动广义动态贝叶斯网络（Active-GDBN）联合编码物理信号动态与无人机-干扰源交互关系，将行动与规划建模为基于最小化异常状态的贝叶斯推断问题，通过在线学习实现资源分配。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提AIn方法在异常最小化（奖励最大化）和收敛速度上均优于传统频跳和Q学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 主动推断框架为认知无人机反干扰资源分配提供了高效解决方案，未来可拓展至更复杂的动态频谱共享场景。

authors_text: Nithin Babu,Igor Donevski,Alvaro Valcarce,Petar Popovski,Jimmy Jessen Nielsen,Constantinos B. Papadias
title: Fairness Based Energy-Efficient 3D Path Planning of a Portable Access Point: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 基于公平的便携式接入点节能 3D 路径规划：深度强化学习方法
comment: 12 PAGES, 9 FIGURES
comments: 12 PAGES, 9 FIGURES
abstract: In this work, we optimize the 3D trajectory of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based portable access point (PAP) that provides wireless services to a set of ground nodes (GNs). Moreover, as per the Peukert effect, we consider pragmatic non-linear battery discharge for the battery of the UAV. Thus, we formulate the problem in a novel manner that represents the maximization of a fairness-based energy efficiency metric and is named fair energy efficiency (FEE). The FEE metric defines a system that lays importance on both the per-user service fairness and the energy efficiency of the PAP. The formulated problem takes the form of a non-convex problem with non-tractable constraints. To obtain a solution, we represent the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) with continuous state and action spaces. Considering the complexity of the solution space, we use the twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) actor-critic deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to learn a policy that maximizes the FEE of the system. We perform two types of RL training to exhibit the effectiveness of our approach: the first (offline) approach keeps the positions of the GNs the same throughout the training phase; the second approach generalizes the learned policy to any arrangement of GNs by changing the positions of GNs after each training episode. Numerical evaluations show that neglecting the Peukert effect overestimates the air-time of the PAP and can be addressed by optimally selecting the PAP's flying speed. Moreover, the user fairness, energy efficiency, and hence the FEE value of the system can be improved by efficiently moving the PAP above the GNs. As such, we notice massive FEE improvements over baseline scenarios of up to 88.31%, 272.34%, and 318.13% for suburban, urban, and dense urban environments, respectively.
summary: In this work, we optimize the 3D trajectory of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based portable access point (PAP) that provides wireless services to a set of ground nodes (GNs). Moreover, as per the Peukert effect, we consider pragmatic non-linear battery discharge for the battery of the UAV. Thus, we formulate the problem in a novel manner that represents the maximization of a fairness-based energy efficiency metric and is named fair energy efficiency (FEE). The FEE metric defines a system that lays importance on both the per-user service fairness and the energy efficiency of the PAP. The formulated problem takes the form of a non-convex problem with non-tractable constraints. To obtain a solution, we represent the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) with continuous state and action spaces. Considering the complexity of the solution space, we use the twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) actor-critic deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to learn a policy that maximizes the FEE of the system. We perform two types of RL training to exhibit the effectiveness of our approach: the first (offline) approach keeps the positions of the GNs the same throughout the training phase; the second approach generalizes the learned policy to any arrangement of GNs by changing the positions of GNs after each training episode. Numerical evaluations show that neglecting the Peukert effect overestimates the air-time of the PAP and can be addressed by optimally selecting the PAP's flying speed. Moreover, the user fairness, energy efficiency, and hence the FEE value of the system can be improved by efficiently moving the PAP above the GNs. As such, we notice massive FEE improvements over baseline scenarios of up to 88.31%, 272.34%, and 318.13% for suburban, urban, and dense urban environments, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们优化了基于无人机 (UAV) 的便携式接入点 (PAP) 的 3D 轨迹，该接入点为一组地面节点 (GN) 提供无线服务。此外，根据Peukert效应，我们考虑了无人机电池的实用非线性电池放电。因此，我们以一种新颖的方式来表述该问题，该方式表示基于公平的能源效率指标的最大化，并将其命名为公平能源效率（FEE）。 FEE指标定义了一个既重视每用户服务公平性又重视PAP能源效率的系统。所表述的问题采用具有不可处理约束的非凸问题的形式。为了获得解决方案，我们将问题表示为具有连续状态和动作空间的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。考虑到解决方案空间的复杂性，我们使用孪生延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）演员-评论家深度强化学习（DRL）框架来学习最大化系统 FEE 的策略。我们进行两种类型的 RL 训练来展示我们方法的有效性：第一种（离线）方法在整个训练阶段保持 GN 的位置相同；第二种方法通过在每次训练后改变 GN 的位置，将学习到的策略推广到任何 GN 的排列。数值评估表明，忽略普克特效应会高估 PAP 的飞行时间，可以通过优化选择 PAP 的飞行速度来解决。此外，通过有效地将 PAP 移动到 GN 之上，可以提高用户公平性、能源效率，从而提高系统的 FEE 值。因此，我们注意到郊区、城市和密集城市环境的费用较基准情景大幅提高，分别高达 88.31%、272.34% 和 318.13%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的三维路径规划方法，优化无人机基站的能耗效率与用户服务公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机路径规划未充分考虑电池非线性放电特性（Peukert效应），导致能耗估计偏差，并忽视用户间服务公平性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）算法，在连续状态与动作空间中学习最大化公平能耗效率（FEE）的策略，并通过两种训练方式验证泛化性。
AI.result: 在郊区、城市和密集城区场景中，系统FEE分别提升88.31%、272.34%和318.13%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 考虑Peukert效应并结合DRL优化路径规划，可显著提升无人机基站的能耗效率与用户服务公平性。

search_text: Fairness Based Energy-Efficient 3D Path Planning of a Portable Access Point: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach 基于公平的便携式接入点节能 3D 路径规划：深度强化学习方法 In this work, we optimize the 3D trajectory of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based portable access point (PAP) that provides wireless services to a set of ground nodes (GNs). Moreover, as per the Peukert effect, we consider pragmatic non-linear battery discharge for the battery of the UAV. Thus, we formulate the problem in a novel manner that represents the maximization of a fairness-based energy efficiency metric and is named fair energy efficiency (FEE). The FEE metric defines a system that lays importance on both the per-user service fairness and the energy efficiency of the PAP. The formulated problem takes the form of a non-convex problem with non-tractable constraints. To obtain a solution, we represent the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) with continuous state and action spaces. Considering the complexity of the solution space, we use the twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) actor-critic deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to learn a policy that maximizes the FEE of the system. We perform two types of RL training to exhibit the effectiveness of our approach: the first (offline) approach keeps the positions of the GNs the same throughout the training phase; the second approach generalizes the learned policy to any arrangement of GNs by changing the positions of GNs after each training episode. Numerical evaluations show that neglecting the Peukert effect overestimates the air-time of the PAP and can be addressed by optimally selecting the PAP's flying speed. Moreover, the user fairness, energy efficiency, and hence the FEE value of the system can be improved by efficiently moving the PAP above the GNs. As such, we notice massive FEE improvements over baseline scenarios of up to 88.31%, 272.34%, and 318.13% for suburban, urban, and dense urban environments, respectively. 在这项工作中，我们优化了基于无人机 (UAV) 的便携式接入点 (PAP) 的 3D 轨迹，该接入点为一组地面节点 (GN) 提供无线服务。此外，根据Peukert效应，我们考虑了无人机电池的实用非线性电池放电。因此，我们以一种新颖的方式来表述该问题，该方式表示基于公平的能源效率指标的最大化，并将其命名为公平能源效率（FEE）。 FEE指标定义了一个既重视每用户服务公平性又重视PAP能源效率的系统。所表述的问题采用具有不可处理约束的非凸问题的形式。为了获得解决方案，我们将问题表示为具有连续状态和动作空间的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。考虑到解决方案空间的复杂性，我们使用孪生延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）演员-评论家深度强化学习（DRL）框架来学习最大化系统 FEE 的策略。我们进行两种类型的 RL 训练来展示我们方法的有效性：第一种（离线）方法在整个训练阶段保持 GN 的位置相同；第二种方法通过在每次训练后改变 GN 的位置，将学习到的策略推广到任何 GN 的排列。数值评估表明，忽略普克特效应会高估 PAP 的飞行时间，可以通过优化选择 PAP 的飞行速度来解决。此外，通过有效地将 PAP 移动到 GN 之上，可以提高用户公平性、能源效率，从而提高系统的 FEE 值。因此，我们注意到郊区、城市和密集城市环境的费用较基准情景大幅提高，分别高达 88.31%、272.34% 和 318.13%。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的三维路径规划方法，优化无人机基站的能耗效率与用户服务公平性。 Nithin Babu,Igor Donevski,Alvaro Valcarce,Petar Popovski,Jimmy Jessen Nielsen,Constantinos B. authors_text: Dinusha Vatsalan,Raghav Bhaskar,Mohamed Ali Kaafar
title: Local Differentially Private Fuzzy Counting in Stream Data using Probabilistic Data Structure
title_zh: 使用概率数据结构的流数据局部差分隐私模糊计数
comment: Version 2 14 pages, Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Data and Knowledge Engineering, 2022
comments: Version 2 14 pages, Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Data and Knowledge Engineering, 2022
abstract: Privacy-preserving estimation of counts of items in streaming data finds applications in several real-world scenarios including word auto-correction and traffic management applications. Recent works of RAPPOR and Apple's count-mean sketch (CMS) algorithm propose privacy preserving mechanisms for count estimation in large volumes of data using probabilistic data structures like counting Bloom filter and CMS. However, these existing methods fall short in providing a sound solution for real-time streaming data applications. In this work, we propose a novel (local) Differentially private mechanism that provides high utility for the streaming data count estimation problem with similar or even lower privacy budgets while providing: a) fuzzy counting to report counts of related or similar items (for instance to account for typing errors and data variations), and b) improved querying efficiency to reduce the response time for real-time querying of counts. We provide formal proofs for privacy and utility guarantees and present extensive experimental evaluation of our algorithm using real and synthetic English words datasets for both the exact and fuzzy counting scenarios. Our privacy preserving mechanism substantially outperforms the prior work in terms of lower querying time, significantly higher utility (accuracy of count estimation) under similar or lower privacy guarantees, at the cost of communication overhead.
summary: Privacy-preserving estimation of counts of items in streaming data finds applications in several real-world scenarios including word auto-correction and traffic management applications. Recent works of RAPPOR and Apple's count-mean sketch (CMS) algorithm propose privacy preserving mechanisms for count estimation in large volumes of data using probabilistic data structures like counting Bloom filter and CMS. However, these existing methods fall short in providing a sound solution for real-time streaming data applications. In this work, we propose a novel (local) Differentially private mechanism that provides high utility for the streaming data count estimation problem with similar or even lower privacy budgets while providing: a) fuzzy counting to report counts of related or similar items (for instance to account for typing errors and data variations), and b) improved querying efficiency to reduce the response time for real-time querying of counts. We provide formal proofs for privacy and utility guarantees and present extensive experimental evaluation of our algorithm using real and synthetic English words datasets for both the exact and fuzzy counting scenarios. Our privacy preserving mechanism substantially outperforms the prior work in terms of lower querying time, significantly higher utility (accuracy of count estimation) under similar or lower privacy guarantees, at the cost of communication overhead.
abstract_zh: 对流数据中项目计数的隐私保护估计在多种现实场景中都有应用，包括单词自动更正和流量管理应用。 RAPPOR 和 Apple 的计数均值草图 (CMS) 算法的最新工作提出了使用概率数据结构（如计数布隆过滤器和 CMS）对大量数据进行计数估计的隐私保护机制。然而，这些现有方法不足以为实时流数据应用提供完善的解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的（本地）差分隐私机制，该机制为具有相似甚至更低隐私预算的流数据计数估计问题提供了高实用性，同时提供：a）模糊计数以报告相关或相似项目的计数（例如考虑打字错误和数据变化），b）提高查询效率以减少实时计数查询的响应时间。我们提供了隐私和实用性保证的正式证明，并使用真实和合成的英语单词数据集针对精确和模糊计数场景对我们的算法进行了广泛的实验评估。我们的隐私保护机制在查询时间较短、在类似或较低的隐私保证下显着提高效用（计数估计的准确性）方面显着优于先前的工作，但代价是通信开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部差分隐私的模糊计数方法，用于流数据中的高效隐私保护计数估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如RAPPOR和CMS在实时流数据处理中存在隐私预算高、无法处理模糊计数（如拼写错误）及查询效率低的问题。
AI.method: 结合概率数据结构与局部差分隐私机制，实现模糊计数（处理相似项）和查询效率优化，通过形式化证明隐私与效用保障。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在相似隐私预算下显著提升计数准确性，降低查询时间，但需承担更高的通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机制在隐私保护、效用及实时性方面优于现有方案，为流数据隐私分析提供了新思路。
