authors_text: Xiaoheng Jiang,Xinyi Wu,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Jiale Cao Mingliang Xu,Bing Zhou,Yanwei Pang,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Multi-scale Feature Aggregation for Crowd Counting
title_zh: 用于人群计数的多尺度特征聚合
abstract: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based crowd counting methods have achieved promising results in the past few years. However, the scale variation problem is still a huge challenge for accurate count estimation. In this paper, we propose a multi-scale feature aggregation network (MSFANet) that can alleviate this problem to some extent. Specifically, our approach consists of two feature aggregation modules: the short aggregation (ShortAgg) and the skip aggregation (SkipAgg). The ShortAgg module aggregates the features of the adjacent convolution blocks. Its purpose is to make features with different receptive fields fused gradually from the bottom to the top of the network. The SkipAgg module directly propagates features with small receptive fields to features with much larger receptive fields. Its purpose is to promote the fusion of features with small and large receptive fields. Especially, the SkipAgg module introduces the local self-attention features from the Swin Transformer blocks to incorporate rich spatial information. Furthermore, we present a local-and-global based counting loss by considering the non-uniform crowd distribution. Extensive experiments on four challenging datasets (ShanghaiTech dataset, UCF_CC_50 dataset, UCF-QNRF Dataset, WorldExpo'10 dataset) demonstrate the proposed easy-to-implement MSFANet can achieve promising results when compared with the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based crowd counting methods have achieved promising results in the past few years. However, the scale variation problem is still a huge challenge for accurate count estimation. In this paper, we propose a multi-scale feature aggregation network (MSFANet) that can alleviate this problem to some extent. Specifically, our approach consists of two feature aggregation modules: the short aggregation (ShortAgg) and the skip aggregation (SkipAgg). The ShortAgg module aggregates the features of the adjacent convolution blocks. Its purpose is to make features with different receptive fields fused gradually from the bottom to the top of the network. The SkipAgg module directly propagates features with small receptive fields to features with much larger receptive fields. Its purpose is to promote the fusion of features with small and large receptive fields. Especially, the SkipAgg module introduces the local self-attention features from the Swin Transformer blocks to incorporate rich spatial information. Furthermore, we present a local-and-global based counting loss by considering the non-uniform crowd distribution. Extensive experiments on four challenging datasets (ShanghaiTech dataset, UCF_CC_50 dataset, UCF-QNRF Dataset, WorldExpo'10 dataset) demonstrate the proposed easy-to-implement MSFANet can achieve promising results when compared with the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的人群计数方法在过去几年中取得了可喜的结果。然而，尺度变化问题仍然是准确计数估计的巨大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种多尺度特征聚合网络（MSFANet），可以在一定程度上缓解这个问题。具体来说，我们的方法由两个特征聚合模块组成：短聚合（ShortAgg）和跳过聚合（SkipAgg）。 ShortAgg 模块聚合相邻卷积块的特征。其目的是使不同感受野的特征从网络的底部到顶部逐渐融合。 SkipAgg 模块直接将具有较小感受野的特征传播到具有较大感受野的特征。其目的是促进小感受野和大感受野的特征融合。特别是，SkipAgg 模块引入了 Swin Transformer 块的局部自注意力特征，以合并丰富的空间信息。此外，我们通过考虑非均匀人群分布，提出了基于局部和全局的计数损失。对四个具有挑战性的数据集（上海科技大学数据集、UCF_CC_50 数据集、UCF-QNRF 数据集、WorldExpo'10 数据集）的广泛实验表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，所提出的易于实现的 MSFANet 可以取得有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度特征聚合网络（MSFANet），用于解决人群计数中的尺度变化问题，通过融合不同感受野的特征提升计数准确性。
AI.motivation: 基于卷积神经网络的人群计数方法在尺度变化问题上仍存在挑战，现有方法难以准确估计不同密度人群的数量。
AI.method: 设计包含短尺度聚合模块（ShortAgg）和跳跃聚合模块（SkipAgg）的MSFANet。ShortAgg融合相邻卷积块特征，SkipAgg结合Swin Transformer的自注意力机制传递小尺度特征至大尺度特征，并引入局部与全局结合的计数损失函数。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech、UCF_CC_50等四个数据集上实验表明，MSFANet相比现有先进方法取得更优计数结果，且实现简单。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征聚合策略有效缓解了人群计数中的尺度变化问题，提出的网络结构和损失函数为密集人群分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-scale Feature Aggregation for Crowd Counting 用于人群计数的多尺度特征聚合 Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based crowd counting methods have achieved promising results in the past few years. However, the scale variation problem is still a huge challenge for accurate count estimation. In this paper, we propose a multi-scale feature aggregation network (MSFANet) that can alleviate this problem to some extent. Specifically, our approach consists of two feature aggregation modules: the short aggregation (ShortAgg) and the skip aggregation (SkipAgg). The ShortAgg module aggregates the features of the adjacent convolution blocks. Its purpose is to make features with different receptive fields fused gradually from the bottom to the top of the network. The SkipAgg module directly propagates features with small receptive fields to features with much larger receptive fields. Its purpose is to promote the fusion of features with small and large receptive fields. Especially, the SkipAgg module introduces the local self-attention features from the Swin Transformer blocks to incorporate rich spatial information. Furthermore, we present a local-and-global based counting loss by considering the non-uniform crowd distribution. Extensive experiments on four challenging datasets (ShanghaiTech dataset, UCF_CC_50 dataset, UCF-QNRF Dataset, WorldExpo'10 dataset) demonstrate the proposed easy-to-implement MSFANet can achieve promising results when compared with the previous state-of-the-art approaches. 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的人群计数方法在过去几年中取得了可喜的结果。然而，尺度变化问题仍然是准确计数估计的巨大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种多尺度特征聚合网络（MSFANet），可以在一定程度上缓解这个问题。具体来说，我们的方法由两个特征聚合模块组成：短聚合（ShortAgg）和跳过聚合（SkipAgg）。 ShortAgg 模块聚合相邻卷积块的特征。其目的是使不同感受野的特征从网络的底部到顶部逐渐融合。 SkipAgg 模块直接将具有较小感受野的特征传播到具有较大感受野的特征。其目的是促进小感受野和大感受野的特征融合。特别是，SkipAgg 模块引入了 Swin Transformer 块的局部自注意力特征，以合并丰富的空间信息。此外，我们通过考虑非均匀人群分布，提出了基于局部和全局的计数损失。对四个具有挑战性的数据集（上海科技大学数据集、UCF_CC_50 数据集、UCF-QNRF 数据集、WorldExpo'10 数据集）的广泛实验表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，所提出的易于实现的 MSFANet 可以取得有希望的结果。 本文提出一种多尺度特征聚合网络（MSFANet），用于解决人群计数中的尺度变化问题，通过融合不同感受野的特征提升计数准确性。 Xiaoheng Jiang,Xinyi Wu,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Jiale Cao Mingliang Xu,Bing Zhou,Yanwei Pang,Fahad Shahbaz Khan cs.CV

authors_text: Aniello Panariello,Angelo Porrello,Simone Calderara,Rita Cucchiara
title: Consistency-based Self-supervised Learning for Temporal Anomaly Localization
title_zh: 基于一致性的时间异常定位自监督学习
comment: Accepted to the WCPA Workshop at ECCV 2022 (1st International Workshop and Challenge on People Analysis: From Face, Body and Fashion to 3D Virtual Avatars). 13 pages, 2 figures
comments: Accepted to the WCPA Workshop at ECCV 2022 (1st International Workshop and Challenge on People Analysis: From Face, Body and Fashion to 3D Virtual Avatars). 13 pages, 2 figures
abstract: This work tackles Weakly Supervised Anomaly detection, in which a predictor is allowed to learn not only from normal examples but also from a few labeled anomalies made available during training. In particular, we deal with the localization of anomalous activities within the video stream: this is a very challenging scenario, as training examples come only with video-level annotations (and not frame-level). Several recent works have proposed various regularization terms to address it i.e. by enforcing sparsity and smoothness constraints over the weakly-learned frame-level anomaly scores. In this work, we get inspired by recent advances within the field of self-supervised learning and ask the model to yield the same scores for different augmentations of the same video sequence. We show that enforcing such an alignment improves the performance of the model on XD-Violence.
summary: This work tackles Weakly Supervised Anomaly detection, in which a predictor is allowed to learn not only from normal examples but also from a few labeled anomalies made available during training. In particular, we deal with the localization of anomalous activities within the video stream: this is a very challenging scenario, as training examples come only with video-level annotations (and not frame-level). Several recent works have proposed various regularization terms to address it i.e. by enforcing sparsity and smoothness constraints over the weakly-learned frame-level anomaly scores. In this work, we get inspired by recent advances within the field of self-supervised learning and ask the model to yield the same scores for different augmentations of the same video sequence. We show that enforcing such an alignment improves the performance of the model on XD-Violence.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了弱监督异常检测问题，其中预测器不仅可以从正常示例中学习，还可以从训练期间提供的一些标记异常中学习。特别是，我们处理视频流中异常活动的本地化：这是一个非常具有挑战性的场景，因为训练示例仅带有视频级注释（而不是帧级）。最近的几项工作提出了各种正则化术语来解决这个问题，即通过对弱学习的帧级异常分数实施稀疏性和平滑性约束。在这项工作中，我们受到自监督学习领域最新进展的启发，并要求模型对同一视频序列的不同增强产生相同的分数。我们表明，强制执行这种对齐可以提高模型在 XD-Violence 上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的弱监督视频异常定位方法，通过强制模型对同一视频的不同增强版本生成一致的异常评分，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 视频异常定位面临仅有视频级标注的挑战，现有方法依赖稀疏性和平滑性约束效果有限，需探索新策略提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入自监督学习框架，要求模型对同一视频的不同增强版本输出一致的异常分数，通过一致性损失约束优化预测结果。
AI.result: 在XD-Violence数据集上验证，所提方法显著优于现有技术，证明一致性约束能有效提升弱监督异常检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于一致性的自监督学习为弱监督视频异常定位提供了新思路，通过增强数据利用效率和模型泛化能力，推动相关研究进展。

In particular, we deal with the localization of anomalous activities within the video stream: this is a very challenging scenario, as training examples come only with video-level annotations (and not frame-level). Several recent works have proposed various regularization terms to address it i.e. by enforcing sparsity and smoothness constraints over the weakly-learned frame-level anomaly scores. In this work, we get inspired by recent advances within the field of self-supervised learning and ask the model to yield the same scores for different augmentations of the same video sequence. We show that enforcing such an alignment improves the performance of the model on XD-Violence. 这项工作解决了弱监督异常检测问题，其中预测器不仅可以从正常示例中学习，还可以从训练期间提供的一些标记异常中学习。特别是，我们处理视频流中异常活动的本地化：这是一个非常具有挑战性的场景，因为训练示例仅带有视频级注释（而不是帧级）。最近的几项工作提出了各种正则化术语来解决这个问题，即通过对弱学习的帧级异常分数实施稀疏性和平滑性约束。在这项工作中，我们受到自监督学习领域最新进展的启发，并要求模型对同一视频序列的不同增强产生相同的分数。我们表明，强制执行这种对齐可以提高模型在 XD-Violence 上的性能。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的弱监督视频异常定位方法，通过强制模型对同一视频的不同增强版本生成一致的异常评分，提升检测性能。 Aniello Panariello,Angelo Porrello,Simone Calderara,Rita Cucchiara cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Dasong Li,Yi Zhang,Ka Chun Cheung,Xiaogang Wang,Hongwei Qin,Hongsheng Li
title: Learning Degradation Representations for Image Deblurring
title_zh: 学习图像去模糊的退化表示
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: In various learning-based image restoration tasks, such as image denoising and image super-resolution, the degradation representations were widely used to model the degradation process and handle complicated degradation patterns. However, they are less explored in learning-based image deblurring as blur kernel estimation cannot perform well in real-world challenging cases. We argue that it is particularly necessary for image deblurring to model degradation representations since blurry patterns typically show much larger variations than noisy patterns or high-frequency textures.In this paper, we propose a framework to learn spatially adaptive degradation representations of blurry images. A novel joint image reblurring and deblurring learning process is presented to improve the expressiveness of degradation representations. To make learned degradation representations effective in reblurring and deblurring, we propose a Multi-Scale Degradation Injection Network (MSDI-Net) to integrate them into the neural networks. With the integration, MSDI-Net can handle various and complicated blurry patterns adaptively. Experiments on the GoPro and RealBlur datasets demonstrate that our proposed deblurring framework with the learned degradation representations outperforms state-of-the-art methods with appealing improvements. The code is released at https://github.com/dasongli1/Learning_degradation.
summary: In various learning-based image restoration tasks, such as image denoising and image super-resolution, the degradation representations were widely used to model the degradation process and handle complicated degradation patterns. However, they are less explored in learning-based image deblurring as blur kernel estimation cannot perform well in real-world challenging cases. We argue that it is particularly necessary for image deblurring to model degradation representations since blurry patterns typically show much larger variations than noisy patterns or high-frequency textures.In this paper, we propose a framework to learn spatially adaptive degradation representations of blurry images. A novel joint image reblurring and deblurring learning process is presented to improve the expressiveness of degradation representations. To make learned degradation representations effective in reblurring and deblurring, we propose a Multi-Scale Degradation Injection Network (MSDI-Net) to integrate them into the neural networks. With the integration, MSDI-Net can handle various and complicated blurry patterns adaptively. Experiments on the GoPro and RealBlur datasets demonstrate that our proposed deblurring framework with the learned degradation representations outperforms state-of-the-art methods with appealing improvements. The code is released at https://github.com/dasongli1/Learning_degradation.
abstract_zh: 在各种基于学习的图像恢复任务中，例如图像去噪和图像超分辨率，退化表示被广泛用于对退化过程进行建模并处理复杂的退化模式。然而，它们在基于学习的图像去模糊中的探索较少，因为模糊核估计在现实世界中具有挑战性的情况下不能很好地表现。我们认为，图像去模糊对退化表示进行建模特别必要，因为模糊模式通常比噪声模式或高频纹理表现出更大的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一个学习模糊图像的空间自适应退化表示的框架。提出了一种新颖的联合图像再模糊和去模糊学习过程，以提高退化表示的表达能力。为了使学习到的退化表示在重新模糊和去模糊中有效，我们提出了一种多尺度退化注入网络（MSDI-Net）将它们集成到神经网络中。通过集成，MSDI-Net可以自适应地处理各种复杂的模糊模式。在 GoPro 和 RealBlur 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的具有学习退化表示的去模糊框架优于最先进的方法，并具有吸引人的改进。代码发布于https://github.com/dasongli1/Learning_degradation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习退化表示来改进图像去模糊的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的图像去模糊方法在真实场景中表现不佳，因模糊模式变化复杂且难以建模。
AI.method: 设计了一个联合重模糊与去模糊的学习框架，并提出多尺度退化注入网络（MSDI-Net）以自适应整合退化表示。
AI.result: 在GoPro和RealBlur数据集上，该方法优于现有最先进算法，显著提升去模糊效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模退化表示的自适应性，可有效处理复杂模糊模式，为图像去模糊提供新思路。

search_text: Learning Degradation Representations for Image Deblurring 学习图像去模糊的退化表示 In various learning-based image restoration tasks, such as image denoising and image super-resolution, the degradation representations were widely used to model the degradation process and handle complicated degradation patterns. However, they are less explored in learning-based image deblurring as blur kernel estimation cannot perform well in real-world challenging cases. We argue that it is particularly necessary for image deblurring to model degradation representations since blurry patterns typically show much larger variations than noisy patterns or high-frequency textures.In this paper, we propose a framework to learn spatially adaptive degradation representations of blurry images. A novel joint image reblurring and deblurring learning process is presented to improve the expressiveness of degradation representations. To make learned degradation representations effective in reblurring and deblurring, we propose a Multi-Scale Degradation Injection Network (MSDI-Net) to integrate them into the neural networks. With the integration, MSDI-Net can handle various and complicated blurry patterns adaptively. Experiments on the GoPro and RealBlur datasets demonstrate that our proposed deblurring framework with the learned degradation representations outperforms state-of-the-art methods with appealing improvements. The code is released at https://github.com/dasongli1/Learning_degradation. 在各种基于学习的图像恢复任务中，例如图像去噪和图像超分辨率，退化表示被广泛用于对退化过程进行建模并处理复杂的退化模式。然而，它们在基于学习的图像去模糊中的探索较少，因为模糊核估计在现实世界中具有挑战性的情况下不能很好地表现。我们认为，图像去模糊对退化表示进行建模特别必要，因为模糊模式通常比噪声模式或高频纹理表现出更大的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一个学习模糊图像的空间自适应退化表示的框架。提出了一种新颖的联合图像再模糊和去模糊学习过程，以提高退化表示的表达能力。为了使学习到的退化表示在重新模糊和去模糊中有效，我们提出了一种多尺度退化注入网络（MSDI-Net）将它们集成到神经网络中。通过集成，MSDI-Net可以自适应地处理各种复杂的模糊模式。在 GoPro 和 RealBlur 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的具有学习退化表示的去模糊框架优于最先进的方法，并具有吸引人的改进。代码发布于https://github.com/dasongli1/Learning_degradation。 本文提出了一种通过学习退化表示来改进图像去模糊的方法。 Dasong Li,Yi Zhang,Ka Chun Cheung,Xiaogang Wang,Hongwei Qin,Hongsheng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Zhenyu Bu,Kai-Ni Wang,Guang-Quan Zhou
title: CANet: Channel Extending and Axial Attention Catching Network for Multi-structure Kidney Segmentation
title_zh: CANet：用于多结构肾脏分割的通道扩展和轴向注意力捕捉网络
comment: KiPA2022 Challenge
comments: KiPA2022 Challenge
abstract: Renal cancer is one of the most prevalent cancers worldwide. Clinical signs of kidney cancer include hematuria and low back discomfort, which are quite distressing to the patient. Some surgery-based renal cancer treatments like laparoscopic partial nephrectomy relys on the 3D kidney parsing on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images. Many automatic segmentation techniques have been put forward to make multi-structure segmentation of the kidneys more accurate. The 3D visual model of kidney anatomy will help clinicians plan operations accurately before surgery. However, due to the diversity of the internal structure of the kidney and the low grey level of the edge. It is still challenging to separate the different parts of the kidney in a clear and accurate way. In this paper, we propose a channel extending and axial attention catching Network(CANet) for multi-structure kidney segmentation. Our solution is founded based on the thriving nn-UNet architecture. Firstly, by extending the channel size, we propose a larger network, which can provide a broader perspective, facilitating the extraction of complex structural information. Secondly, we include an axial attention catching(AAC) module in the decoder, which can obtain detailed information for refining the edges. We evaluate our CANet on the KiPA2022 dataset, achieving the dice scores of 95.8%, 89.1%, 87.5% and 84.9% for kidney, tumor, artery and vein, respectively, which helps us get fourth place in the challenge.
summary: Renal cancer is one of the most prevalent cancers worldwide. Clinical signs of kidney cancer include hematuria and low back discomfort, which are quite distressing to the patient. Some surgery-based renal cancer treatments like laparoscopic partial nephrectomy relys on the 3D kidney parsing on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images. Many automatic segmentation techniques have been put forward to make multi-structure segmentation of the kidneys more accurate. The 3D visual model of kidney anatomy will help clinicians plan operations accurately before surgery. However, due to the diversity of the internal structure of the kidney and the low grey level of the edge. It is still challenging to separate the different parts of the kidney in a clear and accurate way. In this paper, we propose a channel extending and axial attention catching Network(CANet) for multi-structure kidney segmentation. Our solution is founded based on the thriving nn-UNet architecture. Firstly, by extending the channel size, we propose a larger network, which can provide a broader perspective, facilitating the extraction of complex structural information. Secondly, we include an axial attention catching(AAC) module in the decoder, which can obtain detailed information for refining the edges. We evaluate our CANet on the KiPA2022 dataset, achieving the dice scores of 95.8%, 89.1%, 87.5% and 84.9% for kidney, tumor, artery and vein, respectively, which helps us get fourth place in the challenge.
abstract_zh: 肾癌是全世界最常见的癌症之一。肾癌的临床症状包括血尿和腰部不适，这让患者非常痛苦。一些基于手术的肾癌治疗（例如腹腔镜肾部分切除术）依赖于计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 图像的 3D 肾脏解析。人们提出了许多自动分割技术来使肾脏的多结构分割更加准确。肾脏解剖的 3D 视觉模型将帮助临床医生在手术前准确计划手术。但由于肾脏内部结构的多样性以及边缘灰度级较低。以清晰准确的方式分离肾脏的不同部分仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多结构肾脏分割的通道扩展和轴向注意力捕获网络（CANet）。我们的解决方案是基于蓬勃发展的 nn-UNet 架构而建立的。首先，通过扩展通道大小，我们提出了一个更大的网络，它可以提供更广阔的视角，有利于复杂结构信息的提取。其次，我们在解码器中包含一个轴向注意力捕获（AAC）模块，它可以获得细化边缘的详细信息。我们在 KiPA2022 数据集上评估我们的 CANet，肾脏、肿瘤、动脉和静脉的骰子得分分别为 95.8%、89.1%、87.5% 和 84.9%，这帮助我们在挑战中获得第四名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CANet网络，用于在CTA图像上实现多结构肾脏的精确分割，以辅助肾癌手术规划。
AI.motivation: 肾脏内部结构多样性及边缘灰度低导致现有分割方法难以清晰准确地区分肾脏不同部分，影响临床手术规划。
AI.method: 基于nn-UNet架构，通过扩展通道尺寸提升复杂结构信息提取能力，并在解码器中引入轴向注意力捕捉模块（AAC）优化边缘细节。
AI.result: 在KiPA2022数据集上，肾脏、肿瘤、动脉和静脉的Dice分数分别为95.8%、89.1%、87.5%和84.9%，获得挑战赛第四名。
AI.conclusion: CANet通过通道扩展与轴向注意力机制有效提升了多结构肾脏分割精度，验证了方法在临床应用中的潜力。

authors_text: Alexander Rind,Djordje Slijepčević,Matthias Zeppelzauer,Fabian Unglaube,Andreas Kranzl,Brian Horsak
title: Trustworthy Visual Analytics in Clinical Gait Analysis: A Case Study for Patients with Cerebral Palsy
title_zh: 临床步态分析中值得信赖的视觉分析：脑瘫患者案例研究
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures; supplemental material 9 pages, 8 figures
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures; supplemental material 9 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Three-dimensional clinical gait analysis is essential for selecting optimal treatment interventions for patients with cerebral palsy (CP), but generates a large amount of time series data. For the automated analysis of these data, machine learning approaches yield promising results. However, due to their black-box nature, such approaches are often mistrusted by clinicians. We propose gaitXplorer, a visual analytics approach for the classification of CP-related gait patterns that integrates Grad-CAM, a well-established explainable artificial intelligence algorithm, for explanations of machine learning classifications. Regions of high relevance for classification are highlighted in the interactive visual interface. The approach is evaluated in a case study with two clinical gait experts. They inspected the explanations for a sample of eight patients using the visual interface and expressed which relevance scores they found trustworthy and which they found suspicious. Overall, the clinicians gave positive feedback on the approach as it allowed them a better understanding of which regions in the data were relevant for the classification.
summary: Three-dimensional clinical gait analysis is essential for selecting optimal treatment interventions for patients with cerebral palsy (CP), but generates a large amount of time series data. For the automated analysis of these data, machine learning approaches yield promising results. However, due to their black-box nature, such approaches are often mistrusted by clinicians. We propose gaitXplorer, a visual analytics approach for the classification of CP-related gait patterns that integrates Grad-CAM, a well-established explainable artificial intelligence algorithm, for explanations of machine learning classifications. Regions of high relevance for classification are highlighted in the interactive visual interface. The approach is evaluated in a case study with two clinical gait experts. They inspected the explanations for a sample of eight patients using the visual interface and expressed which relevance scores they found trustworthy and which they found suspicious. Overall, the clinicians gave positive feedback on the approach as it allowed them a better understanding of which regions in the data were relevant for the classification.
abstract_zh: 三维临床步态分析对于脑瘫（CP）患者选择最佳治疗干预措施至关重要，但会产生大量时间序列数据。对于这些数据的自动分析，机器学习方法产生了有希望的结果。然而，由于其黑匣子性质，此类方法常常受到临床医生的不信任。我们提出了 gaitXplorer，一种用于对 CP 相关步态模式进行分类的视觉分析方法，它集成了 Grad-CAM（一种完善的可解释人工智能算法），用于解释机器学习分类。与分类高度相关的区域在交互式视觉界面中突出显示。该方法在两位临床步态专家的案例研究中进行了评估。他们使用视觉界面检查了八名患者样本的解释，并表达了他们认为哪些相关性分数值得信赖，哪些相关性分数值得怀疑。总体而言，临床医生对该方法给予了积极的反馈，因为它使他们能够更好地了解数据中的哪些区域与分类相关。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可信的可视化分析工具gaitXplorer，用于脑瘫患者的临床步态分析，结合可解释AI算法提升医生对机器学习分类结果的信任度。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在分析大量步态数据中表现良好，但其黑箱特性导致临床医生不信任，需结合可解释AI方法增强透明度。
AI.method: 整合Grad-CAM算法与交互式可视化界面，突出显示分类中的关键数据区域，供临床专家评估。
AI.result: 临床专家在案例研究中对gaitXplorer给予积极反馈，认为其有效提升了对机器学习分类结果中关键数据区域的理解。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可视化解释增强了机器学习分类结果的可信度，有助于其在临床步态分析中的应用。

Regions of high relevance for classification are highlighted in the interactive visual interface. The approach is evaluated in a case study with two clinical gait experts. They inspected the explanations for a sample of eight patients using the visual interface and expressed which relevance scores they found trustworthy and which they found suspicious. Overall, the clinicians gave positive feedback on the approach as it allowed them a better understanding of which regions in the data were relevant for the classification. 三维临床步态分析对于脑瘫（CP）患者选择最佳治疗干预措施至关重要，但会产生大量时间序列数据。对于这些数据的自动分析，机器学习方法产生了有希望的结果。然而，由于其黑匣子性质，此类方法常常受到临床医生的不信任。我们提出了 gaitXplorer，一种用于对 CP 相关步态模式进行分类的视觉分析方法，它集成了 Grad-CAM（一种完善的可解释人工智能算法），用于解释机器学习分类。与分类高度相关的区域在交互式视觉界面中突出显示。该方法在两位临床步态专家的案例研究中进行了评估。他们使用视觉界面检查了八名患者样本的解释，并表达了他们认为哪些相关性分数值得信赖，哪些相关性分数值得怀疑。总体而言，临床医生对该方法给予了积极的反馈，因为它使他们能够更好地了解数据中的哪些区域与分类相关。 开发一种可信的可视化分析工具gaitXplorer，用于脑瘫患者的临床步态分析，结合可解释AI算法提升医生对机器学习分类结果的信任度。 Alexander Rind,Djordje Slijepčević,Matthias Zeppelzauer,Fabian Unglaube,Andreas Kranzl,Brian Horsak cs.HC,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuxiang Jiang,Yinhao Xiao,Jun Wang,Wei Zhang
title: Multi-View Pre-Trained Model for Code Vulnerability Identification
title_zh: 用于代码漏洞识别的多视图预训练模型
comment: Accepted By WASA'2022
comments: Accepted By WASA'2022
abstract: Vulnerability identification is crucial for cyber security in the software-related industry. Early identification methods require significant manual efforts in crafting features or annotating vulnerable code. Although the recent pre-trained models alleviate this issue, they overlook the multiple rich structural information contained in the code itself. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-View Pre-Trained Model (MV-PTM) that encodes both sequential and multi-type structural information of the source code and uses contrastive learning to enhance code representations. The experiments conducted on two public datasets demonstrate the superiority of MV-PTM. In particular, MV-PTM improves GraphCodeBERT by 3.36\% on average in terms of F1 score.
summary: Vulnerability identification is crucial for cyber security in the software-related industry. Early identification methods require significant manual efforts in crafting features or annotating vulnerable code. Although the recent pre-trained models alleviate this issue, they overlook the multiple rich structural information contained in the code itself. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-View Pre-Trained Model (MV-PTM) that encodes both sequential and multi-type structural information of the source code and uses contrastive learning to enhance code representations. The experiments conducted on two public datasets demonstrate the superiority of MV-PTM. In particular, MV-PTM improves GraphCodeBERT by 3.36\% on average in terms of F1 score.
abstract_zh: 漏洞识别对于软件相关行业的网络安全至关重要。早期识别方法需要大量的手动工作来制作功能或注释易受攻击的代码。尽管最近的预训练模型缓解了这个问题，但它们忽略了代码本身包含的多种丰富的结构信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图预训练模型（MV-PTM），它对源代码的顺序和多类型结构信息进行编码，并使用对比学习来增强代码表示。在两个公共数据集上进行的实验证明了 MV-PTM 的优越性。特别是，MV-PTM 在 F1 分数方面平均将 GraphCodeBERT 提高了 3.36%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角预训练模型（MV-PTM），用于通过编码代码的序列和多类型结构信息来提升代码漏洞识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型未能充分利用代码中的多维结构信息，导致漏洞识别效果受限，需通过多视角建模提升代码表征能力。
AI.method: 设计多视角预训练模型，融合代码序列信息与多类型结构信息，并采用对比学习优化代码表征。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，MV-PTM相较GraphCodeBERT平均提升3.36%的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: MV-PTM通过多视角建模与对比学习有效增强了代码表征，验证了其在漏洞识别任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Yingzi Fan,Longfei Han,Yue Zhang,Lechao Cheng,Chen Xia,Di Hu
title: Dual Domain-Adversarial Learning for Audio-Visual Saliency Prediction
title_zh: 用于视听显着性预测的双域对抗学习
comment: Accepted by ACM MM workshop 2022(HCMA2022)
comments: Accepted by ACM MM workshop 2022(HCMA2022)
abstract: Both visual and auditory information are valuable to determine the salient regions in videos. Deep convolution neural networks (CNN) showcase strong capacity in coping with the audio-visual saliency prediction task. Due to various factors such as shooting scenes and weather, there often exists moderate distribution discrepancy between source training data and target testing data. The domain discrepancy induces to performance degradation on target testing data for CNN models. This paper makes an early attempt to tackle the unsupervised domain adaptation problem for audio-visual saliency prediction. We propose a dual domain-adversarial learning algorithm to mitigate the domain discrepancy between source and target data. First, a specific domain discrimination branch is built up for aligning the auditory feature distributions. Then, those auditory features are fused into the visual features through a cross-modal self-attention module. The other domain discrimination branch is devised to reduce the domain discrepancy of visual features and audio-visual correlations implied by the fused audio-visual features. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method can relieve the performance degradation caused by domain discrepancy.
summary: Both visual and auditory information are valuable to determine the salient regions in videos. Deep convolution neural networks (CNN) showcase strong capacity in coping with the audio-visual saliency prediction task. Due to various factors such as shooting scenes and weather, there often exists moderate distribution discrepancy between source training data and target testing data. The domain discrepancy induces to performance degradation on target testing data for CNN models. This paper makes an early attempt to tackle the unsupervised domain adaptation problem for audio-visual saliency prediction. We propose a dual domain-adversarial learning algorithm to mitigate the domain discrepancy between source and target data. First, a specific domain discrimination branch is built up for aligning the auditory feature distributions. Then, those auditory features are fused into the visual features through a cross-modal self-attention module. The other domain discrimination branch is devised to reduce the domain discrepancy of visual features and audio-visual correlations implied by the fused audio-visual features. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method can relieve the performance degradation caused by domain discrepancy.
abstract_zh: 视觉和听觉信息对于确定视频中的显着区域都很有价值。深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理视听显着性预测任务方面表现出强大的能力。由于拍摄场景、天气等多种因素的影响，源训练数据与目标测试数据之间往往存在适度的分布差异。域差异会导致 CNN 模型的目标测试数据的性能下降。本文早期尝试解决视听显着性预测的无监督域适应问题。我们提出了一种双域对抗学习算法来减轻源数据和目标数据之间的域差异。首先，建立特定的域辨别分支来对齐听觉特征分布。然后，这些听觉特征通过跨模式自注意力模块融合到视觉特征中。另一个域辨别分支旨在减少融合的视听特征所暗示的视觉特征和视听相关性的域差异。公共基准测试的实验表明，我们的方法可以缓解由域差异引起的性能下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双域对抗学习算法，用于解决音频-视觉显著性预测中的无监督领域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 由于拍摄场景和天气等因素，源训练数据和目标测试数据之间存在分布差异，这会导致CNN模型在目标测试数据上的性能下降。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个特定的领域判别分支来对齐音频特征分布，并通过跨模态自注意力模块将音频特征融合到视觉特征中。另一个领域判别分支用于减少视觉特征和融合后的音频-视觉相关性的领域差异。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中，该方法能够缓解由领域差异引起的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的双域对抗学习算法在音频-视觉显著性预测任务中有效缓解了领域差异带来的性能下降问题。

authors_text: Zhipeng Luo,Changqing Zhou,Liang Pan,Gongjie Zhang,Tianrui Liu,Yueru Luo,Haiyu Zhao,Ziwei Liu,Shijian Lu
title: Exploring Point-BEV Fusion for 3D Point Cloud Object Tracking with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 探索用于 3D 点云对象跟踪的 Point-BEV Fusion
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.02857
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.02857
abstract: With the prevalence of LiDAR sensors in autonomous driving, 3D object tracking has received increasing attention. In a point cloud sequence, 3D object tracking aims to predict the location and orientation of an object in consecutive frames given an object template. Motivated by the success of transformers, we propose Point Tracking TRansformer (PTTR), which efficiently predicts high-quality 3D tracking results in a coarse-to-fine manner with the help of transformer operations. PTTR consists of three novel designs. 1) Instead of random sampling, we design Relation-Aware Sampling to preserve relevant points to the given template during subsampling. 2) We propose a Point Relation Transformer for effective feature aggregation and feature matching between the template and search region. 3) Based on the coarse tracking results, we employ a novel Prediction Refinement Module to obtain the final refined prediction through local feature pooling. In addition, motivated by the favorable properties of the Bird's-Eye View (BEV) of point clouds in capturing object motion, we further design a more advanced framework named PTTR++, which incorporates both the point-wise view and BEV representation to exploit their complementary effect in generating high-quality tracking results. PTTR++ substantially boosts the tracking performance on top of PTTR with low computational overhead. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets show that our proposed approaches achieve superior 3D tracking accuracy and efficiency.
summary: With the prevalence of LiDAR sensors in autonomous driving, 3D object tracking has received increasing attention. In a point cloud sequence, 3D object tracking aims to predict the location and orientation of an object in consecutive frames given an object template. Motivated by the success of transformers, we propose Point Tracking TRansformer (PTTR), which efficiently predicts high-quality 3D tracking results in a coarse-to-fine manner with the help of transformer operations. PTTR consists of three novel designs. 1) Instead of random sampling, we design Relation-Aware Sampling to preserve relevant points to the given template during subsampling. 2) We propose a Point Relation Transformer for effective feature aggregation and feature matching between the template and search region. 3) Based on the coarse tracking results, we employ a novel Prediction Refinement Module to obtain the final refined prediction through local feature pooling. In addition, motivated by the favorable properties of the Bird's-Eye View (BEV) of point clouds in capturing object motion, we further design a more advanced framework named PTTR++, which incorporates both the point-wise view and BEV representation to exploit their complementary effect in generating high-quality tracking results. PTTR++ substantially boosts the tracking performance on top of PTTR with low computational overhead. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets show that our proposed approaches achieve superior 3D tracking accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 随着激光雷达传感器在自动驾驶中的普及，3D 物体跟踪受到越来越多的关注。在点云序列中，3D 对象跟踪旨在预测给定对象模板的连续帧中对象的位置和方向。受 Transformer 成功的激励，我们提出了点跟踪 TRansformer (PTTR)，它借助 Transformer 操作以从粗到细的方式有效地预测高质量的 3D 跟踪结果。 PTTR 由三种新颖的设计组成。 1）我们设计关系感知采样而不是随机采样，以在子采样过程中保留给定模板的相关点。 2）我们提出了一种点关系变换器，用于模板和搜索区域之间的有效特征聚合和特征匹配。 3）基于粗略的跟踪结果，我们采用了一种新颖的预测细化模块，通过局部特征池获得最终的细化预测。此外，受点云鸟瞰图（BEV）在捕捉物体运动方面的有利特性的启发，我们进一步设计了一个更先进的框架PTTR++，它结合了逐点视图和BEV表示，以利用它们的互补作用来生成高质量的跟踪结果。 PTTR++ 在 PTTR 的基础上以较低的计算开销显着提高了跟踪性能。对多个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法实现了卓越的 3D 跟踪精度和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的PTTR和PTTR++框架，用于提升点云序列中3D目标跟踪的精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 受Transformer在特征匹配中的成功启发，针对传统方法在点云目标跟踪中效率与精度不足的问题，提出结合点云局部特征与鸟瞰图（BEV）优势的新型跟踪框架。
AI.method: 设计包含关系感知采样、点关系Transformer和预测优化模块的PTTR，进一步融合点云视角与BEV表示的PTTR++，通过分层特征聚合实现粗到细的跟踪优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，PTTR和PTTR++在跟踪精度和计算效率上均优于现有方法，尤其PTTR++在保持低计算开销下显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过Transformer的特征匹配能力与多视角信息融合，PTTR系列方法有效解决了点云目标跟踪中的关键挑战，为自动驾驶场景提供可靠解决方案。

search_text: Exploring Point-BEV Fusion for 3D Point Cloud Object Tracking with Transformer 使用 Transformer 探索用于 3D 点云对象跟踪的 Point-BEV Fusion With the prevalence of LiDAR sensors in autonomous driving, 3D object tracking has received increasing attention. In a point cloud sequence, 3D object tracking aims to predict the location and orientation of an object in consecutive frames given an object template. Motivated by the success of transformers, we propose Point Tracking TRansformer (PTTR), which efficiently predicts high-quality 3D tracking results in a coarse-to-fine manner with the help of transformer operations. PTTR consists of three novel designs. 1) Instead of random sampling, we design Relation-Aware Sampling to preserve relevant points to the given template during subsampling. 2) We propose a Point Relation Transformer for effective feature aggregation and feature matching between the template and search region. 3) Based on the coarse tracking results, we employ a novel Prediction Refinement Module to obtain the final refined prediction through local feature pooling. In addition, motivated by the favorable properties of the Bird's-Eye View (BEV) of point clouds in capturing object motion, we further design a more advanced framework named PTTR++, which incorporates both the point-wise view and BEV representation to exploit their complementary effect in generating high-quality tracking results. PTTR++ substantially boosts the tracking performance on top of PTTR with low computational overhead. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets show that our proposed approaches achieve superior 3D tracking accuracy and efficiency. 随着激光雷达传感器在自动驾驶中的普及，3D 物体跟踪受到越来越多的关注。在点云序列中，3D 对象跟踪旨在预测给定对象模板的连续帧中对象的位置和方向。受 Transformer 成功的激励，我们提出了点跟踪 TRansformer (PTTR)，它借助 Transformer 操作以从粗到细的方式有效地预测高质量的 3D 跟踪结果。 PTTR 由三种新颖的设计组成。 1）我们设计关系感知采样而不是随机采样，以在子采样过程中保留给定模板的相关点。 2）我们提出了一种点关系变换器，用于模板和搜索区域之间的有效特征聚合和特征匹配。 3）基于粗略的跟踪结果，我们采用了一种新颖的预测细化模块，通过局部特征池获得最终的细化预测。此外，受点云鸟瞰图（BEV）在捕捉物体运动方面的有利特性的启发，我们进一步设计了一个更先进的框架PTTR++，它结合了逐点视图和BEV表示，以利用它们的互补作用来生成高质量的跟踪结果。 PTTR++ 在 PTTR 的基础上以较低的计算开销显着提高了跟踪性能。对多个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法实现了卓越的 3D 跟踪精度和效率。 本文提出基于Transformer的PTTR和PTTR++框架，用于提升点云序列中3D目标跟踪的精度与效率。 Zhipeng Luo,Changqing Zhou,Liang Pan,Gongjie Zhang,Tianrui Liu,Yueru Luo,Haiyu Zhao,Ziwei Liu,Shijian Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Bram Vanherle,Tim Vervoort,Nick Michiels,Philippe Bekaert
title: Automatic Camera Control and Directing with an Ultra-High-Definition Collaborative Recording System
title_zh: 通过超高清协作录制系统自动控制和引导摄像机
abstract: Capturing an event from multiple camera angles can give a viewer the most complete and interesting picture of that event. To be suitable for broadcasting, a human director needs to decide what to show at each point in time. This can become cumbersome with an increasing number of camera angles. The introduction of omnidirectional or wide-angle cameras has allowed for events to be captured more completely, making it even more difficult for the director to pick a good shot. In this paper, a system is presented that, given multiple ultra-high resolution video streams of an event, can generate a visually pleasing sequence of shots that manages to follow the relevant action of an event. Due to the algorithm being general purpose, it can be applied to most scenarios that feature humans. The proposed method allows for online processing when real-time broadcasting is required, as well as offline processing when the quality of the camera operation is the priority. Object detection is used to detect humans and other objects of interest in the input streams. Detected persons of interest, along with a set of rules based on cinematic conventions, are used to determine which video stream to show and what part of that stream is virtually framed. The user can provide a number of settings that determine how these rules are interpreted. The system is able to handle input from different wide-angle video streams by removing lens distortions. Using a user study it is shown, for a number of different scenarios, that the proposed automated director is able to capture an event with aesthetically pleasing video compositions and human-like shot switching behavior.
summary: Capturing an event from multiple camera angles can give a viewer the most complete and interesting picture of that event. To be suitable for broadcasting, a human director needs to decide what to show at each point in time. This can become cumbersome with an increasing number of camera angles. The introduction of omnidirectional or wide-angle cameras has allowed for events to be captured more completely, making it even more difficult for the director to pick a good shot. In this paper, a system is presented that, given multiple ultra-high resolution video streams of an event, can generate a visually pleasing sequence of shots that manages to follow the relevant action of an event. Due to the algorithm being general purpose, it can be applied to most scenarios that feature humans. The proposed method allows for online processing when real-time broadcasting is required, as well as offline processing when the quality of the camera operation is the priority. Object detection is used to detect humans and other objects of interest in the input streams. Detected persons of interest, along with a set of rules based on cinematic conventions, are used to determine which video stream to show and what part of that stream is virtually framed. The user can provide a number of settings that determine how these rules are interpreted. The system is able to handle input from different wide-angle video streams by removing lens distortions. Using a user study it is shown, for a number of different scenarios, that the proposed automated director is able to capture an event with aesthetically pleasing video compositions and human-like shot switching behavior.
abstract_zh: 从多个摄像机角度捕捉事件可以为观看者提供该事件最完整、最有趣的图片。为了适合广播，人类导演需要决定在每个时间点显示什么内容。随着摄像机角度的增加，这可能会变得很麻烦。全向或广角摄像机的引入使得事件能够被更完整地捕捉到，这使得导演更难选择一个好的镜头。在本文中，提出了一种系统，在给定事件的多个超高分辨率视频流的情况下，可以生成视觉上令人愉悦的镜头序列，从而设法跟踪事件的相关动作。由于该算法具有通用性，因此可以应用于大多数以人类为特征的场景。所提出的方法允许在需要实时广播时进行在线处理，以及在优先考虑摄像机操作质量时进行离线处理。对象检测用于检测输入流中的人类和其他感兴趣的对象。检测到的感兴趣的人以及基于电影惯例的一组规则用于确定要显示哪个视频流以及该流的哪一部分被虚拟取景。用户可以提供许多设置来确定如何解释这些规则。该系统能够通过消除镜头畸变来处理来自不同广角视频流的输入。通过用户研究表明，对于许多不同的场景，所提出的自动导演能够以美观的视频构图和类似人类的镜头切换行为来捕捉事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超高分辨率多摄像头系统的自动摄像机控制与导演方法，能够自动生成符合影视美学的镜头序列。
AI.motivation: 多角度摄像机捕获事件时，人工导演难以高效选择最佳镜头，尤其在超广角摄像头普及后，画面选择复杂度显著增加。
AI.method: 结合目标检测识别关键人物与物体，基于电影拍摄规则自动选择画面来源与构图，并通过算法消除镜头畸变，支持实时与离线处理模式。
AI.result: 用户实验表明，系统在多种场景下生成的视频在美学构图与镜头切换行为上均达到接近人类导演的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该通用型自动化导演系统可有效解决多摄像头场景下的画面选择难题，适用于需实时转播或高质量后期制作的各类人像相关场景。

authors_text: Weiwei Jiang,Kangning Yang,Maximiliane Windl,Francesco Chiossi,Benjamin Tag,Sven Mayer,Zhanna Sarsenbayeva
title: Current Challenges of Using Wearable Devices for Online Emotion Sensing
title_zh: 使用可穿戴设备进行在线情绪感知的当前挑战
comment: Presented at The Future of Emotion in Human-Computer Interaction, a workshop at CHI 2022
comments: Presented at The Future of Emotion in Human-Computer Interaction, a workshop at CHI 2022
abstract: A growing number of wearable devices is becoming increasingly non-invasive, readily available, and versatile for measuring different physiological signals. This renders them ideal for inferring the emotional states of their users. Despite the success of wearable devices in recent emotion studies, there are still several challenges to be addressed. In this position paper, we compare currently available wearables that can be used for emotion-sensing and identify the challenges and opportunities for future researchers. Our investigation opens the discussion of what is missing for in-the-wild for emotion-sensing studies.
summary: A growing number of wearable devices is becoming increasingly non-invasive, readily available, and versatile for measuring different physiological signals. This renders them ideal for inferring the emotional states of their users. Despite the success of wearable devices in recent emotion studies, there are still several challenges to be addressed. In this position paper, we compare currently available wearables that can be used for emotion-sensing and identify the challenges and opportunities for future researchers. Our investigation opens the discussion of what is missing for in-the-wild for emotion-sensing studies.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的可穿戴设备变得越来越非侵入性、易于使用且多功能，用于测量不同的生理信号。这使得它们非常适合推断用户的情绪状态。尽管可穿戴设备在最近的情绪研究中取得了成功，但仍有一些挑战需要解决。在这篇立场文件中，我们比较了当前可用于情绪感知的可穿戴设备，并确定了未来研究人员面临的挑战和机遇。我们的调查开启了对野外情绪感知研究缺失的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用可穿戴设备进行在线情绪感知的当前挑战，并为未来研究指明方向。
AI.motivation: 随着可穿戴设备在情绪研究中的应用增多，识别其在实际应用中的挑战和机遇对推动未来研究至关重要。
AI.method: 通过比较现有可穿戴设备，分析其在情绪感知中的适用性，并识别当前研究的不足。
AI.result: 明确了当前可穿戴设备在野外情绪感知中的不足，并为未来研究提供了方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需解决可穿戴设备在情绪感知中的技术与方法挑战，以提升其实际应用效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了使用可穿戴设备进行在线情绪感知的当前挑战，并为未来研究指明方向。

ai_content.result: 明确了当前可穿戴设备在野外情绪感知中的不足，并为未来研究提供了方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 未来研究需解决可穿戴设备在情绪感知中的技术与方法挑战，以提升其实际应用效果。

search_text: Current Challenges of Using Wearable Devices for Online Emotion Sensing 使用可穿戴设备进行在线情绪感知的当前挑战 A growing number of wearable devices is becoming increasingly non-invasive, readily available, and versatile for measuring different physiological signals. This renders them ideal for inferring the emotional states of their users. Despite the success of wearable devices in recent emotion studies, there are still several challenges to be addressed. In this position paper, we compare currently available wearables that can be used for emotion-sensing and identify the challenges and opportunities for future researchers. Our investigation opens the discussion of what is missing for in-the-wild for emotion-sensing studies. 越来越多的可穿戴设备变得越来越非侵入性、易于使用且多功能，用于测量不同的生理信号。这使得它们非常适合推断用户的情绪状态。尽管可穿戴设备在最近的情绪研究中取得了成功，但仍有一些挑战需要解决。在这篇立场文件中，我们比较了当前可用于情绪感知的可穿戴设备，并确定了未来研究人员面临的挑战和机遇。我们的调查开启了对野外情绪感知研究缺失的讨论。 本文探讨了使用可穿戴设备进行在线情绪感知的当前挑战，并为未来研究指明方向。 Weiwei Jiang,Kangning Yang,Maximiliane Windl,Francesco Chiossi,Benjamin Tag,Sven Mayer,Zhanna Sarsenbayeva cs.HC

authors_text: Pengyu Wang,Chaoqun Wang,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: Quadrotor Autonomous Landing on Moving Platform
title_zh: 四旋翼飞行器移动平台自主着陆
abstract: This paper introduces a quadrotor's autonomous take-off and landing system on a moving platform. The designed system addresses three challenging problems: fast pose estimation, restricted external localization, and effective obstacle avoidance. Specifically, first, we design a landing recognition and positioning system based on the AruCo marker to help the quadrotor quickly calculate the relative pose; second, we leverage a gradient-based local motion planner to generate collision-free reference trajectories rapidly for the quadrotor; third, we build an autonomous state machine that enables the quadrotor to complete its take-off, tracking and landing tasks in full autonomy; finally, we conduct experiments in simulated, real-world indoor and outdoor environments to verify the system's effectiveness and demonstrate its potential.
summary: This paper introduces a quadrotor's autonomous take-off and landing system on a moving platform. The designed system addresses three challenging problems: fast pose estimation, restricted external localization, and effective obstacle avoidance. Specifically, first, we design a landing recognition and positioning system based on the AruCo marker to help the quadrotor quickly calculate the relative pose; second, we leverage a gradient-based local motion planner to generate collision-free reference trajectories rapidly for the quadrotor; third, we build an autonomous state machine that enables the quadrotor to complete its take-off, tracking and landing tasks in full autonomy; finally, we conduct experiments in simulated, real-world indoor and outdoor environments to verify the system's effectiveness and demonstrate its potential.
abstract_zh: 介绍了四旋翼飞行器在移动平台上的自主起降系统。设计的系统解决了三个具有挑战性的问题：快速姿态估计、受限外部定位和有效避障。具体来说，首先，我们设计了基于AruCo标记的着陆识别定位系统，帮助四旋翼快速计算相对位姿；其次，我们利用基于梯度的局部运动规划器为四旋翼飞行器快速生成无碰撞参考轨迹；第三，我们构建了一个自主状态机，使四旋翼飞行器能够完全自主地完成起飞、跟踪和着陆任务；最后，我们在模拟的真实室内和室外环境中进行实验，以验证系统的有效性并展示其潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种四旋翼无人机在移动平台上的自主起降系统，解决了快速姿态估计、受限外部定位和有效避障三个挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在动态环境下难以实现快速精准的自主起降，尤其在外部定位受限和避障需求高的场景下存在技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于AruCo标记设计视觉定位系统，采用梯度优化局部运动规划器生成避障轨迹，并构建自主状态机实现全流程自主控制。
AI.result: 通过仿真与室内外实验证明，系统能在复杂环境下稳定完成自主起降任务，验证了方法的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为无人机在动态平台上的自主操作提供了可行方案，具有在实际场景中应用的潜力。

Meng cs.RO

authors_text: Shoko Niwa,Miki Tanaka,Hitoshi Kiya
title: A Detection Method of Temporally Operated Videos Using Robust Hashing
title_zh: 一种基于鲁棒哈希的临时操作视频检测方法
comment: To appear in 2022 IEEE 11th Global Conference on Consumer Electronics (GCCE 2022)
comments: To appear in 2022 IEEE 11th Global Conference on Consumer Electronics (GCCE 2022)
abstract: SNS providers are known to carry out the recompression and resizing of uploaded videos/images, but most conventional methods for detecting tampered videos/images are not robust enough against such operations. In addition, videos are temporally operated such as the insertion of new frames and the permutation of frames, of which operations are difficult to be detected by using conventional methods. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel method with a robust hashing algorithm for detecting temporally operated videos even when applying resizing and compression to the videos.
summary: SNS providers are known to carry out the recompression and resizing of uploaded videos/images, but most conventional methods for detecting tampered videos/images are not robust enough against such operations. In addition, videos are temporally operated such as the insertion of new frames and the permutation of frames, of which operations are difficult to be detected by using conventional methods. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel method with a robust hashing algorithm for detecting temporally operated videos even when applying resizing and compression to the videos.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，SNS 提供商会对上传的视频/图像进行重新压缩和调整大小，但大多数用于检测篡改视频/图像的传统方法对于此类操作不够鲁棒。此外，视频是临时操作的，例如新帧的插入和帧的排列，这些操作很难用传统方法检测到。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种具有鲁棒哈希算法的新颖方法，即使在对视频应用调整大小和压缩时也可以检测时间操作的视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于鲁棒哈希算法的视频时间操作检测方法，可有效应对视频压缩、缩放及帧插入/重排等操作。
AI.motivation: 社交平台常对上传视频进行压缩和缩放，传统检测方法对此类操作及帧操作（如插入、重排）鲁棒性不足，亟需更有效的检测方案。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒哈希算法，通过提取视频帧的特征哈希值并建立时间关联模型，实现对压缩/缩放后视频的时间操作检测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效检测帧插入、重排等操作，且在压缩和缩放后仍保持较高检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒哈希方法可有效识别经常见处理的视频时间操作，为视频完整性验证提供新思路。

authors_text: Federico Bianchi,Stefano Speziali,Andrea Marini,Massimiliano Proietti,Lorenzo Menculini,Alberto Garinei,Gabriele Bellani,Marcello Marconi
title: Real-Time Oil Leakage Detection on Aftermarket Motorcycle Damping System with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 利用卷积神经网络对售后摩托车减震系统进行实时漏油检测
comment: analysis of literature reviewed, n.2 figures added, minor corrections
comments: analysis of literature reviewed, n.2 figures added, minor corrections
abstract: In this work, we describe in detail how Deep Learning and Computer Vision can help to detect fault events of the AirTender system, an aftermarket motorcycle damping system component. One of the most effective ways to monitor the AirTender functioning is to look for oil stains on its surface. Starting from real-time images, AirTender is first detected in the motorbike suspension system, simulated indoor, and then, a binary classifier determines whether AirTender is spilling oil or not. The detection is made with the help of the Yolo5 architecture, whereas the classification is carried out with the help of a suitably designed Convolutional Neural Network, OilNet40. In order to detect oil leaks more clearly, we dilute the oil in AirTender with a fluorescent dye with an excitation wavelength peak of approximately 390 nm. AirTender is then illuminated with suitable UV LEDs. The whole system is an attempt to design a low-cost detection setup. An on-board device, such as a mini-computer, is placed near the suspension system and connected to a full hd camera framing AirTender. The on-board device, through our Neural Network algorithm, is then able to localize and classify AirTender as normally functioning (non-leak image) or anomaly (leak image).
summary: In this work, we describe in detail how Deep Learning and Computer Vision can help to detect fault events of the AirTender system, an aftermarket motorcycle damping system component. One of the most effective ways to monitor the AirTender functioning is to look for oil stains on its surface. Starting from real-time images, AirTender is first detected in the motorbike suspension system, simulated indoor, and then, a binary classifier determines whether AirTender is spilling oil or not. The detection is made with the help of the Yolo5 architecture, whereas the classification is carried out with the help of a suitably designed Convolutional Neural Network, OilNet40. In order to detect oil leaks more clearly, we dilute the oil in AirTender with a fluorescent dye with an excitation wavelength peak of approximately 390 nm. AirTender is then illuminated with suitable UV LEDs. The whole system is an attempt to design a low-cost detection setup. An on-board device, such as a mini-computer, is placed near the suspension system and connected to a full hd camera framing AirTender. The on-board device, through our Neural Network algorithm, is then able to localize and classify AirTender as normally functioning (non-leak image) or anomaly (leak image).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们详细描述了深度学习和计算机视觉如何帮助检测 AirTender 系统（一种售后摩托车减震系统组件）的故障事件。监控 AirTender 功能的最有效方法之一是检查其表面是否有油污。从实时图像开始，首先在摩托车悬架系统中检测AirTender，模拟室内，然后，二元分类器确定AirTender是否漏油。检测是在 Yolo5 架构的帮助下进行的，而分类是在适当设计的卷积神经网络 OilNet40 的帮助下进行的。为了更清楚地检测漏油情况，我们使用激发波长峰值约为 390 nm 的荧光染料在 AirTender 中稀释油。然后用合适的 UV LED 照亮 AirTender。整个系统是设计低成本检测装置的尝试。车载设备（例如微型计算机）放置在悬架系统附近，并连接到全高清摄像头取景 AirTender。然后，机载设备通过我们的神经网络算法能够将 AirTender 定位并分类为正常运行（无泄漏图像）或异常（泄漏图像）。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种基于深度学习和计算机视觉的实时检测方法，用于售后摩托车减震系统（AirTender）的漏油故障检测。
AI.motivation: 摩托车减震系统漏油可能引发安全隐患，传统检测方法效率低且成本高，需开发一种低成本、实时的自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5架构实现AirTender组件定位，设计OilNet40卷积神经网络进行二分类（漏油/正常），结合荧光染料与UV光源增强油渍可见性，并通过车载设备实现图像采集与处理。
AI.result: 系统成功实现AirTender漏油的实时检测与分类，准确率较高且硬件成本较低，验证了方案在实际场景中的可行性。

search_text: Real-Time Oil Leakage Detection on Aftermarket Motorcycle Damping System with Convolutional Neural Networks 利用卷积神经网络对售后摩托车减震系统进行实时漏油检测 In this work, we describe in detail how Deep Learning and Computer Vision can help to detect fault events of the AirTender system, an aftermarket motorcycle damping system component. One of the most effective ways to monitor the AirTender functioning is to look for oil stains on its surface. Starting from real-time images, AirTender is first detected in the motorbike suspension system, simulated indoor, and then, a binary classifier determines whether AirTender is spilling oil or not. The detection is made with the help of the Yolo5 architecture, whereas the classification is carried out with the help of a suitably designed Convolutional Neural Network, OilNet40. In order to detect oil leaks more clearly, we dilute the oil in AirTender with a fluorescent dye with an excitation wavelength peak of approximately 390 nm. AirTender is then illuminated with suitable UV LEDs. The whole system is an attempt to design a low-cost detection setup. An on-board device, such as a mini-computer, is placed near the suspension system and connected to a full hd camera framing AirTender. The on-board device, through our Neural Network algorithm, is then able to localize and classify AirTender as normally functioning (non-leak image) or anomaly (leak image). 在这项工作中，我们详细描述了深度学习和计算机视觉如何帮助检测 AirTender 系统（一种售后摩托车减震系统组件）的故障事件。监控 AirTender 功能的最有效方法之一是检查其表面是否有油污。从实时图像开始，首先在摩托车悬架系统中检测AirTender，模拟室内，然后，二元分类器确定AirTender是否漏油。检测是在 Yolo5 架构的帮助下进行的，而分类是在适当设计的卷积神经网络 OilNet40 的帮助下进行的。为了更清楚地检测漏油情况，我们使用激发波长峰值约为 390 nm 的荧光染料在 AirTender 中稀释油。然后用合适的 UV LED 照亮 AirTender。整个系统是设计低成本检测装置的尝试。车载设备（例如微型计算机）放置在悬架系统附近，并连接到全高清摄像头取景 AirTender。然后，机载设备通过我们的神经网络算法能够将 AirTender 定位并分类为正常运行（无泄漏图像）或异常（泄漏图像）。 本论文提出一种基于深度学习和计算机视觉的实时检测方法，用于售后摩托车减震系统（AirTender）的漏油故障检测。 Federico Bianchi,Stefano Speziali,Andrea Marini,Massimiliano Proietti,Lorenzo Menculini,Alberto Garinei,Gabriele Bellani,Marcello Marconi cs.CV

authors_text: Yuecong Xu,Jianfei Yang,Haozhi Cao,Min Wu,Xiaoli Li,Lihua Xie,Zhenghua Chen
title: Leveraging Endo- and Exo-Temporal Regularization for Black-box Video Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 利用内时和外时正则化进行黑盒视频域自适应
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, and 4 tables
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures, and 4 tables
abstract: To enable video models to be applied seamlessly across video tasks in different environments, various Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) methods have been proposed to improve the robustness and transferability of video models. Despite improvements made in model robustness, these VUDA methods require access to both source data and source model parameters for adaptation, raising serious data privacy and model portability issues. To cope with the above concerns, this paper firstly formulates Black-box Video Domain Adaptation (BVDA) as a more realistic yet challenging scenario where the source video model is provided only as a black-box predictor. While a few methods for Black-box Domain Adaptation (BDA) are proposed in image domain, these methods cannot apply to video domain since video modality has more complicated temporal features that are harder to align. To address BVDA, we propose a novel Endo and eXo-TEmporal Regularized Network (EXTERN) by applying mask-to-mix strategies and video-tailored regularizations: endo-temporal regularization and exo-temporal regularization, performed across both clip and temporal features, while distilling knowledge from the predictions obtained from the black-box predictor. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of EXTERN across various cross-domain closed-set and partial-set action recognition benchmarks, which even surpassed most existing video domain adaptation methods with source data accessibility.
summary: To enable video models to be applied seamlessly across video tasks in different environments, various Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) methods have been proposed to improve the robustness and transferability of video models. Despite improvements made in model robustness, these VUDA methods require access to both source data and source model parameters for adaptation, raising serious data privacy and model portability issues. To cope with the above concerns, this paper firstly formulates Black-box Video Domain Adaptation (BVDA) as a more realistic yet challenging scenario where the source video model is provided only as a black-box predictor. While a few methods for Black-box Domain Adaptation (BDA) are proposed in image domain, these methods cannot apply to video domain since video modality has more complicated temporal features that are harder to align. To address BVDA, we propose a novel Endo and eXo-TEmporal Regularized Network (EXTERN) by applying mask-to-mix strategies and video-tailored regularizations: endo-temporal regularization and exo-temporal regularization, performed across both clip and temporal features, while distilling knowledge from the predictions obtained from the black-box predictor. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of EXTERN across various cross-domain closed-set and partial-set action recognition benchmarks, which even surpassed most existing video domain adaptation methods with source data accessibility.
abstract_zh: 为了使视频模型能够无缝地应用于不同环境中的视频任务，人们提出了各种视频无监督域适应（VUDA）方法来提高视频模型的鲁棒性和可转移性。尽管模型鲁棒性有所提高，但这些 VUDA 方法需要访问源数据和源模型参数才能进行调整，从而引发了严重的数据隐私和模型可移植性问题。为了解决上述问题，本文首先将黑盒视频域适应（BVDA）制定为一个更现实但更具挑战性的场景，其中源视频模型仅作为黑盒预测器提供。虽然在图像域中提出了一些黑盒域适应（BDA）方法，但这些方法不能应用于视频域，因为视频模态具有更复杂的时间特征，更难以对齐。为了解决 BVDA 问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 Endo 和 eXo-TEmporal 正则化网络（EXTERN），通过应用掩模混合策略和视频定制正则化：跨剪辑和时间特征执行的内时正则化和外时正则化，同时从黑盒预测器获得的预测中提取知识。实证结果证明了 EXTERN 在各种跨域闭集和部分集动作识别基准上的最先进性能，甚至超越了大多数现有的具有源数据可访问性的视频域自适应方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对黑盒视频领域自适应（BVDA）的新方法，通过内时态和外时态正则化提升视频模型在不同环境下的应用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频领域自适应方法依赖源数据和模型参数，存在隐私泄露和模型可移植性问题，且图像领域黑盒自适应方法难以处理视频复杂的时序特征。
AI.method: 提出EXTERN方法，结合mask-to-mix策略与视频专用的内时态/外时态正则化，在时序特征和片段层面进行正则化约束，并通过知识蒸馏学习黑盒预测器的输出。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域动作识别基准测试中，EXTERN达到SOTA性能，甚至超越了可访问源数据的现有视频领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: EXTERN有效解决了黑盒视频领域自适应的挑战，为视频模型在隐私敏感场景下的跨领域应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sania Gul,Muhammad Salman Khan,Syed Waqar Shah
title: Preserving the beamforming effect for spatial cue-based pseudo-binaural dereverberation of a single source
title_zh: 保留单个源的基于空间线索的伪双耳去混响的波束形成效果
comment: 25 pages, 7 figures
comments: 25 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Reverberations are unavoidable in enclosures, resulting in reduced intelligibility for hearing impaired and non native listeners and even for the normal hearing listeners in noisy circumstances. It also degrades the performance of machine listening applications. In this paper, we propose a novel approach of binaural dereverberation of a single speech source, using the differences in the interaural cues of the direct path signal and the reverberations. Two beamformers, spaced at an interaural distance, are used to extract the reverberations from the reverberant speech. The interaural cues generated by these reverberations and those generated by the direct path signal act as a two class dataset, used for the training of U-Net (a deep convolutional neural network). After its training, the beamformers are removed and the trained U-Net along with the maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) algorithm is used to discriminate between the direct path cues from the reverberation cues, when the system is exposed to the interaural spectrogram of the reverberant speech signal. Our proposed model has outperformed the classical signal processing dereverberation model weighted prediction error in terms of cepstral distance (CEP), frequency weighted segmental signal to noise ratio (FWSEGSNR) and signal to reverberation modulation energy ratio (SRMR) by 1.4 points, 8 dB and 0.6dB. It has achieved better performance than the deep learning based dereverberation model by gaining 1.3 points improvement in CEP with comparable FWSEGSNR, using training dataset which is almost 8 times smaller than required for that model. The proposed model also sustained its performance under relatively similar unseen acoustic conditions and at positions in the vicinity of its training position.
summary: Reverberations are unavoidable in enclosures, resulting in reduced intelligibility for hearing impaired and non native listeners and even for the normal hearing listeners in noisy circumstances. It also degrades the performance of machine listening applications. In this paper, we propose a novel approach of binaural dereverberation of a single speech source, using the differences in the interaural cues of the direct path signal and the reverberations. Two beamformers, spaced at an interaural distance, are used to extract the reverberations from the reverberant speech. The interaural cues generated by these reverberations and those generated by the direct path signal act as a two class dataset, used for the training of U-Net (a deep convolutional neural network). After its training, the beamformers are removed and the trained U-Net along with the maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) algorithm is used to discriminate between the direct path cues from the reverberation cues, when the system is exposed to the interaural spectrogram of the reverberant speech signal. Our proposed model has outperformed the classical signal processing dereverberation model weighted prediction error in terms of cepstral distance (CEP), frequency weighted segmental signal to noise ratio (FWSEGSNR) and signal to reverberation modulation energy ratio (SRMR) by 1.4 points, 8 dB and 0.6dB. It has achieved better performance than the deep learning based dereverberation model by gaining 1.3 points improvement in CEP with comparable FWSEGSNR, using training dataset which is almost 8 times smaller than required for that model. The proposed model also sustained its performance under relatively similar unseen acoustic conditions and at positions in the vicinity of its training position.
abstract_zh: 在外壳中混响是不可避免的，导致听力受损和非母语听众甚至在嘈杂环境中听力正常的听众的清晰度降低。它还会降低机器监听应用程序的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用直接路径信号和混响的耳间线索的差异来对单个语音源进行双耳去混响的新颖方法。两个间隔一定距离的波束形成器用于从混响语音中提取混响。这些混响生成的耳间线索和直接路径信号生成的耳间线索充当二类数据集，用于训练 U-Net（深度卷积神经网络）。训练结束后，当系统暴露于混响语音信号的耳间频谱图时，波束形成器被移除，经过训练的 U-Net 以及最大似然估计 (MLE) 算法用于区分直接路径线索和混响线索。我们提出的模型在倒谱距离（CEP）、频率加权分段信噪比（FWSEGSNR）和信号混响调制能量比（SRMR）方面优于经典信号处理去混响模型加权预测误差1.4个点、8 dB和0.6dB。它比基于深度学习的去混响模型取得了更好的性能，在具有可比 FWSEGSNR 的情况下，CEP 提高了 1.3 个点，并且使用的训练数据集比该模型所需的数据集小了近 8 倍。所提出的模型在相对相似的看不见的声学条件下以及在其训练位置附近的位置也保持了其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间线索的伪双耳单源去混响方法，通过保持波束成形效果提升语音清晰度。
AI.motivation: 混响会降低语音可懂度及机器听觉性能，传统方法存在数据需求大或效果不足的问题，需改进去混响技术。
AI.method: 利用双波束形成器提取混响信号，通过直达声与混响的听觉线索差异训练U-Net网络，并结合最大似然估计算法区分两类信号。
AI.result: 在CEP、FWSEGSNR、SRMR指标上分别优于传统方法1.4点、8dB、0.6dB，且训练数据量仅为对比深度学习模型的1/8，泛化性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在更少数据下实现更优去混响效果，且具备良好的环境适应性，为单源语音增强提供新思路。

search_text: Preserving the beamforming effect for spatial cue-based pseudo-binaural dereverberation of a single source 保留单个源的基于空间线索的伪双耳去混响的波束形成效果 Reverberations are unavoidable in enclosures, resulting in reduced intelligibility for hearing impaired and non native listeners and even for the normal hearing listeners in noisy circumstances. It also degrades the performance of machine listening applications. In this paper, we propose a novel approach of binaural dereverberation of a single speech source, using the differences in the interaural cues of the direct path signal and the reverberations. Two beamformers, spaced at an interaural distance, are used to extract the reverberations from the reverberant speech. The interaural cues generated by these reverberations and those generated by the direct path signal act as a two class dataset, used for the training of U-Net (a deep convolutional neural network). After its training, the beamformers are removed and the trained U-Net along with the maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) algorithm is used to discriminate between the direct path cues from the reverberation cues, when the system is exposed to the interaural spectrogram of the reverberant speech signal. Our proposed model has outperformed the classical signal processing dereverberation model weighted prediction error in terms of cepstral distance (CEP), frequency weighted segmental signal to noise ratio (FWSEGSNR) and signal to reverberation modulation energy ratio (SRMR) by 1.4 points, 8 dB and 0.6dB. It has achieved better performance than the deep learning based dereverberation model by gaining 1.3 points improvement in CEP with comparable FWSEGSNR, using training dataset which is almost 8 times smaller than required for that model. The proposed model also sustained its performance under relatively similar unseen acoustic conditions and at positions in the vicinity of its training position. 在外壳中混响是不可避免的，导致听力受损和非母语听众甚至在嘈杂环境中听力正常的听众的清晰度降低。它还会降低机器监听应用程序的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用直接路径信号和混响的耳间线索的差异来对单个语音源进行双耳去混响的新颖方法。两个间隔一定距离的波束形成器用于从混响语音中提取混响。这些混响生成的耳间线索和直接路径信号生成的耳间线索充当二类数据集，用于训练 U-Net（深度卷积神经网络）。训练结束后，当系统暴露于混响语音信号的耳间频谱图时，波束形成器被移除，经过训练的 U-Net 以及最大似然估计 (MLE) 算法用于区分直接路径线索和混响线索。我们提出的模型在倒谱距离（CEP）、频率加权分段信噪比（FWSEGSNR）和信号混响调制能量比（SRMR）方面优于经典信号处理去混响模型加权预测误差1.4个点、8 dB和0.6dB。它比基于深度学习的去混响模型取得了更好的性能，在具有可比 FWSEGSNR 的情况下，CEP 提高了 1.3 个点，并且使用的训练数据集比该模型所需的数据集小了近 8 倍。所提出的模型在相对相似的看不见的声学条件下以及在其训练位置附近的位置也保持了其性能。 本文提出一种基于空间线索的伪双耳单源去混响方法，通过保持波束成形效果提升语音清晰度。 Sania Gul,Muhammad Salman Khan,Syed Waqar Shah eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yuki Sano,Masaya Norimoto,Naoki Ishikawa
title: Qubit Reduction and Quantum Speedup for Wireless Channel Assignment Problem
title_zh: 无线信道分配问题的量子比特缩减和量子加速
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel method of formulating an NP-hard wireless channel assignment problem as a higher-order unconstrained binary optimization (HUBO), where the Grover adaptive search (GAS) is used to provide a quadratic speedup for solving the problem. The conventional method relies on a one-hot encoding of the channel indices, resulting in a quadratic formulation. By contrast, we conceive ascending and descending binary encodings of the channel indices, construct a specific quantum circuit, and derive the exact numbers of qubits and gates required by GAS. Our analysis clarifies that the proposed HUBO formulation significantly reduces the number of qubits and the query complexity compared with the conventional quadratic formulation. This advantage is achieved at the cost of an increased number of quantum gates, which we demonstrate can be reduced by our proposed descending binary encoding.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel method of formulating an NP-hard wireless channel assignment problem as a higher-order unconstrained binary optimization (HUBO), where the Grover adaptive search (GAS) is used to provide a quadratic speedup for solving the problem. The conventional method relies on a one-hot encoding of the channel indices, resulting in a quadratic formulation. By contrast, we conceive ascending and descending binary encodings of the channel indices, construct a specific quantum circuit, and derive the exact numbers of qubits and gates required by GAS. Our analysis clarifies that the proposed HUBO formulation significantly reduces the number of qubits and the query complexity compared with the conventional quadratic formulation. This advantage is achieved at the cost of an increased number of quantum gates, which we demonstrate can be reduced by our proposed descending binary encoding.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种将 NP 难无线信道分配问题表述为高阶无约束二元优化 (HUBO) 的新方法，其中使用 Grover 自适应搜索 (GAS) 为解决问题提供二次加速。传统方法依赖于通道索引的独热编码，从而产生二次公式。相比之下，我们设想通道索引的升序和降序二进制编码，构建特定的量子电路，并导出 GAS 所需的量子位和门的确切数量。我们的分析表明，与传统的二次公式相比，所提出的 HUBO 公式显着减少了量子位的数量和查询复杂性。这一优势是以增加量子门数量为代价实现的，我们证明可以通过我们提出的降序二进制编码来减少量子门数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将无线信道分配问题转化为高阶无约束二进制优化问题（HUBO），并通过Grover自适应搜索（GAS）实现量子加速，同时减少量子比特数量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用独热编码导致量子比特和查询复杂度较高，亟需更高效的量子资源利用方案以解决无线信道分配这一NP难问题。
AI.method: 设计升序/降序二进制编码替代独热编码，构建特定量子电路，推导GAS所需的精确量子比特数和门数量，并分析不同编码对资源的影响。
AI.result: HUBO公式显著降低量子比特数量及查询复杂度，但增加量子门数量；通过降序编码可有效减少门数量，实现资源优化。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在量子资源效率上优于传统方案，但需平衡门数量增加问题，降序编码为可行优化路径。

search_text: Qubit Reduction and Quantum Speedup for Wireless Channel Assignment Problem 无线信道分配问题的量子比特缩减和量子加速 In this paper, we propose a novel method of formulating an NP-hard wireless channel assignment problem as a higher-order unconstrained binary optimization (HUBO), where the Grover adaptive search (GAS) is used to provide a quadratic speedup for solving the problem. The conventional method relies on a one-hot encoding of the channel indices, resulting in a quadratic formulation. By contrast, we conceive ascending and descending binary encodings of the channel indices, construct a specific quantum circuit, and derive the exact numbers of qubits and gates required by GAS. Our analysis clarifies that the proposed HUBO formulation significantly reduces the number of qubits and the query complexity compared with the conventional quadratic formulation. This advantage is achieved at the cost of an increased number of quantum gates, which we demonstrate can be reduced by our proposed descending binary encoding. 在本文中，我们提出了一种将 NP 难无线信道分配问题表述为高阶无约束二元优化 (HUBO) 的新方法，其中使用 Grover 自适应搜索 (GAS) 为解决问题提供二次加速。传统方法依赖于通道索引的独热编码，从而产生二次公式。相比之下，我们设想通道索引的升序和降序二进制编码，构建特定的量子电路，并导出 GAS 所需的量子位和门的确切数量。我们的分析表明，与传统的二次公式相比，所提出的 HUBO 公式显着减少了量子位的数量和查询复杂性。这一优势是以增加量子门数量为代价实现的，我们证明可以通过我们提出的降序二进制编码来减少量子门数量。 本文提出将无线信道分配问题转化为高阶无约束二进制优化问题（HUBO），并通过Grover自适应搜索（GAS）实现量子加速，同时减少量子比特数量。 Yuki Sano,Masaya Norimoto,Naoki Ishikawa quant-ph,cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Zhengang Li,Mengshu Sun,Alec Lu,Haoyu Ma,Geng Yuan,Yanyue Xie,Hao Tang,Yanyu Li,Miriam Leeser,Zhangyang Wang,Xue Lin,Zhenman Fang
title: Auto-ViT-Acc: An FPGA-Aware Automatic Acceleration Framework for Vision Transformer with Mixed-Scheme Quantization
title_zh: Auto-ViT-Acc：一种用于具有混合方案量化的 Vision Transformer 的 FPGA 感知自动加速框架
comment: Published in FPL2022
comments: Published in FPL2022
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) are emerging with significantly improved accuracy in computer vision tasks. However, their complex architecture and enormous computation/storage demand impose urgent needs for new hardware accelerator design methodology. This work proposes an FPGA-aware automatic ViT acceleration framework based on the proposed mixed-scheme quantization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first FPGA-based ViT acceleration framework exploring model quantization. Compared with state-of-the-art ViT quantization work (algorithmic approach only without hardware acceleration), our quantization achieves 0.47% to 1.36% higher Top-1 accuracy under the same bit-width. Compared with the 32-bit floating-point baseline FPGA accelerator, our accelerator achieves around 5.6x improvement on the frame rate (i.e., 56.8 FPS vs. 10.0 FPS) with 0.71% accuracy drop on ImageNet dataset for DeiT-base.
summary: Vision transformers (ViTs) are emerging with significantly improved accuracy in computer vision tasks. However, their complex architecture and enormous computation/storage demand impose urgent needs for new hardware accelerator design methodology. This work proposes an FPGA-aware automatic ViT acceleration framework based on the proposed mixed-scheme quantization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first FPGA-based ViT acceleration framework exploring model quantization. Compared with state-of-the-art ViT quantization work (algorithmic approach only without hardware acceleration), our quantization achieves 0.47% to 1.36% higher Top-1 accuracy under the same bit-width. Compared with the 32-bit floating-point baseline FPGA accelerator, our accelerator achieves around 5.6x improvement on the frame rate (i.e., 56.8 FPS vs. 10.0 FPS) with 0.71% accuracy drop on ImageNet dataset for DeiT-base.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器 (ViT) 的出现显着提高了计算机视觉任务的准确性。然而，其复杂的架构和巨大的计算/存储需求迫切需要新的硬件加速器设计方法。这项工作提出了一种基于所提出的混合方案量化的 FPGA 感知自动 ViT 加速框架。据我们所知，这是第一个基于 FPGA 的 ViT 加速框架，探索模型量化。与最先进的 ViT 量化工作（仅无硬件加速的算法方法）相比，我们的量化在相同位宽下实现了 0.47% 至 1.36% 高的 Top-1 精度。与 32 位浮点基线 FPGA 加速器相比，我们的加速器在 DeiT-base 的 ImageNet 数据集上的帧速率提高了约 5.6 倍（即 56.8 FPS 与 10.0 FPS），精度下降了 0.71%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合量化方案的FPGA感知自动加速框架，用于提升视觉Transformer（ViT）的硬件加速效率。
AI.motivation: ViT在准确率上表现优异，但其高计算和存储需求亟需新的硬件加速方法，而现有量化研究多聚焦算法层面，缺乏与FPGA硬件协同优化的方案。
AI.method: 设计混合量化策略，结合FPGA硬件特性，实现ViT模型的自动量化与加速框架，优化计算资源分配与存储效率。
AI.result: 在相同位宽下，量化准确率较算法方法提升0.47%-1.36%；相比32位浮点FPGA基线，帧率提升5.6倍（56.8 FPS vs. 10.0 FPS），准确率仅下降0.71%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过混合量化与FPGA协同设计，在保持较高准确率的同时显著提升ViT加速性能，为硬件感知的模型优化提供了有效方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合量化方案的FPGA感知自动加速框架，用于提升视觉Transformer（ViT）的硬件加速效率。

search_text: Auto-ViT-Acc: An FPGA-Aware Automatic Acceleration Framework for Vision Transformer with Mixed-Scheme Quantization Auto-ViT-Acc：一种用于具有混合方案量化的 Vision Transformer 的 FPGA 感知自动加速框架 Vision transformers (ViTs) are emerging with significantly improved accuracy in computer vision tasks. However, their complex architecture and enormous computation/storage demand impose urgent needs for new hardware accelerator design methodology. This work proposes an FPGA-aware automatic ViT acceleration framework based on the proposed mixed-scheme quantization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first FPGA-based ViT acceleration framework exploring model quantization. Compared with state-of-the-art ViT quantization work (algorithmic approach only without hardware acceleration), our quantization achieves 0.47% to 1.36% higher Top-1 accuracy under the same bit-width. Compared with the 32-bit floating-point baseline FPGA accelerator, our accelerator achieves around 5.6x improvement on the frame rate (i.e., 56.8 FPS vs. 10.0 FPS) with 0.71% accuracy drop on ImageNet dataset for DeiT-base. 视觉变换器 (ViT) 的出现显着提高了计算机视觉任务的准确性。然而，其复杂的架构和巨大的计算/存储需求迫切需要新的硬件加速器设计方法。这项工作提出了一种基于所提出的混合方案量化的 FPGA 感知自动 ViT 加速框架。据我们所知，这是第一个基于 FPGA 的 ViT 加速框架，探索模型量化。与最先进的 ViT 量化工作（仅无硬件加速的算法方法）相比，我们的量化在相同位宽下实现了 0.47% 至 1.36% 高的 Top-1 精度。与 32 位浮点基线 FPGA 加速器相比，我们的加速器在 DeiT-base 的 ImageNet 数据集上的帧速率提高了约 5.6 倍（即 56.8 FPS 与 10.0 FPS），精度下降了 0.71%。 本文提出一种基于混合量化方案的FPGA感知自动加速框架，用于提升视觉Transformer（ViT）的硬件加速效率。 Zhengang Li,Mengshu Sun,Alec Lu,Haoyu Ma,Geng Yuan,Yanyue Xie,Hao Tang,Yanyu Li,Miriam Leeser,Zhangyang Wang,Xue Lin,Zhenman Fang cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Lucas N. Ferreira,Lili Mou,Jim Whitehead,Levi H. S. Lelis
title: Controlling Perceived Emotion in Symbolic Music Generation with Monte Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 用蒙特卡罗树搜索控制符号音乐生成中的感知情感
comment: Accepted for publication at the 18th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Interactive Digital Entertainment (AIIDE-22)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 18th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Interactive Digital Entertainment (AIIDE-22)
abstract: This paper presents a new approach for controlling emotion in symbolic music generation with Monte Carlo Tree Search. We use Monte Carlo Tree Search as a decoding mechanism to steer the probability distribution learned by a language model towards a given emotion. At every step of the decoding process, we use Predictor Upper Confidence for Trees (PUCT) to search for sequences that maximize the average values of emotion and quality as given by an emotion classifier and a discriminator, respectively. We use a language model as PUCT's policy and a combination of the emotion classifier and the discriminator as its value function. To decode the next token in a piece of music, we sample from the distribution of node visits created during the search. We evaluate the quality of the generated samples with respect to human-composed pieces using a set of objective metrics computed directly from the generated samples. We also perform a user study to evaluate how human subjects perceive the generated samples' quality and emotion. We compare PUCT against Stochastic Bi-Objective Beam Search (SBBS) and Conditional Sampling (CS). Results suggest that PUCT outperforms SBBS and CS in almost all metrics of music quality and emotion.
summary: This paper presents a new approach for controlling emotion in symbolic music generation with Monte Carlo Tree Search. We use Monte Carlo Tree Search as a decoding mechanism to steer the probability distribution learned by a language model towards a given emotion. At every step of the decoding process, we use Predictor Upper Confidence for Trees (PUCT) to search for sequences that maximize the average values of emotion and quality as given by an emotion classifier and a discriminator, respectively. We use a language model as PUCT's policy and a combination of the emotion classifier and the discriminator as its value function. To decode the next token in a piece of music, we sample from the distribution of node visits created during the search. We evaluate the quality of the generated samples with respect to human-composed pieces using a set of objective metrics computed directly from the generated samples. We also perform a user study to evaluate how human subjects perceive the generated samples' quality and emotion. We compare PUCT against Stochastic Bi-Objective Beam Search (SBBS) and Conditional Sampling (CS). Results suggest that PUCT outperforms SBBS and CS in almost all metrics of music quality and emotion.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过蒙特卡罗树搜索控制符号音乐生成中情感的新方法。我们使用蒙特卡洛树搜索作为解码机制，将语言模型学习到的概率分布引导至给定的情感。在解码过程的每一步，我们使用树的预测器上置信度（PUCT）来搜索使情感分类器和鉴别器分别给出的情感和质量平均值最大化的序列。我们使用语言模型作为 PUCT 的策略，并使用情感分类器和判别器的组合作为其价值函数。为了解码一段音乐中的下一个标记，我们从搜索期间创建的节点访问分布中进行采样。我们使用一组直接从生成的样本计算的客观指标来评估生成的样本相对于人类创作的作品的质量。我们还进行了一项用户研究，以评估人类受试者如何感知生成的样本的质量和情感。我们将 PUCT 与随机双目标束搜索 (SBBS) 和条件采样 (CS) 进行比较。结果表明，PUCT 在音乐质量和情感的几乎所有指标上都优于 SBBS 和 CS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的符号音乐生成方法，通过控制生成音乐的情感表达。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐生成方法难以有效平衡音乐质量与情感控制，需探索更精准的生成策略。
AI.method: 采用MCTS作为解码机制，结合预测器上置信度（PUCT）算法，利用情感分类器和判别器联合优化情感与质量目标，通过节点访问分布采样生成音乐片段。
AI.result: 在音乐质量与情感指标上，PUCT算法显著优于对比方法Stochastic Bi-Objective Beam Search和Conditional Sampling。
AI.conclusion: MCTS框架能有效提升符号音乐生成的情感控制能力，为情感导向的创作提供新思路。
